nodes.summary: Handles affective/emotional state tracking for agent interactions, persisting state snapshots to disk and providing HTTP endpoints for state read/write.

nodes.name: ai_coordinator.py
nodes.summary: Core AI coordinator routing engine: infers routing profiles, detects query complexity, manages runtime registries, routes by complexity, and builds delegation contract messages for local and remote LLMs.

nodes.name: ai_coordinator_handlers.py
nodes.summary: Primary HTTP request handlers for the AI coordinator covering SSE streaming, model routing, load balancing, circuit breaking, lesson injection, and delegation to local/remote LLMs.

nodes.name: auto_quality_improver.py
nodes.summary: Automatically evaluates and improves LLM responses using configurable quality metrics and thresholds, tracking improvement history and applying targeted transformations.

nodes.name: auto_tool_select_handlers.py
nodes.summary: Handles automatic tool selection for agent tasks including catalog management, plan enrichment, phase-specific tool selection, and skill content serving.

nodes.name: generator_critic.py
nodes.summary: Implements the generator-critic pattern to evaluate LLM responses across completeness, accuracy, format compliance, and code quality; triggers targeted revisions when thresholds aren't met.

nodes.name: identity_handlers.py
nodes.summary: Manages agent identity kernel, providing HTTP endpoints for identity self-description and event handling tied to a persistent identity JSON file.

nodes.name: model_coordinator.py
nodes.summary: Coordinates multi-model task routing by classifying task types into archetypes and selecting appropriate model profiles and roles via a ModelCoordinator singleton.

nodes.name: model_fleet_manager.py
nodes.summary: Manages a fleet of LLM model instances tracking health state, success/error rates, and retry-after delays using Redis-backed persistence with in-memory fallback.

nodes.name: model_opt_handlers.py
nodes.summary: Provides HTTP handlers for model optimization readiness checks, training data management, fine-tuning job lifecycle, performance reporting, and active learning sample selection.

nodes.name: openai_a2a_handlers.py
nodes.summary: Implements OpenAI-compatible agent-to-agent (A2A) HTTP handlers that proxy chat/completions requests through the hybrid coordinator with SSE streaming, lesson injection, and delegation to local/remote LLMs.

nodes.name: pattern_integration.py
nodes.summary: Tracks pattern usage effectiveness, loads patterns from files with caching, and generates contextual query hints from high-performing patterns.

nodes.name: quality_cache.py
nodes.summary: Caches high-quality LLM responses using semantic cache keys with LRU eviction, tracking hit rates and eviction metrics for quality assurance.

nodes.name: quality_monitor.py
nodes.summary: Monitors LLM response quality trends, detects regressions, generates configurable severity alerts, and provides a health summary endpoint.

nodes.summary: Implements real-time learning from capability gaps and meta-learning from agent performance patterns; plans remediations and updates learning state.

nodes.summary: HTTP POST with JSON payload; returns parsed response or error dict.

nodes.name: Status
nodes.summary: Enum of QA check outcomes: PASS, FAIL, SKIP.

nodes.name: ResultSet
nodes.summary: Aggregates a list of CheckResult objects for a phase, computing pass/fail/skip counts and detecting degraded confidence from layer failures.

nodes.name: ConsoleReporter
nodes.summary: ANSI/rich console reporter with render() method; falls back to plain text when rich is unavailable; shows layered table with pass/fail/skip symbols.

nodes.name: JsonReporter
nodes.summary: JSON reporter with render() method; serializes ResultSet to aq-qa --json schema with phase, counts, duration, degraded_confidence, tests, and layers.

nodes.name: FakeContext
nodes.summary: Minimal dataclass stub for RunContext used in unit tests for _check_delegate_rate.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Test entry point that monkey-patches _service_active_age_seconds and http_json to verify delegate SLO uses current activation window.

nodes.name: assert_true
nodes.summary: Simple assertion helper raising AssertionError with message on failure.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package init file for the dashboard backend config module.

nodes.name: service_endpoints.py
nodes.summary: Defines all AI service endpoint URLs by parsing port config from environment variables. Acts as the single source of truth for internal service addresses (llama.cpp, AIDB, switchboard, coordinator, etc.).

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI application entry point: registers all route blueprints, configures CORS/security-header middleware, rate-limiting middleware, WebSocket endpoints for live metrics and agent-state streaming, and the app lifespan context manager.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package init for the routes sub-package.

nodes.name: actions.py
nodes.summary: REST API routes for loading and executing named harness actions defined in a YAML config file.

nodes.name: adk.py
nodes.summary: Routes for ADK parity tracking: exposes parity scorecard, integration discoveries, gap reports, and roadmap-impact assessments sourced from YAML files on disk.

nodes.name: aistack.py
nodes.summary: The largest route module (6 900+ lines, 191 endpoints): proxies and orchestrates all AI stack operations including model inference, memory store/recall, AIDB RAG, workflow dispatch, feedback, PRSI approval, agent control, fine-tuning, and harness eval.

nodes.name: audit.py
nodes.summary: Exposes three read-only audit endpoints: summary, event list, and integrity check against the OperatorAuditLog service.

nodes.name: collaboration.py
nodes.summary: Multi-agent collaboration API: agent registration, team formation, A2A message passing, shared context, planning, consensus, peer-review, and task-recording endpoints.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Configuration management routes: reads and writes harness configuration files (workflow blueprints, agent manifests, harness-first policy, route aliases, runbooks) and serves repo-graph surface metadata.

nodes.name: containers.py
nodes.summary: Container management routes: list containers, start/stop/restart AI-stack or individual containers, and stream container logs via the ContainerManager service.

nodes.name: deployments.py
nodes.summary: NixOS deployment pipeline routes: execute, progress-track, approve, complete, and rollback flake deployments; broadcasts real-time deployment status via WebSocket and integrates with ContextStore and AIInsightsService.

nodes.name: firewall.py
nodes.summary: Firewall management routes backed by nftables and CrowdSec: read firewall status, apply/remove captive-portal rules, control CrowdSec decisions, and execute privileged commands with an operator audit trail.

nodes.name: health.py
nodes.summary: Service health-check routes: aggregate and per-service health from AIServiceHealthMonitor, category listing, and layered aq-qa execution; loads hybrid API key from secrets file.

nodes.name: insights.py
nodes.summary: AI insights routes: delegates to AIInsightsService to return full insight reports, tool-performance stats, routing analytics, hint effectiveness, workflow compliance, Phase-4 acceptance, and A2A readiness metrics.

nodes.name: metrics.py
nodes.summary: Thin route layer for system metrics: delegates to MetricsCollector for current metrics, historical series, and computed health score.

nodes.name: services.py
nodes.summary: Systemd service management routes: list, start, stop, and restart individual or all services via ServiceManager.

nodes.name: testing.py
nodes.summary: Test execution routes: spawn and manage testing suite processes, stream execution output, and report test execution status.

nodes.name: topology.py
nodes.summary: Service topology routes: discovers live service graph by probing endpoints from service_endpoints config, provides flow visualization, and supports logic-pattern search via AIDB.

nodes.name: websockets.py
nodes.summary: Minimal stub file for WebSocket route imports; actual WebSocket handlers are defined in main.py.

nodes.name: workflows.py
nodes.summary: AI workflow generation and optimization routes: calls LLM via coordinator to generate/optimize YAML workflow graphs, lists and retrieves templates, and adapts workflows to context.

nodes.name: ai_insights.py
nodes.summary: Singleton AIInsightsService: aggregates and caches AI stack metrics from Prometheus, AIDB, delegation feedback, Phase-4 reports, and reviewer-gate checklists; exposes a rich insights object consumed by the insights and deployments routes.

nodes.name: ai_service_health.py
nodes.summary: AIServiceHealthMonitor singleton: periodically probes all AI stack service endpoints (llama.cpp, AIDB, switchboard, coordinator) and tracks their health status including switchboard local-lane resolution.

nodes.name: container_manager.py
nodes.summary: ContainerManager service: wraps Docker/Podman container operations (list, start, stop, restart, logs) for the AI stack containers.

nodes.name: context_store.py
nodes.summary: ContextStore singleton (2 600+ lines): persists and queries deployment history, runtime context, and state snapshots to/from a file-backed store with locking; used by deployments and other routes.

nodes.name: metrics_collector.py
nodes.summary: MetricsCollector singleton: gathers system and AI service metrics (CPU, memory, GPU, systemd unit states) on a polling interval and maintains a rolling history.

nodes.name: qa_runner.py
nodes.summary: QA runner module: executes aq-qa health-check phases by invoking the aq-qa binary as a subprocess and normalizing its JSON output; handles phase-0 dashboard-confined mode.

nodes.name: runtime_controls.py
nodes.summary: Provides DashboardRateLimiter and OperatorAuditLog singletons: rate-limiter enforces per-client request throttling; audit log maintains an append-only ring buffer of operator actions with integrity hashing.

nodes.name: service_manager.py
nodes.summary: ServiceManager singleton: controls systemd units via dbus/systemctl (start, stop, restart, list) for AI stack services.

nodes.name: systemd_units.py
nodes.summary: Utility functions to discover and categorize AI stack systemd units by querying systemctl show and dependency graph; distinguishes monitored, runtime, and full AI-stack units.

nodes.name: _parse_port
nodes.summary: Parses a port number from an environment variable that may contain a bare integer, a full URL, or a host:port string; falls back to a default value.

nodes.name: lifespan
nodes.summary: FastAPI lifespan context manager: initialises MetricsCollector and AIInsightsService on startup, spawns the broadcast_metrics background task, and cleanly shuts down connections and services on exit.

nodes.name: runtime_controls_middleware
nodes.summary: ASGI middleware that enforces rate-limiting and appends structured request/response records to the OperatorAuditLog for every API call.

nodes.name: websocket_agent_state
nodes.summary: WebSocket endpoint that streams real-time agent-state events (tool calls, phase transitions) to connected dashboard clients by polling the agent-events backend.

nodes.name: broadcast_metrics
nodes.summary: Background async task that collects system metrics on a fixed interval and broadcasts them to all active WebSocket metric connections.

nodes.name: execute_action
nodes.summary: POST endpoint that loads the actions YAML config and executes the requested named action via subprocess, returning output and status.

nodes.name: get_http_session
nodes.summary: Returns (or lazily creates) a shared aiohttp.ClientSession used for all upstream AI service HTTP requests from the aistack routes.

nodes.name: fetch_with_fallback
nodes.summary: Async helper that forwards a JSON request to a primary service URL with optional fallback; handles timeouts, status errors, and returns the parsed response body.

nodes.name: get_operator_audit_summary
nodes.summary: Returns a summary view of operator audit events from the OperatorAuditLog singleton.

nodes.name: register_agent
nodes.summary: Registers a new agent identity with the collaboration hub, assigning a unique slot in the team registry.

nodes.name: send_message
nodes.summary: Posts an A2A message from one agent to another agent's queue in the collaboration message bus.

nodes.name: get_all_services_health
nodes.summary: Returns the aggregated health status for all monitored AI stack services from AIServiceHealthMonitor.

nodes.name: get_full_insights_report
nodes.summary: Returns the complete AI insights report snapshot from AIInsightsService including metrics, routing analytics, and compliance data.

nodes.name: run_sudo_command
nodes.summary: Executes a whitelisted nftables or CrowdSec command with sudo privileges, logging the action to the operator audit trail.

nodes.name: get_topology
nodes.summary: Probes all known service endpoints to build a live topology graph of the AI stack services and their connectivity.

nodes.name: generate_workflow
nodes.summary: POST endpoint that calls the local LLM via the coordinator to generate a YAML workflow graph from a natural-language description.

nodes.name: AIInsightsService
nodes.summary: Core insights aggregation service: scrapes Prometheus metrics, reads delegation-feedback and Phase-4 acceptance reports, queries AIDB for learning-loop data, and exposes a unified insights dict consumed across multiple routes.

nodes.name: AIServiceHealthMonitor
nodes.summary: Periodic health monitor for all AI stack services: polls endpoints, tracks up/down state, resolves switchboard local-lane availability, and caches results for low-latency reads.

nodes.name: ContainerManager
nodes.summary: Wraps container runtime (Docker/Podman) operations: inspects, starts, stops, restarts AI stack containers and streams their logs.

nodes.name: ContextStore
nodes.summary: Large persistence layer for deployment runtime context: stores and retrieves deployment records, phase snapshots, and runtime state using a file-backed JSON store with fcntl locking.

nodes.name: MetricsCollector
nodes.summary: Background service that collects CPU, memory, GPU, and systemd unit metrics on a configurable polling interval and maintains a capped rolling history for the metrics routes.

nodes.name: run_phase_json
nodes.summary: Executes a specific aq-qa phase by invoking the binary as a subprocess and returns the parsed JSON result; normalises dashboard-confined phase-0 output.

nodes.name: DashboardRateLimiter
nodes.summary: In-memory per-client rate limiter for the dashboard API: tracks request counts in a sliding window and enforces configurable request-rate ceilings.

nodes.name: OperatorAuditLog
nodes.summary: Append-only ring-buffer audit log for operator API actions with HMAC integrity chaining; provides summary and integrity-check views.

nodes.name: ServiceManager
nodes.summary: Manages AI stack systemd units: starts, stops, restarts, and lists units by delegating to systemctl via subprocess.

nodes.name: get_ai_stack_units
nodes.summary: Queries systemctl to discover all AI stack systemd unit names by following service dependencies from a root unit.

nodes.name: server.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI embeddings microservice that loads a SentenceTransformer model with retry logic, batches encode requests via an async queue worker, exposes /embed and /v1/embeddings (OpenAI-compatible) endpoints, and serves Prometheus metrics. Handles auth middleware, request tracking, and health/info routes.

nodes.name: advanced_features.py
nodes.summary: 1-line re-export stub. Imports and re-exports everything from extensions/advanced_features.py to maintain a flat import path for consumers.

nodes.name: agents_task_handlers.py
nodes.summary: 1-line re-export stub. Delegates to workflow/agents_task_handlers.py.

nodes.name: auth_middleware.py
nodes.summary: 1-line re-export stub. Delegates to core/auth_middleware.py.

nodes.name: capability_discovery.py
nodes.summary: 1-line re-export stub. Delegates to knowledge/capability_discovery.py.

nodes.name: collections_config.py
nodes.summary: 1-line re-export stub. Delegates to knowledge/collections_config.py.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: 2-line re-export stub. Delegates to core/config.py, providing a flat import path for the coordinator's Config object.

nodes.name: context_compression.py
nodes.summary: 1-line re-export stub. Delegates to knowledge/context_compression.py.

nodes.name: continuous_learning.py
nodes.summary: 5-line re-export stub. Delegates to extensions/continuous_learning.py.

nodes.name: continuous_learning_daemon.py
nodes.summary: 1-line re-export stub. Delegates to extensions/continuous_learning_daemon.py.

nodes.name: core/auth_middleware.py
nodes.summary: 17-line thin re-export that forwards to middleware/auth.py. Sits in the core package for legacy import compatibility.

nodes.name: core/config.py
nodes.summary: Central coordinator configuration (937 lines). Defines Config (env-driven settings for llama.cpp, Qdrant, Redis, secrets), RoutingConfig (collection weights and backend policy), OptimizationProposal (typed change proposals), and PerformanceWindow. Loads reasoning profiles from YAML. Includes apply_proposal() for live config mutations.

nodes.name: core/llm_client.py
nodes.summary: Async LLM HTTP client (707 lines) with circuit-breaker and retry integration. LLMClient wraps llama.cpp /v1/chat/completions with streaming support; PromptBuilder assembles structured prompts with role injection; LLMResponse normalises responses. Includes a CLI test harness.

nodes.name: core/metrics.py
nodes.summary: Prometheus metrics registry for the hybrid coordinator (347 lines). Declares counters, histograms and gauges for request rates, latency, backend selection, collection search times, and queue depths. No classes — pure metric object definitions consumed by other modules.

nodes.name: core/route_handler.py
nodes.summary: Core routing engine (2209 lines). Orchestrates query dispatch: classifies task complexity, selects local-vs-remote inference lane, performs Qdrant hybrid search, builds synthesis context, calls LLM with circuit-breaker resilience, and returns a merged result. Contains BackendSelectionCache for TTL-cached routing decisions and CollectionLatencyMetrics for adaptive timeouts.

nodes.name: core/task_classifier.py
nodes.summary: Lightweight task complexity classifier (207 lines). Implements TaskComplexity enum and a classify() function that uses word-count heuristics and keyword patterns to assign queries to complexity bands (simple/moderate/complex/expert) which drive local-vs-remote routing decisions.

nodes.name: drift_analyzer.py
nodes.summary: Model/data drift detector (206 lines). DriftAnalyzer polls a recent trace window from PostgreSQL, computes drift scores against a baseline distribution, and exposes an HTTP route (handle_get_drift) for the coordinator to surface drift alerts.

nodes.name: embedder.py
nodes.summary: 1-line re-export stub. Delegates to knowledge/embedder.py.

nodes.name: embedding_cache.py
nodes.summary: 1-line re-export stub. Delegates to knowledge/embedding_cache.py.

nodes.name: eval_runner.py
nodes.summary: RAGAS-style evaluation runner (615 lines). Scores retrieval-augmented generation quality: answer relevance (embedding cosine sim), context precision, and faithfulness (async LLM-based). Persists results to PostgreSQL, computes trend windows, and exposes HTTP handlers (handle_eval_run, handle_eval_trend, handle_eval_score_query).

nodes.name: extensions/advanced_features.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive advanced capabilities module (2186 lines). Implements AgentPoolManager (multi-tier agent selection), ResultQualityChecker (response scoring), LocalFallbackAdvisor, PromptCompressor (semantic and heuristic compression), PromptTemplateOptimizer (A/B variants), ContextPruner, HierarchicalSummarizer, SlidingWindowManager, TierSelector, GapDetector, RemediationWorkspace, and OnlineLearner. All components are accessed via module-level singletons.

nodes.name: extensions/continuous_learning.py
nodes.summary: Continuous learning pipeline (1511 lines). ContinuousLearningPipeline captures interaction patterns, generates FinetuningExample records, tracks PerformanceMetrics, builds OptimizationProposals, and coordinates checkpoint persistence. Uses authenticated HTTP client and circuit breaker for external calls; redacts PII via telemetry_privacy.

nodes.name: extensions/continuous_learning_daemon.py
nodes.summary: Background daemon (173 lines) that instantiates and drives ContinuousLearningPipeline on a schedule. Reads Settings (poll interval, DB URL) from env, connects to PostgreSQL via postgres_client, and runs main() as an asyncio event loop.

nodes.name: extensions/federated_integration.py
nodes.summary: Federated agent integration layer (447 lines). FederatedIntegration manages peer coordinator registries, recommends agents for tasks across federation boundaries, tracks cross-coordinator task completion, and aggregates performance statistics.

nodes.name: extensions/federated_mcp_handlers.py
nodes.summary: MCP route handlers for federation operations (318 lines). Wraps FederatedIntegration with HTTP handlers: handle_recommend_agent_for_task, handle_get_agent_recommendations, handle_track_task_completion, handle_get_federated_stats, and dispatch_federated_tool for cross-coordinator tool invocation.

nodes.name: extensions/harness_eval.py
nodes.summary: Harness evaluation engine (471 lines). run_harness_evaluation executes the aq-qa test suite against live coordinator routes and produces a structured result; build_harness_scorecard aggregates results into a summary scorecard. Uses InferenceParamManager for hardware-aware inference settings.

nodes.name: extensions/interaction_tracker.py
nodes.summary: Interaction tracking and dataset generation module (651 lines). Logs query/response pairs with value scores and reusability estimates, records user feedback and corrections, syncs gaps to JSONL, extracts reusable patterns, and generates fine-tuning datasets from high-value interactions.

nodes.name: EmbeddingBatcher
nodes.summary: Async-safe batching worker: collects individual embed requests from a thread-safe queue, groups them into micro-batches, calls model.encode(), and resolves per-request Futures. Manages batch size, wait timeout, and queue depth metrics.

nodes.name: Config
nodes.summary: Central coordinator config dataclass. Reads all settings from environment variables (llama.cpp URL, Qdrant URL/API key, Redis URL, auth tokens, SOPS secrets). Holds RoutingConfig, reasoning profiles, and feature flags.

nodes.name: RoutingConfig
nodes.summary: Routing policy container: collection weights for hybrid search, local/remote backend thresholds, complexity band cutoffs, and burst-mode configuration.

nodes.name: OptimizationProposal
nodes.summary: Typed change proposal produced by the learning pipeline. Fields: proposal_type (OptimizationProposalType enum), target, current_value, proposed_value, confidence, and rationale. Consumed by apply_proposal().

nodes.name: LLMClient
nodes.summary: Async HTTP client for llama.cpp /v1/chat/completions. Supports streaming and non-streaming modes, injects circuit-breaker, retries with backoff, and normalises raw JSON responses into LLMResponse objects.

nodes.name: PromptBuilder
nodes.summary: Fluent builder for OpenAI-format chat message arrays. Supports role injection, system prompt prepend, and context block append. Used by route_handler to assemble per-lane prompts.

nodes.name: BackendSelectionCache
nodes.summary: TTL-based in-memory cache for backend routing decisions keyed by query hash. Prevents repeated classification for similar queries within a configurable window.

nodes.name: TaskComplexity
nodes.summary: Enum of task complexity bands: SIMPLE, MODERATE, COMPLEX, EXPERT. Used as the output type of classify() to drive local-vs-remote backend selection.

nodes.name: DriftAnalyzer
nodes.summary: Reads recent query traces from PostgreSQL and computes statistical drift scores (response length variance, latency deviation, quality degradation) relative to a rolling baseline. Emits drift severity levels for alerting.

nodes.name: AgentPoolManager
nodes.summary: Manages a tiered pool of remote agents (AgentProfile per agent). Tracks availability, latency, quality scores, and benchmark history. Provides select_remote_agent() and select_failover_remote_agent() methods for workload distribution.

nodes.name: ResultQualityChecker
nodes.summary: Scores LLM responses on a QualityLevel scale using length, coherence, and keyword-coverage heuristics. Feeds quality signals back to AgentPoolManager and OnlineLearner.

nodes.name: PromptCompressor
nodes.summary: Reduces prompt token count via two strategies: heuristic (sentence truncation, deduplication) and semantic (embedding-based relevance filtering). Tracks compression ratio statistics.

nodes.name: OnlineLearner
nodes.summary: Records LearningSignal events (feedback type, outcome, context) and maintains an in-memory learning history. Generates recommendations for routing adjustments and config proposals based on accumulated signal patterns.

nodes.name: ContinuousLearningPipeline
nodes.summary: End-to-end continuous learning orchestrator. Ingests interaction data, filters for high-quality examples (via PerformanceMetric thresholds), formats FinetuningExample records, checkpoints progress, and emits OptimizationProposals to the coordinator config layer.

nodes.name: FinetuningExample
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a single supervised fine-tuning record: prompt, completion, quality_score, source_interaction_id, and metadata tags. Serialised to JSONL for training data export.

nodes.name: FederatedIntegration
nodes.summary: Cross-coordinator federation layer. Maintains a peer registry, routes task recommendations across coordinators, records task completions for cross-coordinator performance tracking, and exposes aggregated statistics.

nodes.name: load_model_with_retry
nodes.summary: Loads SentenceTransformer model from env-specified path with up to N retries and a per-attempt timeout. Validates the model with a smoke-test encode call before returning. Used during startup to handle slow model file I/O.

nodes.name: route_search
nodes.summary: Top-level query routing function. Classifies complexity, checks backend cache, selects local/remote inference lane, builds hybrid Qdrant search, synthesises context, calls LLM with resilience wrapper, and assembles the final response dict. Central hot path of the coordinator.

nodes.name: _select_local_inference_lane
nodes.summary: Decides which local inference profile to use (compact/standard/deep-reasoning) based on query complexity, continuation signals, token budget, and runtime config. Returns a lane reason string consumed by prompt assembly.

nodes.name: _remote_burst_decision
nodes.summary: Evaluates whether to route a query to a remote LLM backend (strong-reasoning queries, expert complexity, or explicit user preference). Returns a boolean and recommended remote profile name.

nodes.name: classify
nodes.summary: Classifies a query string into a TaskComplexity band using word count, sentence structure, and domain-keyword heuristics. Fast, synchronous, and zero-dependency — called in the hot path before any I/O.

nodes.name: score_answer_relevance
nodes.summary: Computes embedding cosine similarity between the original query and the generated answer to produce an answer relevance score (0–1). Falls back to a keyword overlap heuristic when the embeddings service is unavailable.

nodes.name: score_faithfulness_async
nodes.summary: Async faithfulness scorer that asks the local LLM to verify whether each claim in the answer is supported by the retrieved context. Falls back to a heuristic token-set overlap when LLM is unavailable.

nodes.name: handle_eval_run
nodes.summary: HTTP handler that accepts an evaluation request payload, runs score_answer_relevance + score_faithfulness_async + score_context_precision, persists results, and returns a JSON evaluation report.

nodes.name: select_remote_agent
nodes.summary: Selects the best available remote agent from the pool based on tier, current load, latency history, and quality scores. Returns an AgentProfile or None if no suitable agent is available.

nodes.name: assess_response_quality
nodes.summary: Scores a response string using ResultQualityChecker heuristics and returns a QualityAssessment. Records the outcome back into AgentPoolManager for pool-level quality tracking.

nodes.name: run_harness_evaluation
nodes.summary: Executes the aq-qa test suite by dispatching HTTP requests to live coordinator routes and collecting pass/fail results per test case. Appends recent failures for trend tracking.

nodes.name: build_harness_scorecard
nodes.summary: Aggregates run_harness_evaluation results into a parity scorecard: overall pass rate, per-route breakdown, failure summaries, and fix hints. Returns a structured dict suitable for the /harness_scorecard HTTP endpoint.

nodes.name: track_interaction
nodes.summary: Records a query/response pair as an interaction record with computed value score, reusability estimate, complexity label, and timestamp. Persists to in-memory store and optionally flushes to JSONL.

nodes.name: generate_fine_tuning_dataset
nodes.summary: Filters tracked interactions by quality threshold, formats them as instruction/completion JSONL pairs, and writes a fine-tuning dataset file. Optionally deduplicates via embedding similarity.

nodes.name: record_learning_feedback
nodes.summary: Records explicit user feedback (thumbs up/down or correction) against an interaction. Updates value score retroactively and flags the interaction for inclusion in fine-tuning dataset on next generation cycle.

nodes.name: dispatch_federated_tool
nodes.summary: Routes a tool invocation to the appropriate peer coordinator via FederatedIntegration. Handles serialisation, response normalisation, and error surfacing for cross-coordinator tool calls.

nodes.name: handle_recommend_agent_for_task
nodes.summary: HTTP handler that accepts a task description and returns the recommended peer agent/coordinator from FederatedIntegration.recommend_agent_for_task().

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Async entry point for the continuous learning daemon. Reads Settings from env, initialises PostgresClient, instantiates ContinuousLearningPipeline, and runs the pipeline polling loop indefinitely.

nodes.name: mcp_handlers.py
nodes.summary: Core MCP tool dispatch handler for the hybrid coordinator — routes 40+ tools including QA checks, RAG search, harness eval, and sub-MCP server calls.

nodes.name: model_loader.py
nodes.summary: Local LLM health check and readiness polling — detects llama.cpp availability and waits for model warm-up.

nodes.name: model_optimization.py
nodes.summary: Training data capture, PII detection/anonymization, fine-tuning job tracking, distillation pipeline, and model performance monitoring.

nodes.name: model_probe.py
nodes.summary: Runtime model capability probing — measures inference speed, detects thinking-token support, computes token budgets, and caches ModelProfile.

nodes.name: prompt_injection.py
nodes.summary: Prompt injection security scanner — detects and sanitizes adversarial prompt patterns in user queries.

nodes.name: federated_integration.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export shim forwarding FederatedIntegration from extensions/federated_integration.py.

nodes.name: federated_mcp_handlers.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export shim for federated MCP handler functions from extensions/federated_mcp_handlers.py.

nodes.name: harness_eval.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export shim for harness evaluation functions from extensions/harness_eval.py.

nodes.name: interaction_tracker.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export shim for interaction tracking functions from extensions/interaction_tracker.py.

nodes.name: capability_discovery.py
nodes.summary: Discovers applicable AIDB/knowledge resources for a given query — ranks collections, formats context snippets for injection.

nodes.name: collections_config.py
nodes.summary: Qdrant collection initialization — creates/recreates vector collections with dimension mismatch repair logic.

nodes.name: context_compression.py
nodes.summary: Context compression engine — reduces token usage in conversation history while preserving semantic content.

nodes.name: context_lifecycle_manager.py
nodes.summary: Manages the full lifecycle of LLM context windows — eviction, scoring, and route registration for CLM API endpoints.

nodes.name: embedder.py
nodes.summary: Text embedding wrapper — calls local llama-embed service with retry and returns float vectors; thread-safe init.

nodes.name: embedding_cache.py
nodes.summary: Embedding cache — stores and retrieves text embedding vectors keyed by content hash; tracks hit/miss metrics.

nodes.name: memory_context_handlers.py
nodes.summary: HTTP route handlers for memory and context operations — store/recall memories, harness eval, QA checks, multi-turn context, capability discovery.

nodes.name: memory_manager.py
nodes.summary: Core agent memory persistence in Qdrant — stores/recalls typed memories with duplicate detection, cosine similarity ranking, and latency tracking.

nodes.name: multi_turn_context.py
nodes.summary: Multi-turn conversation context manager — maintains per-session state, applies compression and query expansion across turns.

nodes.name: query_expansion.py
nodes.summary: Query expansion and result reranking — expands queries with synonyms/context, reranks search results using cross-encoder scoring.

nodes.name: search_router.py
nodes.summary: Hybrid search router — routes queries across Qdrant collections, scores/reranks combined results with keyword and semantic signals.

nodes.name: semantic_cache.py
nodes.summary: Semantic query cache — caches search results keyed by embedding similarity threshold to avoid redundant Qdrant queries.

nodes.name: llm_client.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export shim for LLMClient/PromptBuilder from core/llm_client.py.

nodes.name: mcp_handlers.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export shim forwarding dispatch_tool and init from extensions/mcp_handlers.py.

nodes.name: memory_context_handlers.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export shim forwarding memory context handlers from knowledge/memory_context_handlers.py.

nodes.name: memory_crystallizer.py
nodes.summary: Memory crystallizer — distills session interaction history into durable long-term memories persisted to PostgreSQL.

nodes.name: memory_manager.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export shim forwarding memory manager functions from knowledge/memory_manager.py.

nodes.name: metrics.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export shim forwarding metrics from core/metrics.py.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Registers all MCP tool handler functions (search, memory, eval, embed, QA) and wires Qdrant client and harness stats.

nodes.name: dispatch_tool
nodes.summary: Master tool dispatcher (683 lines) — routes MCP tool calls by name to the correct handler function with error handling.

nodes.name: run_qa_check_as_dict
nodes.summary: Executes an aq-qa health check phase via subprocess and returns structured dict results.

nodes.name: _call_mcp_server
nodes.summary: Spawns a sub-MCP server process via stdio JSON-RPC and proxies tool calls to it.

nodes.name: _build_qa_exec_env
nodes.summary: Builds a sanitized subprocess environment for QA check execution — resolves bash/python3 binaries and sets harness paths.

nodes.name: _write_audit
nodes.summary: Writes a structured audit log entry for each MCP tool invocation including latency and outcome.

nodes.name: check_local_llm_health
nodes.summary: Checks llama.cpp health endpoint and returns structured status dict with model info.

nodes.name: wait_for_local_model
nodes.summary: Polls llama.cpp until model is ready or timeout; used during service startup.

nodes.name: TrainingDataCapture
nodes.summary: Captures high-quality agent interactions as JSONL training examples with PII filtering and quality scoring.

nodes.name: FineTuningStatus
nodes.summary: Tracks in-progress fine-tuning jobs including status, dataset path, and metrics.

nodes.name: ModelPerformanceTracker
nodes.summary: Records and aggregates model performance metrics (latency, accuracy, coherence) over time.

nodes.name: DistillationJobTracker
nodes.summary: Tracks teacher→student model distillation pipeline runs and outputs.

nodes.name: assess_interaction_quality
nodes.summary: Scores an agent interaction for training data quality — checks coherence, specificity, and tool usage.

nodes.name: run_distillation_pipeline
nodes.summary: Runs the full teacher→student distillation pipeline (121 lines) — generates synthetic data, tunes hyperparams.

nodes.name: start_finetuning_job
nodes.summary: Launches a fine-tuning job from captured JSONL training data and registers it in FineTuningStatus.

nodes.name: select_active_learning_examples
nodes.summary: Selects highest-value training examples for active learning via uncertainty/diversity sampling.

nodes.name: get_optimization_readiness
nodes.summary: Assesses readiness of the optimization pipeline — checks data quantity, quality thresholds, and hardware.

nodes.name: ModelProfile
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding probed model capabilities — token budgets, speed (tok/s), thinking support flag.

nodes.name: probe
nodes.summary: Async model probe (77 lines) — sends test prompts to measure speed, detect thinking tokens, compute budgets; caches result.

nodes.name: _compute_budgets
nodes.summary: Computes input/output token budget split based on model context window and speed.

nodes.name: PromptInjectionScanner
nodes.summary: Regex + heuristic scanner that detects prompt injection patterns (role override, jailbreak, indirect injection).

nodes.name: sanitize_query
nodes.summary: Module-level convenience function to scan and sanitize a query string through PromptInjectionScanner.

nodes.name: _discover_applicable_resources
nodes.summary: Core discovery logic (111 lines) — queries AIDB collections to find relevant skills, tools, and knowledge for a query.

nodes.name: _rank_items_for_query
nodes.summary: Ranks discovered resources by relevance to the query using token overlap and recency scoring.

nodes.name: format_context
nodes.summary: Formats ranked discovery results into an injectable context block for LLM prompts.

nodes.name: initialize_collections
nodes.summary: Idempotently initializes all required Qdrant vector collections; repairs dimension mismatches via recreate.

nodes.name: ContextCompressor
nodes.summary: Compresses LLM context by summarizing older turns and removing low-signal content to stay within token budgets.

nodes.name: ContextLifecycleManager
nodes.summary: Manages context window lifecycle across sessions — evicts stale context, scores relevance, integrates with CLM API routes.

nodes.name: embed_text_uncached
nodes.summary: Direct HTTP call to llama-embed service returning raw float vector; no caching.

nodes.name: embed_text
nodes.summary: Cache-aware embedding function — checks EmbeddingCache before calling embed_text_uncached.

nodes.name: EmbeddingCache
nodes.summary: In-memory + optional Redis embedding cache keyed by content hash; tracks hit/miss/eviction metrics.

nodes.name: handle_memory_store
nodes.summary: HTTP handler for POST /memory/store — validates and delegates to store_agent_memory.

nodes.name: handle_memory_recall
nodes.summary: HTTP handler for POST /memory/recall (83 lines) — queries memory with filters and returns ranked results.

nodes.name: handle_harness_eval
nodes.summary: HTTP handler for harness evaluation requests — invokes harness eval pipeline and returns scorecard.

nodes.name: handle_qa_check
nodes.summary: HTTP handler for QA phase checks — runs aq-qa health check and returns structured results.

nodes.name: store_agent_memory
nodes.summary: Stores a typed agent memory to Qdrant with deduplication check, embedding, and metadata normalization.

nodes.name: _persist_agent_memory
nodes.summary: Low-level Qdrant upsert for a memory point with full metadata payload.

nodes.name: recall_agent_memory
nodes.summary: Recalls agent memories (168 lines) — embeds query, runs cosine similarity search in Qdrant, applies filters/reranking.

nodes.name: _query_qdrant_points
nodes.summary: Executes a vector search against a Qdrant collection with filter and score threshold.

nodes.name: MultiTurnContextManager
nodes.summary: Stateful manager for multi-turn conversations — stores SessionState per session, applies compression on overflow, expands queries.

nodes.name: QueryExpander
nodes.summary: Expands user queries with synonyms, related terms, and contextual signals to improve recall.

nodes.name: ResultReranker
nodes.summary: Reranks search results using BM25 + semantic similarity blend after initial retrieval.

nodes.name: CrossEncoderReranker
nodes.summary: Cross-encoder based result reranker for high-precision reranking of candidate results.

nodes.name: QueryExpansionReranking
nodes.summary: Orchestrates query expansion followed by multi-stage reranking pipeline.

nodes.name: SearchRouter
nodes.summary: Routes hybrid search queries across Qdrant collections — selects collections, adjusts scores, merges results.

nodes.name: keyword_match_score
nodes.summary: Scores a search result by keyword overlap with the query using token matching and path category heuristics.

nodes.name: rerank_combined_results
nodes.summary: Merges and reranks results from multiple Qdrant collection searches into a unified scored list.

nodes.name: SemanticCache
nodes.summary: Caches search results by embedding similarity — returns cached response if query embedding is within threshold.

nodes.name: MemoryCrystallizer
nodes.summary: Distills session interaction logs into durable crystallized memories stored in PostgreSQL for long-term recall.

nodes.name: auth.py
nodes.summary: API key authentication middleware for the hybrid coordinator. Implements profile-based auth policies, loopback bypass detection, per-tool access control gated by profile, and denial-count tracking.

nodes.name: model_loader.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export stub that re-exports everything from extensions/model_loader.py, providing a stable top-level import path.

nodes.name: model_optimization.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export stub for extensions/model_optimization.py covering training data capture, PII detection, fine-tuning, and distillation.

nodes.name: model_probe.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export stub for extensions/model_probe.py which probes and caches the local LLM model profile.

nodes.name: multi_turn_context.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export stub for knowledge/multi_turn_context.py providing multi-turn session context management.

nodes.name: prompt_injection.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export stub for extensions/prompt_injection.py providing query sanitization and prompt-injection scanning.

nodes.name: query_expansion.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export stub for knowledge/query_expansion.py covering query expansion, cross-encoder reranking, and result reranking.

nodes.name: route_handler.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export stub for core/route_handler.py, the primary search routing and LLM dispatch layer.

nodes.name: router.py
nodes.summary: aiohttp application factory for the hybrid coordinator. Wires tracing, request-ID, rate-limit, and auth middlewares; registers all route groups (status, memory, query, orchestration, agent, CLM, graph, MCP JSON-RPC, temporal, consensus).

nodes.name: search_router.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export stub for knowledge/search_router.py which implements hybrid vector+keyword search routing.

nodes.name: semantic_cache.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export stub for knowledge/semantic_cache.py providing semantic query caching.

nodes.name: server.py
nodes.summary: Main entry point for the hybrid coordinator MCP/HTTP server. Handles server initialization, telemetry, search delegation (hybrid/tree), LLM backend selection, continuous learning loops, drift homeostasis, circuit breakers, and MCP tool dispatch.

nodes.name: task_classifier.py
nodes.summary: Thin re-export stub for core/task_classifier.py providing task complexity classification.

nodes.name: test_drift_analyzer.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for DriftAnalyzer. Verifies graceful degradation without Postgres and correct drift scoring over a recent trace window using a fake Postgres stub.

nodes.name: test_llm_client.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for LLMClient covering local (switchboard v1 base) and OpenAI routing, prompt routing via continue-local and tool-calling profiles, and correct payload construction.

nodes.name: test_mcp_handlers_dispatch.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for mcp_handlers dispatch logic: QA phase normalization, exec-env construction, binary resolution, and run_qa_check_as_dict including JSON-fallback behavior.

nodes.name: test_memory_crystallizer.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for MemoryCrystallizer verifying DDL idempotence, session hash tracking, and correct runtime-learning metadata emission on crystallize_session.

nodes.name: agents_task_handlers.py
nodes.summary: Agent lifecycle and review workflow handlers. Covers agent spawning, team orchestration, kill, task queue (create/poll/complete), review handoff to local LLM agents, review accept/reject, and agent mesh status endpoints.

nodes.name: auth_http_client.py
nodes.summary: Shared factory for authenticated HTTP clients (sync and async). Loads service API keys from SOPS secrets files and injects Authorization headers. Provides per-service convenience constructors for embeddings, AIDB, hybrid-coordinator, ralph-wiggum, and more.

nodes.name: circuit_breaker.py
nodes.summary: Full circuit-breaker implementation (closed/half-open/open states, configurable thresholds, Prometheus metrics) with a registry, decorator, and pre-built clients for AIDB, hybrid-coordinator, and ralph-wiggum.

nodes.name: llm_config.py
nodes.summary: LLM payload configuration: task profiles (temperature, frequency_penalty, thinking budget, remote profile hints) and build_llama_payload, the canonical constructor for llama.cpp chat completion requests.

nodes.name: postgres_client.py
nodes.summary: Thin async PostgreSQL client wrapping psycopg3 AsyncConnection. Handles DSN construction, lazy connect, execute with commit/rollback, and fetch_all with cursor.

nodes.name: rate_limiter.py
nodes.summary: Sliding-window rate limiter middleware for aiohttp. Supports per-minute/per-hour limits, per-endpoint overrides, loopback exemption, and Retry-After headers.

nodes.name: retry_backoff.py
nodes.summary: Exponential backoff retry utilities with circuit-breaker integration. Includes RetryConfig, retryable decorator, CircuitBreakerRetryHandler, and per-service retry clients for AIDB, hybrid-coordinator, and ralph-wiggum.

nodes.name: stack_settings.py
nodes.summary: Dataclass-style settings loaders for embeddings and hybrid-coordinator services. Reads from a YAML config file (via config_loader) and merges Qdrant, batch, and security sub-sections.

nodes.name: telemetry_privacy.py
nodes.summary: Telemetry payload scrubber that recursively redacts PII, secrets, and sensitive fields using regex patterns and SHA-256 hashing before writing telemetry to disk.

nodes.name: resolve_auth_context
nodes.summary: Core auth resolution: classifies request as unauthenticated, loopback-agent, internal-path, or API-key-authenticated; returns an auth context dict with mode, profile, and reason.

nodes.name: check_tool_access
nodes.summary: Checks whether a named tool is allowed under the current auth profile. Returns (allowed: bool, reason: str) by consulting AUTH_PROFILE_TOOL_POLICY.

nodes.name: get_tool_denial_stats
nodes.summary: Returns aggregated tool-denial statistics: total denials, per-tool and per-profile breakdown, and full tool-policy summary.

nodes.name: auth_profile_policy_summary
nodes.summary: Returns a structured summary of all defined auth profile policies and the tool access policies keyed by profile.

nodes.name: create_api_key_middleware
nodes.summary: Factory returning an aiohttp middleware that resolves auth context, rejects unauthenticated requests with 401, and injects auth-profile/mode headers into responses.

nodes.name: create_app
nodes.summary: Creates and returns the aiohttp Application, stacking rate-limit, tracing, request-ID, auth middlewares and registering all route groups including CLM, graph search, MCP JSON-RPC, temporal graph, and consensus.

nodes.name: _make_request_id_middleware
nodes.summary: Returns an aiohttp middleware that assigns a UUID request ID, binds it to structured log context, measures per-request latency, increments Prometheus counters, and calls an optional audit callback.

nodes.name: initialize_server
nodes.summary: Bootstraps the entire hybrid coordinator: Qdrant client, HTTP clients, embedding cache, model probe, multi-turn context, Postgres, continuous learning pipeline, drift analyzer, memory crystallizer, homeostasis manager, CLM, graph search, semantic cache, search router, route handler, MCP handlers, and background async tasks.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Top-level entry point: calls initialize_server, then runs in HTTP mode or MCP stdio mode based on env var.

nodes.name: hybrid_search
nodes.summary: Delegates hybrid vector+keyword search to the SearchRouter singleton, merging collection results with configurable limits and score thresholds.

nodes.name: route_search
nodes.summary: Delegates a full search-and-optionally-synthesize request to route_handler.route_search, which selects local or remote LLM backend.

nodes.name: select_llm_backend
nodes.summary: Delegates backend selection (local vs remote) to SearchRouter.select_backend based on prompt, context quality, and force flags.

nodes.name: record_learning_feedback
nodes.summary: Records human or agent correction feedback for a prior interaction to the interaction tracker, feeding the continuous learning pipeline.

nodes.name: configure_logging
nodes.summary: Configures structured JSON logging via structlog with timestamped processors, suppresses aiohttp access logger, and binds initial context vars.

nodes.name: _preflight_check
nodes.summary: Validates that upstream dependencies (Qdrant, llama.cpp, Postgres) are reachable via TCP socket before server start. Raises RuntimeError if any required dep is unavailable.

nodes.name: LLMClientLocalTests
nodes.summary: Test suite verifying LLMClient local mode: initializes with switchboard v1 base URL, routes plain prompts via continue-local profile, and routes tool-calling requests via local-tool-calling profile.

nodes.name: LLMClientOpenAITests
nodes.summary: Test suite verifying LLMClient OpenAI mode: custom base URL passthrough and correct chat completions payload construction.

nodes.name: TestRunQaCheckAsDict
nodes.summary: Tests for run_qa_check_as_dict: validates format/phase guards, missing script errors, empty-JSON-stdout parse-error path, and JSON-empty bash-fallback path.

nodes.name: TestNormalizeQaPhase
nodes.summary: Tests for _normalize_qa_phase: passthrough for numeric strings, prefix stripping, alias resolution, None/empty defaults, whitespace handling.

nodes.name: test_crystallizer_is_idempotent
nodes.summary: Verifies that calling crystallize_session twice for the same session produces a DDL with a session-hash guard (idempotent schema migration).

nodes.name: test_crystallizer_emits_runtime_learning_metadata
nodes.summary: Verifies that crystallize_session emits a stored insight with correct source_event_id prefix and runtime-learning metadata fields.

nodes.name: _spawn_local_agent_instance
nodes.summary: Spawns a local agent subprocess via asyncio.create_subprocess_exec, enforces a configurable timeout, captures stdout/stderr, and returns a structured result dict with status, output, and timing.

nodes.name: handle_review_agent_handoff
nodes.summary: Orchestrates a full review cycle: loads artifact preview, spawns a reviewer agent, parses structured accept/reject decision, updates review queue with history, and returns final review status.

nodes.name: handle_agents_team
nodes.summary: Spawns multiple agents in parallel (one per role spec) under a shared team ID and aggregates their results.

nodes.name: handle_task_manager_poll
nodes.summary: Polls the in-memory task queue, filtering by agent_type, status, and max_items. Returns pending tasks with timestamps.

nodes.name: handle_task_manager_create
nodes.summary: Creates a new task in the in-memory task queue with UUID, priority, metadata, and enqueue timestamp.

nodes.name: register_routes
nodes.summary: Registers all agent and review HTTP routes on the aiohttp app: /agents/*, /tasks/*, /review/*, /mesh/*.

nodes.name: AuthenticatedAsyncClient
nodes.summary: httpx.AsyncClient subclass that auto-injects the Bearer token from the loaded service API key into all requests.

nodes.name: AuthenticatedClient
nodes.summary: httpx.Client (sync) subclass that auto-injects the Bearer token from the loaded service API key into all requests.

nodes.name: create_authenticated_client
nodes.summary: Factory returning an AuthenticatedAsyncClient or AuthenticatedClient for a named service, resolving base URL from env and loading the API key from secrets.

nodes.name: load_service_api_key
nodes.summary: Loads an API key for a named service from a SOPS secrets file path, falling back to env var, with warnings if neither is found.

nodes.name: CircuitBreaker
nodes.summary: Full circuit-breaker implementation with closed/half-open/open states, configurable failure threshold, reset timeout, success threshold for half-open recovery, throttle mode, and Prometheus state/transition metrics.

nodes.name: CircuitBreakerRegistry
nodes.summary: Registry that lazily creates and caches CircuitBreaker instances by service name, supports per-service config overrides, and exposes aggregate state/stat views.

nodes.name: AIDBCircuitBreakerClient
nodes.summary: Pre-built circuit-breaker client for AIDB query endpoint with aiohttp session management.

nodes.name: HybridCoordinatorCircuitBreakerClient
nodes.summary: Pre-built circuit-breaker client for hybrid-coordinator skill endpoint.

nodes.name: TaskProfile
nodes.summary: Dataclass capturing per-task-type LLM configuration: temperature, frequency_penalty, enable_thinking, thinking_budget, suggested remote profile, max_tokens hint.

nodes.name: build_llama_payload
nodes.summary: Canonical builder for llama.cpp /v1/chat/completions request payloads. Merges task profile parameters, injects role system prompt via _inject_role, enforces enable_thinking=false, applies token budget from env.

nodes.name: PostgresClient
nodes.summary: Async PostgreSQL client with lazy connection via psycopg3. Supports execute (with commit/rollback) and fetch_all (with cursor) over a single persistent connection.

nodes.name: SlidingWindowRateLimiter
nodes.summary: In-memory sliding window rate limiter tracking per-client per-minute, per-hour, and per-endpoint request windows using deques. Returns allowed/denied with limit metadata.

nodes.name: RateLimiterConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration dataclass for the sliding-window rate limiter with from_env() factory reading RATE_LIMIT_* env vars.

nodes.name: create_rate_limiter_middleware
nodes.summary: Factory returning an aiohttp rate-limit middleware that enforces SlidingWindowRateLimiter, injects X-RateLimit-* headers, and returns 429 with Retry-After when limits are exceeded.

nodes.name: retry_with_backoff
nodes.summary: Core async retry loop: applies exponential backoff with jitter, respects Retry-After headers, integrates with circuit breakers via throttle(), and honors per-exception retry lists.

nodes.name: AIDBRetryClient
nodes.summary: Pre-built retry client for the AIDB query endpoint with circuit-breaker integration via CircuitBreakerRetryHandler.

nodes.name: HybridCoordinatorRetryClient
nodes.summary: Pre-built retry client for hybrid-coordinator skill endpoint with circuit-breaker integration.

nodes.name: HybridSettings
nodes.summary: Settings dataclass for the hybrid-coordinator service: server port, Qdrant connection/HNSW params, LLM/embedding URLs, confidence thresholds, telemetry and fine-tune paths.

nodes.name: EmbeddingsSettings
nodes.summary: Settings dataclass for the embeddings service: model, port, batch sizing, request timeout, and API key file path.

nodes.name: scrub_telemetry_payload
nodes.summary: Recursively walks a telemetry payload dict/list and redacts sensitive field values using SHA-256 hashing or regex substitution before logging or persisting.

nodes.name: redact_secrets
nodes.summary: Scans a string value for secret-like patterns (API keys, tokens, passwords) via regex and replaces matches with [REDACTED:<type>] placeholders.

nodes.name: cve_endpoints.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI route registration for kernel CVE database: list CVEs, fetch details, scan hosts, sync from NVD/kernel.org, and count subsystem vulnerabilities.

nodes.name: discovery_api.py
nodes.summary: Agent-facing capability discovery API: enumerates AIDB system capabilities, endpoints, and quickstart docs for programmatic agent onboarding.

nodes.name: discovery_endpoints.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI route handlers that expose AgentDiscoveryAPI over HTTP: system info, quickstart, capability listing, and per-capability detail endpoints.

nodes.name: gc_worker.py
nodes.summary: Synchronous garbage-collection worker that identifies and optionally purges stale vector-store entries from PostgreSQL using SQLAlchemy.

nodes.name: health_check.py
nodes.summary: Kubernetes-style health probe system (liveness, readiness, startup) for the AIDB service; checks PostgreSQL, Qdrant, and Redis dependencies.

nodes.name: interaction_history.py
nodes.summary: Stores and retrieves agent interaction history records backed by the schema module's document tables.

nodes.name: llm_parallel.py
nodes.summary: Async parallel LLM inference helper: fans out multiple prompts concurrently to the local llama.cpp endpoint.

nodes.name: cache.py
nodes.summary: Starlette middleware that caches GET responses in-memory with TTL, reducing redundant computation for read-heavy AIDB endpoints.

nodes.name: ml_engine.py
nodes.summary: ML engine providing semantic similarity, clustering, anomaly detection, and quick helper methods for the AIDB server's tool-matching logic.

nodes.name: query_validator.py
nodes.summary: Validates and sanitizes vector search requests: enforces collection allowlist, rate limiting, query cost estimation, and input sanitization.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: RAG package init: re-exports pipeline module symbols.

nodes.name: pipeline.py
nodes.summary: RAG pipeline: configures retrieval-augmented generation flow with Qdrant vector search, embedding, and LLM generation steps.

nodes.name: registry_api.py
nodes.summary: In-memory MCP resource registry: register, list, and search resources exposed by the AIDB MCP server.

nodes.name: schema.py
nodes.summary: SQLAlchemy table definitions for AIDB: document embeddings, CVEs, kernel releases, and CVE-host mappings.

nodes.name: server.py
nodes.summary: Main AIDB MCP server: 3892-line core orchestrating vector store, tool registry, sandbox execution, federation, rate limiting, RAG, and all HTTP/MCP endpoints.

nodes.name: settings_loader.py
nodes.summary: Loads and validates AIDB service configuration from env vars, YAML config files, and SOPS secrets; backed by shared config_loader.

nodes.name: skills_loader.py
nodes.summary: Parses and writes skill definition files with YAML frontmatter: normalizes tags and extracts ParsedSkill records for AIDB skill ingestion.

nodes.name: tool_discovery.py
nodes.summary: Discovers and indexes MCP tool definitions from running MCP servers: probes endpoints, caches metadata, and exposes search interface.

nodes.name: tool_discovery_daemon.py
nodes.summary: Background daemon that periodically triggers ToolDiscoveryEngine to refresh MCP tool indexes; reads settings and secrets on startup.

nodes.name: vscode_telemetry.py
nodes.summary: Collects and scrubs VSCode extension telemetry events: enforces PII redaction, maintains rolling event buffer, and exposes stats/export endpoints.

nodes.name: config_loader.py
nodes.summary: Shared YAML config loader with deep-merge support; used by settings_loader and other MCP server components.

nodes.name: tool_audit.py
nodes.summary: Shared tool audit logging: writes structured audit entries to a Unix socket or file; used by multiple MCP server components for observability.

nodes.name: tool_security_auditor.py
nodes.summary: Shared ToolSecurityAuditor: enforces tool execution policy, rate limiting, and SSRF/injection checks before dispatching tool calls.

nodes.name: CVEListItem
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a CVE list item: id, severity, CVSS score, description, subsystems, local status, publish date.

nodes.name: CVEDetail
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for detailed CVE record including CVSS vector, affected versions, fix version, CWE IDs, CISA KEV flag, exploit status.

nodes.name: KernelReleaseInfo
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for kernel release metadata: version, track, release/EOL dates, tarball URL, Rust requirement.

nodes.name: HostScanResult
nodes.summary: Pydantic model summarizing host vulnerability scan: total CVE counts by severity and list of vulnerabilities.

nodes.name: register_cve_routes
nodes.summary: Registers all CVE-related FastAPI routes on the app: list CVEs, get details, sync NVD, list kernel releases, scan/get host vulnerabilities, subsystem counts.

nodes.name: AgentDiscoveryAPI
nodes.summary: Main discovery class: compiles system info, enumerates capabilities by category/level, and generates quickstart documentation for agents.

nodes.name: CapabilitySummary
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for capability summary: name, category, description, cost estimate, auth requirement.

nodes.name: CapabilityDetail
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for full capability detail: endpoint, method, parameters, response schema, examples, documentation URL.

nodes.name: register_discovery_routes
nodes.summary: Registers discovery HTTP routes: root, system-info, quickstart, capability list, and per-capability detail endpoints; enforces API key for authenticated routes.

nodes.name: run_gc_pass_sync
nodes.summary: Synchronous GC pass: identifies vector embeddings with no active document references older than stale_days; deletes them unless dry_run.

nodes.name: HealthChecker
nodes.summary: Central health-check orchestrator: runs liveness, readiness, and startup probes; checks PostgreSQL, Qdrant, Redis; tracks metrics and failures.

nodes.name: HealthCheckResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass capturing a single health check outcome: status, type, message, details, timestamp, duration.

nodes.name: create_health_endpoints
nodes.summary: Registers /health/live, /health/ready, /health/startup FastAPI routes using HealthChecker instance.

nodes.name: InteractionHistoryStore
nodes.summary: Stores and queries agent interaction history records in PostgreSQL using schema-defined tables.

nodes.name: run_parallel_inference
nodes.summary: Fans out a list of prompts to the local LLM endpoint concurrently using asyncio.gather; returns list of completion strings.

nodes.name: CacheMiddleware
nodes.summary: Starlette BaseHTTPMiddleware: caches successful GET responses in a TTL dict; bypasses cache for non-GET or cache-control: no-cache requests.

nodes.name: MLEngine
nodes.summary: ML engine for AIDB: semantic similarity scoring, clustering, anomaly detection over embedding vectors; integrates with sklearn.

nodes.name: QuickMLHelpers
nodes.summary: Thin static-method wrapper exposing frequently used ML operations (cosine similarity, top-k, batching) from MLEngine for convenience.

nodes.name: VectorSearchRequest
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for vector search requests: collection, query text, top-k, filters, metadata fields.

nodes.name: RateLimiter
nodes.summary: Token-bucket rate limiter for AIDB query endpoints; enforces per-client request limits.

nodes.name: validate_collection_name
nodes.summary: Validates collection name against ALLOWED_COLLECTIONS allowlist; raises HTTP 403 on unknown collections.

nodes.name: get_allowed_collections
nodes.summary: Returns current ALLOWED_COLLECTIONS set; reads from env var AIDB_ALLOWED_COLLECTIONS.

nodes.name: sanitize_query
nodes.summary: Strips potential injection patterns and excessive whitespace from raw query strings before passing to vector search.

nodes.name: RAGPipeline
nodes.summary: RAG pipeline orchestrator: retrieves relevant documents from Qdrant, prepends them to context, then calls LLM for grounded generation.

nodes.name: RAGConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass / pydantic config for RAGPipeline: collection name, top-k, score threshold, LLM endpoint, system prompt template.

nodes.name: RegistryResource
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a registered MCP resource: name, type, description, endpoint, metadata.

nodes.name: register_resource
nodes.summary: Adds a new RegistryResource to the in-memory registry; idempotent on name collision.

nodes.name: search_resources
nodes.summary: Full-text search over registry resource names and descriptions; returns ranked matches.

nodes.name: document_embeddings_table
nodes.summary: Returns SQLAlchemy Table definition for document_embeddings; lazily creates table object bound to given metadata.

nodes.name: MCPServer
nodes.summary: Core AIDB MCP server class: wires FastAPI app, VectorStore, ToolRegistry, SandboxExecutor, RAG pipeline, health checker; exposes tool-call and resource endpoints.

nodes.name: VectorStore
nodes.summary: Abstraction over Qdrant + PostgreSQL: upsert, search, delete, and federated-query across collections.

nodes.name: ToolRegistry
nodes.summary: Registry of MCP tool definitions: load, validate, and dispatch tool calls with risk-tier enforcement.

nodes.name: SandboxExecutor
nodes.summary: Sandbox for safe tool execution: runs commands in restricted subprocess with timeout, resource limits, and result capture.

nodes.name: CircuitBreaker
nodes.summary: Circuit breaker pattern for external service calls: tracks failures, opens circuit on threshold, half-opens after cooldown.

nodes.name: FederationStore
nodes.summary: Federated search across multiple vector stores or remote AIDB instances; aggregates and re-ranks results.

nodes.name: TieredRateLimiter
nodes.summary: Multi-tier rate limiter: enforces per-key, per-tier, and global request budgets for the AIDB server.

nodes.name: CatalogBootstrapper
nodes.summary: Seeds initial tool and skill catalog entries into AIDB on first startup; idempotent on subsequent runs.

nodes.name: MonitoringServer
nodes.summary: Prometheus-compatible metrics server sidecar: exposes /metrics endpoint with AIDB request counts, latencies, and error rates.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point: parses args, configures logging and tracing, initializes MCPServer, and starts uvicorn.

nodes.name: Settings
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding all AIDB configuration: DB URL, Qdrant URL, Redis URL, LLM endpoint, rate limits, feature flags, log level.

nodes.name: load_settings
nodes.summary: Loads Settings by merging YAML config file, env vars, and SOPS secrets; validates required fields.

nodes.name: ParsedSkill
nodes.summary: Dataclass for a parsed skill: name, description, tags, content body extracted from YAML-frontmatter markdown.

nodes.name: parse_skill_file
nodes.summary: Reads a skill markdown file from disk and returns a ParsedSkill; handles missing frontmatter gracefully.

nodes.name: ToolDiscoveryEngine
nodes.summary: Probes running MCP server endpoints to discover available tools; caches ToolMetadata and MCPServerInfo; supports periodic refresh.

nodes.name: ToolMetadata
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a discovered tool: name, description, schema, server origin, discovery timestamp.

nodes.name: MCPServerInfo
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a discovered MCP server: URL, name, tool count, health status, last seen timestamp.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Daemon entrypoint: loads settings and secrets, instantiates ToolDiscoveryEngine, runs periodic discovery loop.

nodes.name: VscodeEvent
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a VSCode telemetry event: event type, properties dict, timestamp, session id.

nodes.name: TelemetryStats
nodes.summary: Aggregated telemetry statistics: event counts by type, session counts, average properties per event.

nodes.name: collect_event
nodes.summary: Receives a VscodeEvent, scrubs PII, appends to rolling buffer; drops oldest if buffer full.

nodes.name: load_config
nodes.summary: Loads and deep-merges one or more YAML config files; returns unified config dict.

nodes.name: write_audit_entry
nodes.summary: Writes a structured audit log entry (JSON) to the audit socket or fallback file; used for tool execution observability.

nodes.name: ToolSecurityAuditor
nodes.summary: Audits tool call requests for policy compliance: SSRF checks, injection patterns, rate limiting, and pre/post-execution audit logging.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package init for local-orchestrator; re-exports MCPClient, LocalOrchestrator, RemoteAgentClient, TaskRouter.

nodes.name: agent_interface.py
nodes.summary: Defines LocalAgent and supporting data classes for querying local llama.cpp or hybrid-coordinator. Supports tool registration, conversation history, and factory classmethods.

nodes.name: example_tools.py
nodes.summary: Example tool functions (text_analyzer, pattern_search, validate_workflow_structure) and FileToolsProvider ToolProvider subclass for demonstration.

nodes.name: mcp_client.py
nodes.summary: MCPClient: HTTP client for hybrid-coordinator REST API. Provides hybrid search, AIDB query, memory store/recall, workflow planning, LLM chat, and artifact management.

nodes.name: orchestrator.py
nodes.summary: LocalOrchestrator: main entry point combining TaskRouter, AgentHQ, and MCPClient. Routes tasks to local LLM or delegate agents, gathers RAG context, persists plans.

nodes.name: remote_agents.py
nodes.summary: RemoteAgentClient: async HTTP client for Anthropic and OpenAI APIs. Manages agent configs, cost tracking, and multi-provider routing.

nodes.name: router.py
nodes.summary: TaskRouter: cost-budget-aware routing engine. Classifies prompts, estimates complexity, selects local/remote backend, records cost history.

nodes.name: sop_engine.py
nodes.summary: SOP (Standard Operating Procedure) parser and executor. Parses RFC2119-annotated Markdown SOPs into structured steps and executes them with constraint validation.

nodes.name: test_agent_interface.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for LocalAgent: basic construction, tool attachment, conversation history, workflow factory, model providers, and convenience functions.

nodes.name: test_sop_engine.py
nodes.summary: Tests for SOP parsing and execution: parses a codebase-analysis SOP from fixture, validates step counts and required/optional classification, exercises executor.

nodes.name: test_strands_integration.py
nodes.summary: Integration tests combining LocalAgent, MCPClient, SOPExecutor, tool decorators, and workflow graph. Includes end-to-end workflow with artifact management.

nodes.name: test_workflow_graph.py
nodes.summary: Tests for WorkflowGraph: basic DAG construction, parallel group detection, sequential/parallel execution, decision nodes, Mermaid export, and complex multi-node graphs.

nodes.name: tool_decorators.py
nodes.summary: Tool decorator system: @tool decorator auto-generates JSON schemas from Python type hints, registers functions in a global ToolRegistry. ToolProvider base class for provider patterns.

nodes.name: workflow_graph.py
nodes.summary: DAG-based workflow graph: WorkflowGraph builds/validates nodes and edges, computes topological order and parallel groups. WorkflowExecutor runs nodes sequentially or in parallel with context threading.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package init for orchestration layer; imports from agent_hq, delegation_api, mcp_tool_invoker, workspace_isolation.

nodes.name: agent_hq.py
nodes.summary: AgentHQ: multi-agent session coordinator. Manages agent registration, sessions, checkpoints, task delegation, and persistence. Emits lifecycle events via listener callbacks.

nodes.name: delegation_api.py
nodes.summary: DelegationAPI: async task delegation with priority queue, capability matching, feedback loop, and retry. Provides @delegate_to and @require_capability decorators.

nodes.name: mcp_tool_invoker.py
nodes.summary: MCPToolInvoker: tool registry and invocation engine. Features LRU cache, rate limiting, approval gates, retry with backoff, analytics, and batch invocation.

nodes.name: workspace_isolation.py
nodes.summary: WorkspaceManager: per-agent workspace isolation via temp directories, git worktrees, or full copies. Tracks file modifications, detects conflicts, and merges changes back.

nodes.name: test_workspace_isolation.py
nodes.summary: Minimal unit tests for WorkspaceManager: default path and basic init.

nodes.name: LocalAgent
nodes.summary: Primary agent class that queries local llama.cpp or hybrid-coordinator. Supports tool registration, multi-turn conversation history, streaming responses, and usage stats. Factory methods: with_tools(), for_workflow().

nodes.name: ModelProvider
nodes.summary: Enum: LOCAL_LLAMA, HYBRID_COORDINATOR.

nodes.name: ModelConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding model configuration: provider, model_name, temperature, max_tokens, stream, api_key, endpoint, extra_params.

nodes.name: AgentResponse
nodes.summary: Dataclass: content, model, provider, tokens_used, finish_reason, tool_calls, metadata.

nodes.name: create_agent
nodes.summary: Factory function: instantiates LocalAgent with model and tools kwargs.

nodes.name: FileToolsProvider
nodes.summary: ToolProvider subclass that registers read_lines and count_files as tools on init.

nodes.name: validate_workflow_structure
nodes.summary: Validates JSON/YAML workflow files: checks existence, parses content, validates required fields, accumulates errors and warnings.

nodes.name: MCPClient
nodes.summary: HTTP client for hybrid-coordinator REST API. Methods: hybrid_search, get_hints, query_aidb, store_memory, recall_memory, workflow_plan, llm_chat, health_check, write/read/list_artifacts. Reads auth keys from env or secret files.

nodes.name: SearchResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass: content, source, score, metadata for search results.

nodes.name: MemoryRecord
nodes.summary: Dataclass: content, memory_type, timestamp, relevance.

nodes.name: get_mcp_client
nodes.summary: Singleton factory: returns cached MCPClient instance.

nodes.name: LocalOrchestrator
nodes.summary: Top-level orchestrator combining MCPClient, TaskRouter, and AgentHQ. Gathers RAG context, plans tasks via LLM, routes to local execution or delegation. Persists plans to .agents/plans/.

nodes.name: OrchestratorResponse
nodes.summary: Dataclass: action, content, backend_used, tokens_used, cost_usd, execution_time, context_gathered, metadata.

nodes.name: get_orchestrator
nodes.summary: Factory: instantiates LocalOrchestrator with cost_budget and repo_root.

nodes.name: RemoteAgentClient
nodes.summary: Async HTTP client for remote LLM APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI). Manages per-agent configs, API key resolution from env/SOPS secrets, call routing, and stats.

nodes.name: AgentCapabilities
nodes.summary: Dataclass: max_context, supports_tools, supports_vision, cost_per_mtok_input/output, latency_class, strengths.

nodes.name: RemoteAgentType
nodes.summary: Enum of remote agent types: CLAUDE, GPT4, GPT4_MINI, GEMINI, LOCAL.

nodes.name: get_remote_client
nodes.summary: Factory: returns cached RemoteAgentClient singleton.

nodes.name: TaskRouter
nodes.summary: Cost-budget task router. Analyzes prompt for category/complexity via keyword scoring, selects local or remote backend, estimates cost, records routing history, and provides budget status.

nodes.name: AgentBackend
nodes.summary: Enum: LOCAL, REMOTE_CLAUDE, REMOTE_GPT4, REMOTE_GEMINI, HYBRID.

nodes.name: TaskCategory
nodes.summary: Enum of task categories: CODE_GENERATION, CODE_REVIEW, DEBUGGING, ARCHITECTURE, DOCUMENTATION, ANALYSIS, CREATIVE, GENERAL.

nodes.name: SOPParser
nodes.summary: Parses RFC2119-annotated Markdown SOPs. Detects MUST/SHOULD/MAY constraints via compiled regex, parses YAML frontmatter, splits sections, extracts numbered steps.

nodes.name: SOPExecutor
nodes.summary: Executes SOPDefinition steps via user-provided executor_func. Validates MUST/MUST_NOT constraints, logs execution, skips optional steps on partial failure.

nodes.name: SOPDefinition
nodes.summary: Parsed SOP: name, description, version, parameters, sections, metadata. Methods: get_required_steps(), get_optional_steps().

nodes.name: SOPStep
nodes.summary: Single SOP step: number, title, description, constraint level, substeps. Methods: is_required(), is_prohibited(), is_optional().

nodes.name: parse_sop
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper: creates SOPParser and parses file at filepath.

nodes.name: execute_sop
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper: creates SOPExecutor and runs execute_sop with given context and executor_func.

nodes.name: ToolRegistry
nodes.summary: Global singleton registry mapping tool names to ToolDefinition. Methods: register, get_tool, list_tools, get_tool_names, unregister, reload_tool. Tracks by provider.

nodes.name: ToolProvider
nodes.summary: Base class for tool providers. register_tool() auto-generates schema and registers with ToolRegistry. get_tool_schemas() returns OpenAI-format tool schemas.

nodes.name: ToolDefinition
nodes.summary: Dataclass: name, description, function, input_schema, metadata.

nodes.name: tool
nodes.summary: @tool decorator: generates JSON schema from Python type hints and docstring, registers function in global ToolRegistry. Supports name/description/provider overrides.

nodes.name: get_tool_registry
nodes.summary: Returns the global ToolRegistry singleton.

nodes.name: WorkflowGraph
nodes.summary: DAG workflow graph. add_node/add_edge build the graph. topological_sort(), get_execution_order(), get_parallel_groups() for scheduling. to_dict() and to_mermaid() for serialization.

nodes.name: WorkflowExecutor
nodes.summary: Executes WorkflowGraph nodes. execute_sequential() respects topological order; execute_parallel() uses parallel groups with context threading. Logs execution per node.

nodes.name: WorkflowNode
nodes.summary: Dataclass: id, name, node_type, task callable, condition, dependencies, status, result, timing.

nodes.name: create_workflow
nodes.summary: Factory: creates WorkflowGraph with given name and description.

nodes.name: execute_workflow
nodes.summary: Convenience: creates WorkflowExecutor and runs parallel or sequential execution based on parallel flag.

nodes.name: AgentHQ
nodes.summary: Multi-agent headquarters. Manages global agent registry, sessions (create/start/pause/terminate), checkpoints (create/restore/persist), task submission, delegation, and event emission. Persists state to ~/.agent_hq/.

nodes.name: Session
nodes.summary: Session dataclass: id, name, state, agents, tasks, checkpoints, context, event_log. Methods: log_event(), to_dict().

nodes.name: TaskInfo
nodes.summary: Task dataclass: task_id, description, assigned_agent, status, priority, timing, result, error, dependencies. to_dict().

nodes.name: AgentInfo
