nodes.summary: Agent registration record: agent_id, name, capabilities, status, load, success_rate, total_tasks, last_heartbeat. to_dict().

nodes.name: Checkpoint
nodes.summary: Checkpoint dataclass: checkpoint_id, session_id, agent_states, pending_tasks, completed_tasks, context. to_dict().

nodes.name: DelegationAPI
nodes.summary: Async delegation protocol: registers agents with capabilities, selects best agent via DelegationFeedback scoring, executes tasks via executor_fn with retry and timeout. Manages priority queue and completed map.

nodes.name: DelegationFeedback
nodes.summary: Tracks delegation history per agent. Records success/failure/timing, computes success_rate and avg_completion_time, suggests best agent for given capabilities.

nodes.name: DelegationQueue
nodes.summary: Priority queue for delegation requests. enqueue() sorts by priority, dequeue() pops highest, remove() by request_id, peek() without dequeue.

nodes.name: DelegationTarget
nodes.summary: Agent registration for delegation: capabilities set, load, max_concurrent, success_rate. can_execute() checks capability subset; capability_score() computes weighted average.

nodes.name: delegate_to
nodes.summary: @delegate_to decorator factory: wraps an async function to route execution through DelegationAPI with specified agent_id, capabilities, priority, and timeout.

nodes.name: MCPToolInvoker
nodes.summary: Tool registry and async invocation engine. Features LRU cache (ToolCache), rate limiting (RateLimiter), approval gates, retry with exponential backoff, analytics (ToolAnalytics), and parallel batch invocation.

nodes.name: ToolCache
nodes.summary: LRU cache keyed by SHA256(tool_id + params). Configurable max_size and TTL. Tracks hit_count per entry and stats (size, total_hits, expired_count).

nodes.name: RateLimiter
nodes.summary: Per-tool token-bucket rate limiter. configure() sets calls_per_second; acquire() returns True if budget available; get_wait_time() returns seconds to wait.

nodes.name: ToolAnalytics
nodes.summary: Tracks per-tool invocation metrics: call count, success/failure, latency, agent usage. get_tool_stats() and get_usage_summary() for reporting.

nodes.name: ToolMetadata
nodes.summary: Dataclass: tool_id, name, description, server_id, input/output schemas, capabilities, cost, avg_latency, success_rate, status, requires_approval, rate_limit.

nodes.name: WorkspaceManager
nodes.summary: Per-agent workspace isolation. Three modes: TEMP (shallow copy), GIT_WORKTREE (git worktree branch), COPY (full copytree). Tracks file modifications, detects conflicts across agents, merges back via git-merge or file copy.

nodes.name: Workspace
nodes.summary: Workspace dataclass: workspace_id, agent_id, session_id, mode, root/source paths, branch, modifications list, mounted_volumes, is_active.

nodes.name: IsolationMode
nodes.summary: Enum: TEMP, GIT_WORKTREE, COPY.

nodes.name: easing.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive easing function library with 13 timing curves (linear, quad, cubic, bounce, elastic, back) plus interpolation, squash-stretch, and arc-motion physics utilities.

nodes.name: frame_composer.py
nodes.summary: Frame drawing primitives using Pillow: blank frame creation, circle, text, gradient background, and star shape rendering.

nodes.name: gif_builder.py
nodes.summary: GIFBuilder class that assembles frame lists into optimized GIF files with color quantization, frame deduplication, and resize-on-save support.

nodes.name: visual_effects.py
nodes.summary: Particle system (Particle, ParticleSystem) and standalone visual effects: motion blur, impact flash, shockwave rings, explosion, glow, drop shadow, speed lines, and screen shake.

nodes.name: bounce.py
nodes.summary: Animation template producing a bouncing object effect using ease-out-bounce easing on frame-by-frame position.

nodes.name: explode.py
nodes.summary: Explosion and particle-burst animation templates with multi-type explode modes and a standalone confetti/sparkle ParticleSystem burst.

nodes.name: fade.py
nodes.summary: Fade animation templates including fade-in/out, crossfade between two objects, and color-to-color fade transitions with configurable easing.

nodes.name: flip.py
nodes.summary: 3D flip animation around horizontal or vertical axis with convenience wrappers for quick emoji flip and a NOPE shake-head variant.

nodes.name: morph.py
nodes.summary: Morph animation templates blending between two objects (dissolve, scale, flip-morph) plus reaction and shape-morph convenience functions.

nodes.name: move.py
nodes.summary: Object movement animation with support for linear, arc, orbit, wave, and bezier paths, plus multi-point path generation and ghost-trail effect.

nodes.name: pulse.py
nodes.summary: Pulsing scale animation templates with scale/glow/color pulse types and attention-pulse and breathing-animation convenience wrappers.

nodes.name: shake.py
nodes.summary: Shake animation template that oscillates an object's position sinusoidally with configurable intensity and direction.

nodes.name: slide.py
nodes.summary: Slide-in/out animation template with directional control, overshoot option, and a multi-object staggered slide variant.

nodes.name: spin.py
nodes.summary: Spin/rotation animation with continuous, ease-in/out, and wobble modes, plus a standalone loading-spinner generator.

nodes.name: wiggle.py
nodes.summary: Wiggle animation with horizontal, vertical, rotation, and jelly modes using sinusoidal motion, plus an excited-wiggle convenience wrapper.

nodes.name: zoom.py
nodes.summary: Zoom animation with in/out/pulse/spin-zoom modes, Gaussian blur motion effect, and explosion-zoom/mind-blown-zoom preset variants.

nodes.name: interpolate
nodes.summary: Applies a named easing function to interpolate a scalar or list value between start and end over normalized time t.

nodes.name: apply_squash_stretch
nodes.summary: Computes x/y scale factors for squash-and-stretch deformation given base scale, intensity, and motion direction.

nodes.name: calculate_arc_motion
nodes.summary: Calculates (x, y) position along a parabolic arc between start and end points at normalized time t with configurable height.

nodes.name: create_blank_frame
nodes.summary: Creates a new PIL RGB image filled with a background color at specified dimensions; the standard frame canvas factory used by all templates.

nodes.name: draw_circle
nodes.summary: Draws a circle on a PIL frame at the given center with optional fill and outline color/width.

nodes.name: draw_text
nodes.summary: Renders text onto a PIL frame with optional centering using Pillow's default font and textbbox for positioning.

nodes.name: create_gradient_background
nodes.summary: Generates a vertical linear gradient background image by interpolating RGB values between top and bottom colors.

nodes.name: draw_star
nodes.summary: Draws a five-pointed star polygon on a PIL frame using trigonometric outer/inner vertex calculation.

nodes.name: GIFBuilder
nodes.summary: Manages frame accumulation and exports animated GIF files with optional k-means color quantization, frame deduplication, and resize-on-save.

nodes.name: Particle
nodes.summary: Individual particle with position, velocity, gravity, lifespan, color, shape, and spin; updates physics each step and renders as ellipse, rectangle, or line.

nodes.name: ParticleSystem
nodes.summary: Manages a pool of Particle objects with directional burst emission, confetti and sparkle presets, and per-frame update/render cycle.

nodes.name: add_motion_blur
nodes.summary: Blends the current frame with the previous frame by a blur amount to simulate motion blur between consecutive GIF frames.

nodes.name: create_impact_flash
nodes.summary: Overlays concentric expanding rings of decreasing opacity onto a frame to simulate an impact-flash effect.

nodes.name: create_explosion_effect
nodes.summary: Renders an animated explosion as a circular expanding region with configurable color and progress factor via RGBA alpha compositing.

nodes.name: add_glow_effect
nodes.summary: Applies a Gaussian-blur glow halo to pixels matching a mask color and blends it onto the source frame.

nodes.name: create_speed_lines
nodes.summary: Draws randomized speed lines radiating from a center position in a given direction with varying lengths and widths.

nodes.name: apply_screen_shake
nodes.summary: Shifts a frame by a deterministic random offset (seeded by frame_index) to produce a screen-shake camera effect.

nodes.name: create_bounce_animation
nodes.summary: Generates frames of a bouncing object (circle or emoji) using ease-out-bounce easing to model realistic ground bounce with squash at impact.

nodes.name: create_explode_animation
nodes.summary: Multi-mode explosion animation (shatter, burst, spiral, implode, nova) scattering object pieces outward with physics-based trajectories.

nodes.name: create_particle_burst
nodes.summary: Creates a pure-particle burst animation using ParticleSystem with configurable palette, count, gravity, and sparkle/confetti emission.

nodes.name: create_fade_animation
nodes.summary: Animates a fade-in, fade-out, or in/out cycle for emoji or text objects with configurable easing curve and opacity modulation.

nodes.name: apply_opacity
nodes.summary: Scales the alpha channel of a PIL RGBA image to apply a 0.0–1.0 opacity value for transparent compositing.

nodes.name: create_crossfade
nodes.summary: Produces a crossfade sequence between two objects by compositing them at complementary opacity values across frames.

nodes.name: create_fade_to_color
nodes.summary: Creates frames that smoothly transition a solid background from one RGB color to another using component interpolation.

nodes.name: create_flip_animation
nodes.summary: Simulates a 3D card flip by scaling width or height via cosine function, swapping front/back faces at the 90-degree midpoint.

nodes.name: create_quick_flip
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper for a fast emoji-to-emoji horizontal flip with sensible defaults.

nodes.name: create_nope_flip
nodes.summary: Preset flip animation rendering a head-shake NOPE reaction using the standard flip mechanism.

nodes.name: create_morph_animation
nodes.summary: Multi-mode morph animation (dissolve, scale, flip, color) transitioning between two objects with alpha compositing and configurable easing.

nodes.name: create_reaction_morph
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper for a dissolve morph between two emoji reaction images with default frame size.

nodes.name: create_shape_morph
nodes.summary: Animates sequential shape morphing across a list of color/size descriptors with interpolated circle radius and position.

nodes.name: create_move_animation
nodes.summary: Moves an object from start_pos to end_pos with selectable motion type (linear, arc, orbit, wave, bezier) and optional easing.

nodes.name: create_path_from_points
nodes.summary: Generates an interpolated (x, y) path list from a sequence of waypoints, distributing frames proportionally per segment.

nodes.name: apply_trail_effect
nodes.summary: Blends previous frames into each current frame to create a ghost-trail motion echo effect.

nodes.name: create_pulse_animation
nodes.summary: Animates scale/glow/color pulsing with sinusoidal or eased oscillation over configurable pulse cycles and scale range.

nodes.name: create_attention_pulse
nodes.summary: Preset pulse animation for attention-grabbing with scale-type pulsing and standard frame size.

nodes.name: create_breathing_animation
nodes.summary: Slow sinusoidal scale oscillation mimicking a breathing effect with configurable breath count and scale range.

nodes.name: create_shake_animation
nodes.summary: Renders an object shaking by oscillating its position using sin/cos functions with decaying intensity per frame.

nodes.name: create_slide_animation
nodes.summary: Slides an object in from a screen edge (or out) with configurable direction, easing, and optional overshoot past the target.

nodes.name: create_multi_slide
nodes.summary: Animates multiple objects sliding in with per-object staggered delay, compositing each onto a shared background frame.

nodes.name: create_spin_animation
nodes.summary: Rotates an emoji or text object with continuous, ease-in/out, or wobble rotation mode using PIL image rotate.

nodes.name: create_loading_spinner
nodes.summary: Generates a loading-spinner animation as dot-arc, arc-sweep, or spinning emoji variants.

nodes.name: create_wiggle_animation
nodes.summary: Multi-mode wiggle animation (horizontal, vertical, rotation, jelly, combined) using sinusoidal displacement and scale modulation per frame.

nodes.name: create_excited_wiggle
nodes.summary: Preset combined-wiggle animation for expressing excitement with standard intensity and cycle settings.

nodes.name: create_zoom_animation
nodes.summary: Zooms an emoji or text in, out, or in-out with optional Gaussian motion blur and configurable easing over the scale range.

nodes.name: create_explosion_zoom
nodes.summary: Combines exponential zoom-in with rotation and decreasing blur radius to simulate an explosive approach effect.

nodes.name: create_mind_blown_zoom
nodes.summary: Creates a mind-blown reaction GIF sequence: zoom-out then zoom-in with orbital wobble for dramatic comedic effect.

nodes.name: easing.py
nodes.summary: Core easing/interpolation math library. Provides 20 exported functions covering linear, quadratic, cubic, bounce, elastic, back, and custom arc/squash-stretch easing curves, plus a registry-based lookup (get_easing) and a generic interpolate dispatcher.

nodes.name: frame_composer.py
nodes.summary: Core PIL drawing utilities. Creates blank frames, draws circles, text, gradient backgrounds, and star shapes onto PIL Image objects. Used as the low-level canvas API by all animation templates.

nodes.name: gif_builder.py
nodes.summary: GIF assembly engine. GIFBuilder class collects numpy/PIL frames, performs color quantization (optimize_colors), deduplicates near-identical frames, resizes, and writes the final GIF via imageio.

nodes.name: visual_effects.py
nodes.summary: Particle system and visual effect primitives. Provides Particle and ParticleSystem classes for confetti/sparkle emission, plus standalone functions for motion blur, impact flash, shockwave rings, explosion effects, glow, drop shadow, speed lines, and screen shake.

nodes.name: bounce.py
nodes.summary: Bounce animation template. Renders an object falling and bouncing using ease_out_bounce easing. Supports circle and emoji object types.

nodes.name: explode.py
nodes.summary: Explode and particle burst animation templates. Supports fragmentation into pieces, ring/star/confetti burst variants, and standalone particle burst using the ParticleSystem.

nodes.name: fade.py
nodes.summary: Fade animation templates. Provides fade-in/out, crossfade between two objects, and solid color fade transitions using PIL alpha compositing and numpy opacity manipulation.

nodes.name: flip.py
nodes.summary: Flip animation templates. Implements 3D card-flip illusion using cosine-based scale squishing across horizontal/vertical axes. Includes quick_flip and nope_flip shortcuts.

nodes.name: morph.py
nodes.summary: Morph animation templates. Transitions between two objects via cross-dissolve, circle-to-shape morph, shape interpolation, and reaction-emoji morph shortcuts.

nodes.name: move.py
nodes.summary: Move animation templates. Supports linear, arc, orbit, wave, and bounce motion types. Includes path-from-points multi-waypoint movement and optional trail blending effect.

nodes.name: pulse.py
nodes.summary: Pulse and breathing animation templates. Animates scale/opacity oscillation using sine wave or easing. Variants: attention pulse, breathing, color pulse, grow-shrink.

nodes.name: shake.py
nodes.summary: Shake animation template. Applies sinusoidal oscillation with decaying amplitude in horizontal, vertical, or random directions. Supports emoji, text, and circle objects.

nodes.name: slide.py
nodes.summary: Slide animation templates. Slides objects in from screen edges with optional overshoot. create_multi_slide staggers multiple objects entering sequentially.

nodes.name: spin.py
nodes.summary: Spin animation templates. Rotates objects with configurable full rotations and easing. Also provides a standalone loading spinner (dot-ring and arc styles) and emoji spinner.

nodes.name: wiggle.py
nodes.summary: Wiggle animation templates. Applies multi-axis sine-wave oscillation: rotate, translate, scale, jelly, and drunk wiggle variants. create_excited_wiggle is a convenience wrapper.

nodes.name: zoom.py
nodes.summary: Zoom animation templates. Scales objects in/out/bounce/pulse with optional motion-blur. Special variants: explosion_zoom (exponential scale-up with rotation) and mind_blown_zoom (spiral orbit).

nodes.name: ease_out_bounce
nodes.summary: Bounce-out easing function implementing the standard 4-segment piecewise bounce formula. Returns damped deceleration curve for t in [0,1]. Called by ease_in_bounce and create_bounce_animation.

nodes.name: get_easing
nodes.summary: Registry lookup: returns the easing function by name from EASING_FUNCTIONS dict, defaulting to linear. Used by interpolate() to resolve string easing names.

nodes.name: interpolate
nodes.summary: Generic value interpolator. Given start, end, normalized t [0,1], and optional easing name, returns the eased intermediate value. Core utility called by virtually all animation templates.

nodes.name: apply_squash_stretch
nodes.summary: Returns (scale_x, scale_y) tuple applying squash-and-stretch deformation to a base scale. Direction parameter controls vertical vs horizontal squash for cartoony bounce feel.

nodes.name: calculate_arc_motion
nodes.summary: Computes (x, y) position on a parabolic arc between start and end positions at normalized time t. Height parameter controls arc peak. Used by move.py arc motion type.

nodes.name: create_blank_frame
nodes.summary: Creates a blank RGB PIL Image of given width/height filled with a background color. Foundation function called at the start of every animation frame loop across all templates.

nodes.name: draw_circle
nodes.summary: Draws a filled circle with optional outline onto a PIL frame using ImageDraw.ellipse. Supports fill color, outline color, and outline width.

nodes.name: draw_text
nodes.summary: Renders text at a given position on a PIL frame. Supports optional centering using textbbox measurements. Uses default PIL font.

nodes.name: create_gradient_background
nodes.summary: Creates a vertical linear gradient PIL Image interpolating between top_color and bottom_color. Draws horizontal lines per row with blended RGB values.

nodes.name: draw_star
nodes.summary: Draws a 5-pointed star polygon on a PIL frame using math.cos/sin to compute alternating outer/inner vertex points. Supports fill and outline.

nodes.name: GIFBuilder
nodes.summary: Stateful GIF assembly class. Accepts numpy/PIL frames via add_frame(s), optionally deduplicates near-identical frames (MSE threshold), runs color quantization (K-means via PIL quantize), then writes an animated GIF via imageio.imwrite with configurable FPS.

nodes.name: Particle
nodes.summary: Single particle entity with position, velocity, gravity, lifetime, color, size, and shape. update() advances physics; is_alive() checks lifetime; get_alpha() computes fade; render() draws to PIL frame.

nodes.name: ParticleSystem
nodes.summary: Manages a collection of Particle objects. Provides emit() for directional burst, emit_confetti() for random colorful rectangles, emit_sparkles() for radial sparkle patterns. update() and render() advance and draw all live particles.

nodes.name: add_motion_blur
nodes.summary: Blends current frame with previous frame using a blur_amount alpha weight to simulate motion blur. Uses numpy array blending and PIL Image.fromarray conversion.

nodes.name: create_impact_flash
nodes.summary: Creates a radial flash effect at a position by compositing concentric semi-transparent ellipses onto the frame with intensity-based opacity falloff.

nodes.name: create_shockwave_rings
nodes.summary: Draws expanding concentric ellipse rings at a position to simulate a shockwave. Each radius gets its own ellipse draw call with given color and line width.

nodes.name: create_explosion_effect
nodes.summary: Composites a circular explosion gradient onto a frame using RGBA alpha composite. Outer glow and inner core are drawn as filled ellipses at progress-scaled radii.

nodes.name: add_glow_effect
nodes.summary: Adds a glow halo around pixels matching a mask color. Creates a glow layer, applies Gaussian blur via ImageFilter, and blends with the original frame using Image.blend.

nodes.name: add_drop_shadow
nodes.summary: Composites a drop shadow behind an object bounded by object_bounds. Pastes the shadow color layer at an offset, then pastes the original object on top using RGBA.

nodes.name: create_speed_lines
nodes.summary: Draws radial speed/motion lines emanating from a position in a given direction. Lines are randomly scattered with varying opacity to suggest fast movement.

nodes.name: create_screen_shake_offset
nodes.summary: Returns a deterministic (dx, dy) shake offset for a given frame_index using seeded random to ensure reproducibility across render passes.

nodes.name: apply_screen_shake
nodes.summary: Applies screen shake by pasting the frame at a computed (dx, dy) offset onto a blank canvas of the same size. Calls create_screen_shake_offset for displacement.

nodes.name: create_bounce_animation
nodes.summary: Generates a list of PIL frames showing an object bouncing up from ground_y. Uses ease_out_bounce for the Y position curve and create_blank_frame + draw_circle for rendering.

nodes.name: create_explode_animation
nodes.summary: Multi-mode explosion animation: breaks an object into flying pieces (fragment mode), expands as a ring/star burst, or fades out fragments. Uses interpolate for trajectory and opacity blending.

nodes.name: create_particle_burst
nodes.summary: Creates a particle burst animation using ParticleSystem. Emits multiple particles with random velocities and colors, then renders and updates them across num_frames.

nodes.name: create_fade_animation
nodes.summary: Fade-in or fade-out animation for emoji, text, or circle objects. Interpolates opacity, scale, and color properties across frames using PIL alpha compositing.

nodes.name: apply_opacity
nodes.summary: Scales the alpha channel of a PIL RGBA image by a given opacity factor [0..1] using numpy array multiplication. Returns an RGBA image with modified transparency.

nodes.name: create_crossfade
nodes.summary: Cross-dissolves between two emoji/object states by simultaneously fading out object1 and fading in object2 using apply_opacity and Image.alpha_composite per frame.

nodes.name: create_fade_to_color
nodes.summary: Animates a solid background color transition from start_color to end_color using per-channel interpolate calls. Pure color fade with no object rendering.

nodes.name: create_flip_animation
nodes.summary: 3D card flip animation between two objects. Uses cosine of interpolated angle to simulate perspective foreshortening, switching from object1 to object2 at the midpoint when scale reaches zero.

nodes.name: create_quick_flip
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper: creates a quick horizontal flip animation between two emoji strings using create_flip_animation with preset defaults.

nodes.name: create_nope_flip
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper: creates a 'nope' shaking head animation using a horizontal flip with preset emoji and parameters.

nodes.name: create_morph_animation
nodes.summary: Multi-mode morph animation between two object states: cross-dissolve, circle-to-shape, shape-to-shape (scale+position interpolation), and emoji-to-emoji flip-morph. Uses alpha compositing and interpolate throughout.

nodes.name: create_reaction_morph
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper: morphs between two reaction emoji strings using create_morph_animation with preset frame size and center position.

nodes.name: create_shape_morph
nodes.summary: Animates through a list of shape definitions by interpolating center position, radius, and color between consecutive shapes across frames_per_shape intervals.

nodes.name: create_move_animation
nodes.summary: Multi-mode movement animation: linear, arc (calls calculate_arc_motion), orbit, wave (sine), and bounce motion types. Renders emoji, circle, or text objects at interpolated positions per frame.

nodes.name: create_path_from_points
nodes.summary: Converts a list of waypoints into a list of (x, y) positions at num_frames resolution by interpolating between each consecutive segment using easing.

nodes.name: apply_trail_effect
nodes.summary: Post-processes a frame list to add a motion trail. Each frame blends in previous frames at decreasing opacity to create a ghost-trail persistence effect.

nodes.name: create_pulse_animation
nodes.summary: Core pulse animation. Animates scale, opacity, color, and outline width using sine wave or easing interpolation across multiple pulse cycles. Supports emoji, circle, and text.

nodes.name: create_attention_pulse
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper: creates a scale-and-opacity attention pulse on an emoji using create_pulse_animation with preset parameters.

nodes.name: create_breathing_animation
nodes.summary: Slow, gentle scale oscillation simulating breathing using create_pulse_animation with ease_in_out_cubic easing and subtle scale_range.

nodes.name: create_shake_animation
nodes.summary: Shake animation with decaying sinusoidal displacement. Uses ease_out_quad to decay intensity over time and math.sin/cos for directional offset. Supports emoji, text, and circle objects.

nodes.name: create_slide_animation
nodes.summary: Slides an object in from a screen edge to a final position. Computes start offscreen position per direction (left/right/top/bottom), then interpolates with optional overshoot easing.

nodes.name: create_multi_slide
nodes.summary: Staggers multiple objects sliding in from different directions with a per-object stagger_delay. Each object activates after its offset frame, all composited onto the same frame.

nodes.name: create_spin_animation
nodes.summary: Rotates an object through full_rotations full 360° spins with easing. Rotation types: full, half, wobble (reverse midway), coin (scale squish). Renders emoji or text onto rotated canvases via PIL Image.rotate.

nodes.name: create_loading_spinner
nodes.summary: Renders a spinning loader: dots-ring type draws orbiting dot ellipses; arc type draws a rotating partial arc; emoji type rotates an emoji on each frame.

nodes.name: create_wiggle_animation
nodes.summary: Multi-mode wiggle animation using sine wave oscillation: rotate, translate (X/Y), scale (jelly), combined (drunk), and default rotate-translate. Applies transforms per frame to emoji or text canvases.

nodes.name: create_excited_wiggle
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper: creates a high-intensity combined translate+rotate wiggle on an emoji using create_wiggle_animation with preset parameters.

nodes.name: create_zoom_animation
nodes.summary: Zoom animation with multiple modes: in, out, bounce, pulse. Scales emoji or text canvases per frame with interpolated scale/position/color. Optional Gaussian motion blur applied at high zoom speeds.

nodes.name: create_explosion_zoom
nodes.summary: Rapid exponential scale-up zoom with simultaneous rotation and Gaussian motion blur — gives a dramatic 'zooming in' explosion look for an emoji.

nodes.name: create_mind_blown_zoom
nodes.summary: Mind-blown zoom: emoji orbits in a spiral while scaling up, then slams to center. Combines sinusoidal XY orbit offset with interpolated scale using ease_in_out_elastic.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package initializer for the local-agents module. Imports and wires all builtin tool categories (file, shell, AI coordination, computer use, code execution, GitHub) into the shared ToolRegistry via initialize_builtin_tools.

nodes.name: agent_executor.py
nodes.summary: Core agent execution engine (2059 lines). Defines Task, AgentType, AgentPerformance data models and the central LocalAgentExecutor class that routes tasks to local llama.cpp or remote fallback, manages tool-calling loops, emits agent events, tracks performance, and handles stagnation detection.

nodes.name: ai_coordination.py
nodes.summary: AI coordination tool handlers (1570 lines). Provides 24 handler functions registered with ToolRegistry: delegate_to_remote, query_context, store_memory, execute_workflow, discover_objectives, harness_health, query_aidb (Qdrant direct), collective_memory_search, post/read review_board, web_research_fetch, delegate_to_aider, and run_harness_cli.

nodes.name: code_execution.py
nodes.summary: Code execution tool handlers. Wraps CodeExecutor to expose run_python, run_bash, run_javascript, and validate_code as registered agent tools.

nodes.name: computer_use.py
nodes.summary: Computer use tool handlers for GUI automation. Registers screenshot, mouse_move, mouse_click, keyboard_type, keyboard_press, and get_screen_size tools. Uses pyautogui/X11 backend for desktop interaction.

nodes.name: file_operations.py
nodes.summary: File operation tool handlers. Registers read_file, write_file, list_files, search_files, file_exists, and edit_file. Includes path validation for security (validate_file_path) and sandboxed file access.

nodes.name: github_tools.py
nodes.summary: GitHub integration tool handlers. Wraps gh CLI to provide search_code, list_issues, create_pr, get_file, and pr_status as agent tools via ToolRegistry.

nodes.name: shell_tools.py
nodes.summary: Shell tool handlers. Provides run_command (with optional nsjail sandbox via NsjailSandbox), get_system_info, and check_service. Registers these as agent tools with configurable sandboxing.

nodes.name: testing_tools.py
nodes.summary: Testing tool handlers. Provides run_tests (via pytest) and check_test_coverage as agent tools. Parses pytest JSON output into structured results.

nodes.name: code_executor.py
nodes.summary: Sandboxed multi-language code executor (563 lines). Defines Language and SecurityLevel enums, ResourceLimits, SecurityScanner (pattern-based code scan), and CodeExecutor. Supports Python, Bash, and JavaScript with configurable resource limits and security levels.

nodes.name: collective_memory.py
nodes.summary: Collective memory abstraction backed by Redis (blackboard pattern) and AIDB. Provides CollectiveMemory class for multi-agent shared state: blackboard_set/get/getall, broadcast, archive_collaboration, and team tracking.

nodes.name: discovery_agent.py
nodes.summary: Opportunity discovery agent (393 lines). Scans issue backlog, health spider events, delegation feedback, and model profile freshness to surface high-priority improvement opportunities. Deduplicates and ranks candidates.

nodes.name: monitoring_agent.py
nodes.summary: System health monitoring agent (589 lines). Checks llama.cpp, hybrid-coordinator, AIDB services, memory usage, disk space, and agent performance. Provides triage, remediation execution, alert creation, and a continuous monitoring loop.

nodes.name: remediator_agent.py
nodes.summary: Thin remediation agent stub (26 lines). Wraps LocalAgentExecutor to execute remediation tasks against detected failures.

nodes.name: self_improvement.py
nodes.summary: Self-improvement engine (572 lines). Scores task execution quality across multiple dimensions (QualityDimension), stores scores in SQLite, collects feedback, analyzes performance trends, generates improvement recommendations, and runs benchmarks via SelfImprovementEngine.

nodes.name: tool_registry.py
nodes.summary: Central tool registry (816 lines). Defines ToolDefinition (with JSON schema generation), ToolCall, ToolRegistry with SQLite audit logging, rate limiting, security policy enforcement, and tool execution dispatch. All builtin tools register here.

nodes.name: initialize_builtin_tools
nodes.summary: Entry point that registers all builtin tool categories into the ToolRegistry. Called at package import. Handles ImportError for each category gracefully with warnings.

nodes.name: AgentType
nodes.summary: Enum defining agent backend types: LOCAL, REMOTE, HYBRID. Used for routing decisions in LocalAgentExecutor.

nodes.name: TaskStatus
nodes.summary: Enum defining task lifecycle states: PENDING, RUNNING, COMPLETED, FAILED, DEGRADED.

nodes.name: Task
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a task unit. Holds objective, context, complexity, quality requirements, status, result, timing, assigned agent, tool calls made, role, reviewer ID, task type, remote profile override. Serializable via to_dict.

nodes.name: AgentPerformance
nodes.summary: Tracks per-agent performance metrics: task counts, success/failure/fallback rates, execution time stats, quality scores, and tool call success rates. Provides get_success_rate and to_dict.

nodes.name: LocalAgentExecutor
nodes.summary: Central execution orchestrator for local agent tasks (1622 lines). Manages llama.cpp HTTP calls, tool-calling loop with dynamic tool hot-swap, stagnation watchdog, remote fallback via delegate-to-antigravity, agent event emission to JSONL, memory broker integration, performance tracking, and collaborative task execution.

nodes.name: _refresh_active_tools
nodes.summary: Dynamically refreshes the active tool set mid-execution based on tool result content. Enables tool hot-swap per AGENT-TOOL-CONTRACT: additions from TOOL_CATALOG when result signals need, enforcing max_tools cap.

nodes.name: get_executor
nodes.summary: Module-level singleton factory for LocalAgentExecutor. Returns cached instance or creates new one.

nodes.name: register_ai_coordination_tools
nodes.summary: Registers all 24 AI coordination tool handlers (delegate_to_remote, store_memory, query_context, harness_health, etc.) with the shared ToolRegistry with appropriate schemas and safety policies.

nodes.name: delegate_to_remote_handler
nodes.summary: Tool handler that delegates tasks to remote agents (Gemini/Codex) via delegate-to-antigravity or switchboard. Supports mode selection and async dispatch.

nodes.name: store_memory_handler
nodes.summary: Tool handler for persisting agent memories to AIDB (Qdrant) with normalized collection routing (error-solutions, best-practices, etc.).

nodes.name: query_context_handler
nodes.summary: Tool handler for RAG-style context retrieval from AIDB/Qdrant collections via hybrid-coordinator.

nodes.name: get_unified_stack_health_handler
nodes.summary: Tool handler returning a unified health status snapshot for llama.cpp, AIDB, hybrid-coordinator, and switchboard from a single call.

nodes.name: run_python_impl
nodes.summary: Executes Python code via CodeExecutor with sandbox and resource limits. Returns ExecutionResult.

nodes.name: run_bash_impl
nodes.summary: Executes Bash commands via CodeExecutor with configurable security level.

nodes.name: register_code_execution_tools
nodes.summary: Registers run_python, run_bash, run_javascript, and validate_code tools with ToolRegistry.

nodes.name: register_computer_use_tools
nodes.summary: Registers screenshot, mouse_move, mouse_click, keyboard_type, keyboard_press, and get_screen_size tools with ToolRegistry.

nodes.name: screenshot_handler
nodes.summary: Captures desktop screenshot using pyautogui or X11 fallback, returns base64-encoded PNG.

nodes.name: register_file_tools
nodes.summary: Registers read_file, write_file, list_files, search_files, file_exists, and edit_file tools with ToolRegistry.

nodes.name: read_file_handler
nodes.summary: Reads file contents with path validation, optional line range, and size limits. Enforces sandbox boundaries.

nodes.name: write_file_handler
nodes.summary: Writes content to file with path validation, directory creation, and sandbox enforcement.

nodes.name: register_github_tools
nodes.summary: Registers github_search_code, github_list_issues, github_create_pr, github_get_file, and github_pr_status tools with ToolRegistry.

nodes.name: NsjailSandbox
nodes.summary: Builds nsjail argv for sandboxed shell command execution. Configures network isolation, filesystem mounts, and resource limits for nsjail-based sandboxing.

nodes.name: register_shell_tools
nodes.summary: Registers run_command, get_system_info, and check_service tools with ToolRegistry.

nodes.name: run_command_handler
nodes.summary: Executes shell commands with optional nsjail sandbox, timeout, and output truncation. Returns stdout/stderr/returncode.

nodes.name: register_testing_tools
nodes.summary: Registers run_tests and check_test_coverage tools with ToolRegistry.

nodes.name: _run_pytest
nodes.summary: Runs pytest with JSON output plugin and parses results into structured pass/fail/error summary.

nodes.name: Language
nodes.summary: Enum of supported execution languages: PYTHON, BASH, JAVASCRIPT.

nodes.name: SecurityLevel
nodes.summary: Enum defining code execution security levels: NONE, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH (controls sandbox strictness).

nodes.name: SecurityScanner
nodes.summary: Pattern-based static code scanner. Compiles regex patterns for dangerous operations (subprocess, file deletion, network access, etc.) and produces SecurityScanResult with risk assessment.

nodes.name: CodeExecutor
nodes.summary: Multi-language code executor with resource limits and sandbox environment. Creates isolated Python/Bash/JS processes with ResourceLimits, security scanning, and statistics tracking.

nodes.name: CollectiveMemory
nodes.summary: Multi-agent shared memory via Redis blackboard pattern. Supports blackboard_set/get/getall, broadcast to all agents, archive_collaboration to AIDB, and team presence tracking.

nodes.name: DiscoveryAgent
nodes.summary: Proactively discovers improvement opportunities by scanning issue backlog, health spider JSONL events, delegation feedback logs, and model profile freshness. Deduplicates and ranks by priority.

nodes.name: HealthStatus
nodes.summary: Enum of service health states: HEALTHY, DEGRADED, CRITICAL, UNKNOWN.

nodes.name: HealthCheck
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding result of a single service health check: status, message, response_time_ms, details. Serializable via to_dict.

nodes.name: MonitoringAgent
nodes.summary: Continuous monitoring agent that checks llama.cpp, hybrid-coordinator, AIDB, memory, disk, and agent performance. Provides triage_issue, execute_remediation (delegates to LocalAgentExecutor), create_alert_for_issue, and a polling monitoring_loop.

nodes.name: RemediatorAgent
nodes.summary: Minimal remediation agent stub wrapping LocalAgentExecutor. Exposes remediate_failure(issue) which formulates a remediation task and executes it.

nodes.name: QualityDimension
nodes.summary: Enum of quality measurement dimensions: TASK_COMPLETION, TOOL_EFFICIENCY, RESPONSE_QUALITY, EXECUTION_SPEED, ERROR_RECOVERY.

nodes.name: QualityScore
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding per-dimension quality scores with weighted overall score calculation and to_dict serialization.

nodes.name: SelfImprovementEngine
nodes.summary: Engine that scores task executions across QualityDimensions, stores results in SQLite, collects human/automated feedback, analyzes trends, generates improvement recommendations, and runs benchmarks against reference tasks.

nodes.name: SafetyPolicy
nodes.summary: Enum of tool safety policies: SAFE, RESTRICTED, DANGEROUS, CRITICAL. Controls execution authorization.

nodes.name: ToolCategory
nodes.summary: Enum categorizing tools: FILE_OPERATIONS, SHELL, CODE_EXECUTION, AI_COORDINATION, COMPUTER_USE, GITHUB, TESTING.

nodes.name: ToolDefinition
nodes.summary: Dataclass describing a registered tool: name, description, parameters schema, handler, category, safety policy, rate limits, and timeout. Generates JSON schema for llama.cpp tool calling format via to_json_schema.

nodes.name: ToolCall
nodes.summary: Dataclass recording a single tool call invocation: tool_name, arguments, result, success, execution_time_ms, timestamp.

nodes.name: ToolRegistry
nodes.summary: Central registry for all agent tools. Manages registration/unregistration, SQLite-backed audit logging, per-tool rate limiting, security policy enforcement, tool execution dispatch, llama.cpp tool call parsing, and statistics reporting.

nodes.name: get_registry
nodes.summary: Module-level singleton factory for ToolRegistry. Returns cached instance or creates new one.

nodes.name: easing.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive easing function library: 13 standard easings (quad/cubic/bounce/elastic/back), dispatcher get_easing(), general-purpose interpolate(), plus advanced squash-stretch and arc-motion helpers used by all animation templates.

nodes.name: frame_composer.py
nodes.summary: PIL-based 2D drawing primitives: blank frame creation, circle/text/star rendering, and vertical gradient background. Foundation called by virtually every animation frame loop.

nodes.name: gif_builder.py
nodes.summary: GIFBuilder class: stateful frame accumulator with K-means palette optimization, near-duplicate frame deduplication, and GIF export via imageio. Manages output quality vs size tradeoffs.

nodes.name: visual_effects.py
nodes.summary: Particle physics system (Particle/ParticleSystem) plus standalone compositing effects: motion blur, impact flash, shockwave rings, explosion, glow, drop shadow, speed lines, screen shake.

nodes.name: bounce.py
nodes.summary: Bounce animation template: renders circle or emoji with ease_out_bounce trajectory from peak height to ground_y.

nodes.name: explode.py
nodes.summary: Explosion animation templates: multi-mode create_explode_animation (splatter/burst/vaporize/nuclear/disintegrate) and standalone create_particle_burst using ParticleSystem.

nodes.name: fade.py
nodes.summary: Fade animation templates: fade-in/out/pulse, apply_opacity alpha helper (used cross-template), crossfade between two objects, and solid color-to-color fade.

nodes.name: flip.py
nodes.summary: Flip/card-flip animations using cosine-based perspective scaling. Convenience wrappers: create_quick_flip and create_nope_flip.

nodes.name: morph.py
nodes.summary: Morphing animation templates: crossfade/dissolve/flip/warp between two objects, emoji reaction morph shortcut, and sequential shape-to-shape morphing.

nodes.name: move.py
nodes.summary: Movement animation templates: linear/arc/orbit/spiral/zigzag/elastic/catapult/pendulum motion types, multi-point path builder, and motion trail post-effect.

nodes.name: pulse.py
nodes.summary: Pulse/scale animation templates: sine-wave scale/glow/color/opacity pulsing, attention pulse shortcut, and breathing slow-oscillation animation.

nodes.name: shake.py
nodes.summary: Shake animation template: sin/cos positional oscillation with ease_out_quad decay. Configurable direction (horizontal/vertical/both/random) and intensity.

nodes.name: slide.py
nodes.summary: Slide animation templates: directional slide-in/out/through with overshoot support (create_slide_animation) and multi-object staggered slide (create_multi_slide).

nodes.name: spin.py
nodes.summary: Spin/rotation animation templates: full-rotation with easing, yo-yo/wobble/spin-in/spin-out types, plus loading spinner UI element (dots/arc/emoji).

nodes.name: wiggle.py
nodes.summary: Wiggle animation templates: multi-mode oscillation (horizontal/vertical/rotate/scale/combined/wave/jelly) using sine math, plus create_excited_wiggle convenience shortcut.

nodes.name: zoom.py
nodes.summary: Zoom animation templates: in/out/pulse/throb modes with optional Gaussian motion blur, plus create_explosion_zoom (exponential scale + rotation) and create_mind_blown_zoom (orbit + scale).

nodes.name: get_easing
nodes.summary: Looks up an easing function from EASING_FUNCTIONS dict by name, defaulting to linear. Gateway dispatcher called by interpolate().

nodes.name: interpolate
nodes.summary: General-purpose value interpolation with named easing: handles scalars, tuples (per-component), and lists. Most widely called function across all animation templates.

nodes.name: apply_squash_stretch
nodes.summary: Computes squash-and-stretch transform parameters (scaleX, scaleY, skewX, skewY) from base scale, intensity, and direction for physically realistic deformation.

nodes.name: calculate_arc_motion
nodes.summary: Computes (x, y) along a parabolic arc from start to end with configurable peak height at parameter t. Called by move template for arc motion type.

nodes.name: create_blank_frame
nodes.summary: Creates a new PIL RGB image of given dimensions filled with a background color. Foundation function called by virtually every animation frame loop.

nodes.name: draw_circle
nodes.summary: Draws a filled circle with optional outline onto an existing frame using PIL ImageDraw.ellipse. Used by bounce, move, morph, pulse, shake templates.

nodes.name: draw_text
nodes.summary: Renders text onto a frame at a given position with optional centering using PIL ImageFont and textbbox for accurate bounds.

nodes.name: create_gradient_background
nodes.summary: Generates a vertical linear gradient background by drawing scan lines interpolated from top_color to bottom_color.

nodes.name: draw_star
nodes.summary: Draws a 5-point star polygon with alternating outer/inner radius points via trigonometry and PIL ImageDraw.polygon.

nodes.name: GIFBuilder
nodes.summary: Stateful GIF assembler. Accumulates numpy array frames, applies K-means palette optimization on sampled frames, deduplicates near-identical frames, resizes output, then exports via imageio.imwrite. Methods: add_frame, add_frames, optimize_colors, deduplicate_frames, save, clear.

nodes.name: Particle
nodes.summary: Single animated particle with position, velocity, gravity, life, color, size, and shape (circle/rectangle/line). Methods: update (physics step), is_alive (life check), get_alpha (fade-out curve), render (draw onto PIL frame).

nodes.name: ParticleSystem
nodes.summary: Manages a collection of Particle instances. emit (directional burst), emit_confetti (colorful confetti), emit_sparkles (sparkle burst), update (step all), render (draw all to frame), get_particle_count.

nodes.name: add_motion_blur
nodes.summary: Blends current frame with previous frame at a configurable blur_amount ratio using numpy to simulate motion blur.

nodes.name: create_impact_flash
nodes.summary: Renders concentric radial gradient ellipses on an RGBA overlay at a position to simulate an impact/flash effect composited onto the source frame.

nodes.name: create_shockwave_rings
nodes.summary: Draws multiple concentric shockwave ring ellipses at a position with a given color and line width.

nodes.name: create_explosion_effect
nodes.summary: Renders an expanding radial explosion with progress-scaled radii and alpha gradient rings composited onto the frame.

nodes.name: add_glow_effect
nodes.summary: Adds a Gaussian-blur glow around pixels matching mask_color, blended back onto the original frame via Image.blend.

nodes.name: add_drop_shadow
nodes.summary: Composites a shadow layer at configurable offset beneath an object bounds region, then overlays the original object.

nodes.name: create_speed_lines
nodes.summary: Draws randomized speed/motion lines radiating from a position in a given direction using trigonometry and PIL ImageDraw.line.

nodes.name: create_screen_shake_offset
nodes.summary: Returns deterministic (dx, dy) shake offsets seeded by frame_index for reproducible screen shake without random drift.

nodes.name: apply_screen_shake
nodes.summary: Applies screen shake by pasting the source frame at a computed offset onto a blank canvas.

nodes.name: create_bounce_animation
nodes.summary: Generates bounce frames: object moves from peak bounce_height to ground_y using ease_out_bounce trajectory. Supports circle and emoji object types with squash on impact.

nodes.name: create_explode_animation
nodes.summary: Multi-mode explosion animation: splatter (pieces fly outward with rotation), burst (radial shockwave), vaporize (opacity fade), nuclear (ring expand), disintegrate (dot scatter). Uses interpolate and apply_opacity.

nodes.name: create_particle_burst
nodes.summary: Creates a ParticleSystem-driven burst of colored particles from center_pos over num_frames using emit() with random angles.

nodes.name: create_fade_animation
nodes.summary: Generates fade-in, fade-out, or fade-in-out frames for emoji/circle/text objects with configurable easing and interpolated color/position transitions.

nodes.name: apply_opacity
nodes.summary: Scales the alpha channel of a PIL RGBA image by an opacity factor [0..1] using numpy. Cross-template utility: also called by morph and explode templates.

nodes.name: create_crossfade
nodes.summary: Crossfade transition: object1 fades out while object2 fades in with interpolated scale/position over the frame sequence.

nodes.name: create_fade_to_color
nodes.summary: Generates a sequence of solid-color frames interpolating per-channel from start_color to end_color.

nodes.name: create_flip_animation
nodes.summary: Card-flip animation using cosine-based perspective scaling. Object1 visible for first half (cos > 0), switches to object2 at midpoint. Supports horizontal/vertical axis, emoji and text object types.

nodes.name: create_quick_flip
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper around create_flip_animation for a fast front/back emoji card flip.

nodes.name: create_nope_flip
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper: creates a flip where the back face shows 'NOPE!' text, useful for reaction GIFs.

nodes.name: create_morph_animation
nodes.summary: Core morphing engine: crossfade (dual-opacity blend), dissolve (dot scatter), flip (cosine scale), warp (perspective shear) transition modes between two objects.

nodes.name: create_reaction_morph
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper: emoji-to-emoji reaction morph using default crossfade settings.

nodes.name: create_shape_morph
nodes.summary: Sequences through a list of shapes, interpolating color and radius between each consecutive pair over frames_per_shape frames using draw_circle.

nodes.name: create_move_animation
nodes.summary: Multi-mode movement animation: linear, arc (uses calculate_arc_motion), orbit (circular), spiral, zigzag, elastic (spring overshoot), catapult (gravity drop), pendulum (sine swing). Dispatches to object renderer.

nodes.name: create_path_from_points
nodes.summary: Interpolates a smooth multi-segment path from a list of (x,y) control point pairs across num_frames steps using interpolate().

nodes.name: apply_trail_effect
nodes.summary: Post-processes a frame list by alpha-blending trailing ghost frames behind the current frame to create a motion trail effect using numpy.

nodes.name: create_pulse_animation
nodes.summary: Core pulse engine: sine-wave driven scale/glow/color/opacity pulsing with configurable pulse count and scale range. Dispatches to object-type renderer.

nodes.name: create_attention_pulse
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper: high-intensity scale pulse (1.0-1.5x) to draw attention to an emoji.

nodes.name: create_breathing_animation
nodes.summary: Slow scale oscillation (breathing effect) with configurable breath count and scale range, delegating to create_pulse_animation.

nodes.name: create_shake_animation
nodes.summary: Shake animation: oscillates object position with sin/cos and ease_out_quad decay. Configurable horizontal/vertical/both/random direction, intensity, and object type (emoji/text/circle).

nodes.name: create_slide_animation
nodes.summary: Directional slide: computes off-screen start position from direction (left/right/top/bottom) and interpolates to final_pos with configurable easing and overshoot.

nodes.name: create_multi_slide
nodes.summary: Animates multiple objects sliding in with per-object stagger delay, composited onto a shared frame using interpolate for position.

nodes.name: create_spin_animation
nodes.summary: Rotation animation: full rotation with easing, yo-yo (back-and-forth), wobble (sin oscillation), spin-in/spin-out types. Uses PIL image.rotate on an RGBA canvas.

nodes.name: create_loading_spinner
nodes.summary: Generates loading spinner frames: dots-circle (rotating dot cluster), arc (sweeping arc indicator), or emoji rotation spinner UI element.

nodes.name: create_wiggle_animation
nodes.summary: Multi-mode wiggle: horizontal (sin X offset), vertical (sin Y offset), rotate (oscillating angle), scale (pulsing size), combined (X+Y+rotate), wave (traveling wave), jelly (scale+rotate). All sine-wave based.

nodes.name: create_excited_wiggle
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper: combined wiggle with high intensity (20px) and 3 cycles for an excited/celebrating effect.

nodes.name: create_zoom_animation
nodes.summary: Multi-mode zoom: in/out/pulse/throb with optional Gaussian motion blur. Interpolates position, scale, and color; supports emoji and text object types.

nodes.name: create_explosion_zoom
nodes.summary: Exponential scale zoom with simultaneous rotation: emoji scales up with exp() curve while spinning, with Gaussian blur applied on fast-moving frames.

nodes.name: create_mind_blown_zoom
nodes.summary: Mind-blown effect: emoji orbits a center point while scaling up with sinusoidal position wobble overlay.

nodes.name: server.py
nodes.summary: Aider-Wrapper MCP Server v3.1. Provides async Aider code-editing invocations via a semaphore-gated task queue with status polling, hint injection from AIDB, bwrap sandboxing, analysis fast-path using local LLM, and task watchdog.

nodes.name: server.py
nodes.summary: Container Engine MCP Server. Wraps Podman API for container management (list, inspect, logs, start, stop, restart). Exposes MCP tools endpoint with allowlist-validated tool dispatch and audit logging.

nodes.name: self_healing.py
nodes.summary: Self-Healing Orchestrator. Monitors container health via Podman API, matches errors against known patterns (port conflict, OOM, permission denied, DB lock, model-not-found), and applies automated repair strategies with cooldown guards.

nodes.name: self_healing_daemon.py
nodes.summary: Entry-point daemon that instantiates SelfHealingOrchestrator, optionally connects to Qdrant for pattern storage, and runs a periodic monitoring loop logging healing statistics.

nodes.name: server.py
nodes.summary: Health Monitoring MCP Server using mcp.server.Server (stdio transport). Exposes tools for real-time service health checks, dashboard data collection, metric aggregation, and alert generation across the AI stack.

nodes.name: server.py
nodes.summary: NixOS Documentation MCP Server. Aggregates multi-source Nix/NixOS documentation with semantic search, Redis caching, diskcache, OpenTelemetry tracing, Prometheus metrics, and git-backed source scraping via BeautifulSoup/markdownify.

nodes.name: hooks.py
nodes.summary: Ralph Loop Hooks: StopHook intercepts exit-code-2 to block premature loop termination; ContextRecoveryHook uses git to checkpoint and recover state; ResourceLimitHook enforces resource bounds; TelemetryHook emits loop telemetry.

nodes.name: loop_engine.py
nodes.summary: Ralph Wiggum Loop Engine: core while-true continuous task iteration with adaptive iteration limits by complexity, per-task timeout, human-in-the-loop approval gates, fcntl file locking, periodic state persistence, and hook dispatch.

nodes.name: server.py
nodes.summary: Ralph Wiggum MCP Server. FastAPI server wiring RalphLoopEngine, StateManager, and hooks into REST + Prometheus endpoints. Integrates HybridClient and AIDBClient for AI-grounded context and strict env validation.

nodes.name: state_manager.py
nodes.summary: State Manager for Ralph loops. Handles JSON persistence with atomic temp-file rename, state versioning, task snapshots, backup-on-corruption, and structured logging.

nodes.name: auth_middleware.py
nodes.summary: Unified API Key Authentication Middleware for all MCP servers. Supports x-api-key header and Authorization Bearer, constant-time comparison, optional mode for dev, env-var or explicit key configuration.

nodes.name: hybrid_client.py
nodes.summary: Hybrid Coordinator and AIDB client library. Provides HybridClient (route_search, submit_feedback) and AIDBClient with separate circuit breakers (CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN) for each backend to prevent cascading failures.

nodes.name: path_validation.py
nodes.summary: Path traversal attack prevention utilities. Validates user-provided paths are descendants of a permitted base directory; handles absolute/relative paths, optional symlink control, and existence checks.

nodes.name: podman_api_client.py
nodes.summary: Secure HTTP-based Podman API client. Enforces operation allowlists per service, audit logging, rate limiting, and structured error types (PodmanAPIError, OperationNotAllowedError, ContainerNotFoundError).

nodes.name: TaskRequest
nodes.summary: Pydantic request model for Aider task submission. Fields: prompt, files, model, max_tokens, workspace, context, iteration, mode.

nodes.name: TaskResponse
nodes.summary: Pydantic response model for completed Aider tasks. Fields: status, output, error, files_modified, git_commits, duration_seconds, exit_code, completed.

nodes.name: TaskSubmitResponse
nodes.summary: Pydantic response model for async task submission. Fields: task_id, status, message.

nodes.name: HealthResponse
nodes.summary: Health check response for aider-wrapper. Fields: status, version, aider_available, workspace, llama_cpp_url.

nodes.name: TaskSummaryResponse
nodes.summary: Summary response for all tasks. Fields: active_tasks, last_task_status, last_task_id.

nodes.name: _run_aider_task
nodes.summary: Core async task runner (435 lines). Orchestrates hint injection from AIDB, bwrap sandbox setup, aider subprocess execution with stdout/stderr streaming, watchdog timeout, result parsing, hint audit, git commit extraction, and terminal state persistence.

nodes.name: _task_watchdog_loop
nodes.summary: Background asyncio task that periodically checks all running tasks for timeout, killing overdue processes and marking them as timed-out.

nodes.name: _select_hint_for_injection
nodes.summary: Selects the best AIDB hint to prepend to an Aider prompt using token-overlap scoring, minimum score threshold, and deduplication against already-seen hints in the task context.

nodes.name: _run_analysis_fastpath
nodes.summary: Analysis-only fast-path that sends file snippets directly to local LLM (hybrid coordinator) without invoking Aider, used for read-only queries to avoid heavyweight subprocess spawning.

nodes.name: submit_task
nodes.summary: FastAPI route: POST /tasks/submit. Asynchronously queues an Aider task and returns task_id immediately.

nodes.name: execute_task
nodes.summary: FastAPI route: POST /tasks/execute. Synchronous Aider task execution (awaits completion before returning result).

nodes.name: get_task_status
nodes.summary: FastAPI route: GET /tasks/{task_id}/status. Returns current status and output of a submitted task, or 404 if not found.

nodes.name: stop_task
nodes.summary: FastAPI route: POST /tasks/{task_id}/stop. Sends SIGTERM then SIGKILL to the running Aider process and marks task as stopped.

nodes.name: get_task_summary
nodes.summary: FastAPI route: GET /tasks/summary. Returns counts of active tasks and last task status/id.

nodes.name: ToolCallRequest
nodes.summary: Pydantic request model for /tools/call dispatch. Validates tool_name against an allowlist of 10 container operations and rejects unknown fields.

nodes.name: ContainerStatus
nodes.summary: Pydantic model representing container health state: name, id, status string, health, restart_count, last_restart timestamp.

nodes.name: ErrorPattern
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for a known error pattern: pattern_id, error_regex, description, fix_strategy, success_rate, applications count.

nodes.name: HealingAction
nodes.summary: Pydantic model recording a healing action taken: timestamp, container, matched error_pattern, action type, success bool, logs.

nodes.name: SelfHealingOrchestrator
nodes.summary: Core self-healing engine. Starts asyncio monitoring loop, checks container statuses, matches log output against ErrorPattern regexes, executes fix strategies (restart, rebuild, rollback), tracks healing history with cooldowns, optionally stores patterns in Qdrant.

nodes.name: Settings
nodes.summary: Minimal Pydantic settings model for daemon: enabled flag and check_interval seconds, loaded from environment variables.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Async main for self-healing daemon: loads settings, optionally connects Qdrant, instantiates SelfHealingOrchestrator, runs indefinitely logging periodic statistics.

nodes.name: HealthMonitor
nodes.summary: Core health monitoring class. Uses httpx.AsyncClient with 30s TTL cache to check each configured service endpoint. Returns structured health dicts with status, latency, and error info.

nodes.name: configure_logging
nodes.summary: Configures structlog with ProcessorFormatter, ISO timestamps, JSON rendering, and clears uvicorn handler propagation for uniform structured logging.

nodes.name: Hook
nodes.summary: Abstract base hook class defining the execute(task, result) interface.

nodes.name: StopHook
nodes.summary: Intercepts exit-code-2 from agent processes to prevent premature loop termination (the Ralph Wiggum technique). Updates task context with block counts and last-block iteration.

nodes.name: ContextRecoveryHook
nodes.summary: Uses git to create checkpoints and recover loop state after crashes. Provides deterministic failure recovery via git stash, branch tracking, and state-file restoration.

nodes.name: ResourceLimitHook
nodes.summary: Enforces resource usage bounds (CPU, memory, iteration count) to prevent runaway loops consuming system resources.

nodes.name: TelemetryHook
nodes.summary: Emits structured telemetry events per loop iteration: timing, exit codes, iteration counts, and task outcomes to audit log.

nodes.name: RalphLoopEngine
nodes.summary: Core engine for continuous autonomous development loops. Features: adaptive iteration limits by complexity (simple=3, very_complex=50), per-task timeout (default 3600s), asyncio.Queue task scheduling, hook dispatch system, fcntl file locking, periodic state persistence every N iterations, and sensitive field scrubbing in telemetry.

nodes.name: StateManager
nodes.summary: Manages atomic JSON persistence for Ralph loop state. Writes to .tmp then renames for atomicity, backs up corrupted state files, tracks task snapshots with versioning and last_updated timestamps.

nodes.name: _require_env
nodes.summary: Strict environment variable validator: raises RuntimeError if the named env var is missing or empty when STRICT_ENV is set.

nodes.name: constant_time_compare
nodes.summary: Compares two strings in constant time using secrets.compare_digest to prevent timing-based API key extraction attacks.

nodes.name: APIKeyAuth
nodes.summary: FastAPI dependency class for API key authentication. Accepts x-api-key header or Authorization Bearer, validates with constant_time_compare, supports optional mode for development, logs auth events.

nodes.name: get_api_key_dependency
nodes.summary: Factory function returning a FastAPI Depends-compatible APIKeyAuth instance configured for a named service. Used by all MCP servers to initialize their require_auth dependency.

nodes.name: AIDBClientCircuitBreaker
nodes.summary: Circuit breaker for AIDB calls with CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN states. Trips after configurable failure_threshold, blocks requests while OPEN, tests recovery in HALF_OPEN, uses asyncio.Lock for thread safety.

nodes.name: HybridClientCircuitBreaker
nodes.summary: Circuit breaker for Hybrid Coordinator calls. Same CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN pattern as AIDBClientCircuitBreaker but with separate state and lower default threshold (3 failures vs 5).

nodes.name: HybridClient
nodes.summary: HTTP client for Hybrid Coordinator. Provides route_search() and submit_feedback() with optional HybridClientCircuitBreaker protection, API key injection from secrets file, and configurable httpx timeout.

nodes.name: AIDBClient
nodes.summary: HTTP client for AIDB (AI Database). Wraps AIDB REST endpoints with AIDBClientCircuitBreaker protection for knowledge retrieval and storage operations.

nodes.name: _load_hybrid_api_key
nodes.summary: Loads hybrid coordinator API key from HYBRID_API_KEY env var, or falls back to HYBRID_API_KEY_FILE / HYBRID_COORDINATOR_API_KEY_FILE secret file path.

nodes.name: SafePathError
nodes.summary: ValueError subclass raised when path validation fails due to traversal attempt or constraint violation.

nodes.name: validate_path_within_base
nodes.summary: Validates user-provided paths cannot escape the permitted base directory. Resolves both absolute and relative paths, optionally checks symlinks, and raises SafePathError on any violation.

nodes.name: PodmanAPIClient
nodes.summary: Secure Podman REST API client. Enforces per-service operation allowlists, structured audit logging of every call, rate limiting, and context-manager lifecycle. Supports list, inspect, restart, logs, start, stop operations.

nodes.name: PodmanAPIError
nodes.summary: Base exception for Podman API errors.

nodes.name: OperationNotAllowedError
nodes.summary: Raised when a service attempts a Podman operation not in its configured allowlist.

nodes.name: ContainerNotFoundError
nodes.summary: Raised when a referenced container does not exist in the Podman runtime.

nodes.name: fundamentals_analyst.py
nodes.summary: LLM-based fundamentals analyst node that fetches financial statements (balance sheet, cashflow, income, key ratios) for a ticker via the dataflow interface, formats them into a prompt context, and produces a fundamentals report via LLM completion. Updates AgentState with the report.

nodes.name: market_analyst.py
nodes.summary: LLM-based market analyst node that fetches OHLCV price history and technical indicators for a ticker, formats a market context, and produces a market report via LLM. Includes date lookback helper.

nodes.name: news_analyst.py
nodes.summary: LLM-based news analyst node that fetches ticker-specific news, global news, and insider transactions, then produces a news report via LLM completion. Updates AgentState with the report.

nodes.name: sentiment_analyst.py
nodes.summary: LLM-based sentiment analyst node that extracts news headlines for a ticker and uses LLM to produce a sentiment analysis report. Lightest of the four analyst nodes.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Central configuration loader for the trading-agents subsystem. Reads all tuning parameters (LLM endpoints, model names, debate rounds, memory prune flags, checkpointing, analyst types) from environment variables with sensible defaults. Returns a plain dict.

nodes.name: interface.py
nodes.summary: Unified market data access layer supporting yfinance (default) and Alpha Vantage backends. Provides OHLCV price series, computed technical indicators (SMA, EMA, MACD, RSI, Bollinger Bands, ATR), fundamental financials (key ratios, balance sheet, cashflow, income statement), news articles, global news, and insider transactions.

nodes.name: state.py
nodes.summary: Defines AgentState TypedDict — the shared mutable state bag threaded through all agent nodes in the trading workflow. Contains slots for all analyst reports, researcher arguments, debate history, risk assessment, trader decision, portfolio decision, and position sizing. Provides initial_state factory.

nodes.name: trading_graph.py
nodes.summary: Top-level TradingGraph orchestrator class. Initialises an OpenAI-compatible LLM client pointed at the local llama.cpp endpoint, then sequences the full analyst → researcher → trader → risk → portfolio pipeline. Provides analyze() (full pipeline) and analyze_quick() (market + trader only). Persists per-analysis JSON logs for past-decision retrieval.

nodes.name: portfolio_manager.py
nodes.summary: LLM-based portfolio manager agent node. Aggregates all upstream reports and the trader decision, sends to LLM for final portfolio action (BUY/SELL/HOLD) and position-size percentage. Parses structured decision output via regex.

nodes.name: bear_researcher.py
nodes.summary: Bear-case researcher agent node. Engages in iterative debate with the bull researcher to argue the bearish case based on all analyst reports. Maintains per-round debate history and responds to the latest bull argument. Updates AgentState with bear_argument and bear_history.

nodes.name: bull_researcher.py
nodes.summary: Bull-case researcher agent node. Mirrors bear_researcher.py — argues the bullish case based on analyst reports, engaging in iterative debate rounds. Updates AgentState with bull_argument and bull_history.

nodes.name: risk_manager.py
nodes.summary: Risk manager agent node. Fetches live technical indicators and combines them with the trader's proposed decision and upstream reports to produce a risk assessment via LLM. Acts as a final check before portfolio allocation.

nodes.name: trader_agent.py
nodes.summary: Trader agent node. Synthesises all four analyst reports and the researcher debate outcome into a preliminary trade decision (BUY/SELL/HOLD) via LLM. Acts before the risk manager and portfolio manager in the pipeline.

nodes.name: run_fundamentals_analyst
nodes.summary: Main agent node function: extracts ticker+date from state, fetches 4 financial statement types, formats them, calls LLM with a fundamentals-analyst system prompt, and returns updated AgentState with fundamentals_report.

nodes.name: _format_context
nodes.summary: Formats fundamentals, balance sheet, cashflow, and income statement dicts into a human-readable text block for LLM prompt injection. Handles nested dict and list values.

nodes.name: run_market_analyst
nodes.summary: Main agent node function: fetches OHLCV price data and computed technical indicators for the ticker over a lookback window, formats the market context, calls LLM for market analysis, and returns updated AgentState with market_report.

nodes.name: _format_market_context
nodes.summary: Formats OHLCV price history and technical indicators dict into a structured text block for LLM prompt injection. Handles scalar and list indicator values.

nodes.name: _lookback
nodes.summary: Utility: computes a past date string (YYYY-MM-DD) by subtracting N days from a given trade_date string.

nodes.name: run_news_analyst
nodes.summary: Main agent node function: fetches ticker news, global news, and insider transactions; formats them; calls LLM with a news-analyst system prompt; returns updated AgentState with news_report.

nodes.name: _format_context
nodes.summary: Formats news articles, global news headlines, and insider transaction records into a text block for LLM prompt injection.

nodes.name: run_sentiment_analyst
nodes.summary: Main agent node function: extracts news headlines from the news data, formats them, calls LLM with a sentiment-analyst system prompt, and returns updated AgentState with sentiment_report.

nodes.name: _format_context
nodes.summary: Formats a list of news headlines into a numbered text block for LLM prompt injection.

nodes.name: get_config
nodes.summary: Reads all trading-agent configuration from environment variables (LLM base URL, model, API key, debate rounds, memory pruning, checkpointing, data vendor, analyst types list). Returns a plain dict with all settings.

nodes.name: _vendor
nodes.summary: Determines the active data vendor ('av' for Alpha Vantage if ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY is set and TRADING_DATA_VENDOR is 'av', else 'yf' for yfinance).

nodes.name: get_stock_data
nodes.summary: Public entry point for OHLCV price data. Extends the date range by +30 days to ensure enough data for indicators, then dispatches to _av_stock_data or _yf_stock_data based on _vendor().

nodes.name: _yf_stock_data
nodes.summary: Fetches OHLCV data via yfinance, converts to lists of (date, open, high, low, close, volume). Returns a structured dict or error string on failure.

nodes.name: _av_stock_data
nodes.summary: Fetches OHLCV data via Alpha Vantage TIME_SERIES_DAILY_ADJUSTED REST API, filters to the requested date range, and returns the same structured dict format as _yf_stock_data.

nodes.name: get_indicators
nodes.summary: Computes a set of technical indicators from OHLCV data using pandas: SMA-50, SMA-200, EMA-10, MACD (12/26/9), RSI-14, Bollinger Bands (20,2), ATR-14. Returns a dict of indicator name → value or error string.

nodes.name: get_fundamentals
nodes.summary: Fetches key fundamental ratios for a ticker via yfinance (P/E, P/B, EPS, dividend yield, market cap, sector, etc.). Returns a dict of 12 metrics.

nodes.name: get_balance_sheet
nodes.summary: Fetches the most recent balance sheet from yfinance (total assets, liabilities, equity, cash, debt).

nodes.name: get_cashflow
nodes.summary: Fetches the most recent cashflow statement from yfinance (operating, investing, financing, free cash flow, capex).

nodes.name: get_income_statement
nodes.summary: Fetches the most recent income statement from yfinance (revenue, gross profit, EBITDA, net income, EPS).

nodes.name: get_news
nodes.summary: Fetches up to max_items recent news articles for a ticker via yfinance, returning a list of {title, publisher, link, date, summary} dicts.

nodes.name: get_global_news
nodes.summary: Thin wrapper: delegates to get_news with a query string instead of a ticker symbol for global/macro news retrieval.

nodes.name: get_insider_transactions
nodes.summary: Fetches the 10 most recent insider transactions for a ticker via yfinance, returning as a list of dicts.

nodes.name: AgentState
nodes.summary: TypedDict defining the shared state threaded through all trading agent nodes. Fields cover: ticker/date/company_name, four analyst reports, bull/bear debate history and arguments, trader_decision, investment_plan, risk_assessment, final_decision, position_size, past_decisions, reflection_notes, multi-agent messaging fields (messages, send_to), and current_phase.

nodes.name: initial_state
nodes.summary: Factory function that constructs a fresh AgentState with ticker, trade_date, and company_name set; all report and decision fields initialised to None or empty collections.

nodes.name: TradingGraph
nodes.summary: Main orchestrator class for the trading-agents pipeline. __init__ loads config, builds an OpenAI-compatible client targeting the local llama.cpp endpoint, and creates a log directory. analyze() runs the full 8-step pipeline (4 analysts → 2 researchers × N debate rounds → trader → risk manager → portfolio manager). analyze_quick() runs market analyst + trader only. get_past_decisions() replays JSON logs for reflection.

nodes.name: run_portfolio_manager
nodes.summary: Portfolio manager agent node: aggregates all upstream reports and the trader decision, sends to LLM for a final BUY/SELL/HOLD decision with position-size percentage. Parses the response and returns updated AgentState with final_decision and position_size.

nodes.name: _build_context
nodes.summary: Assembles analyst reports, researcher arguments, risk assessment, and trader decision into a single text context string for the portfolio manager LLM prompt.

nodes.name: _parse_position_size
nodes.summary: Extracts a position-size percentage from the LLM decision text using regex, clamping the result to [0, 100].

nodes.name: _parse_action
nodes.summary: Extracts the action keyword (BUY/SELL/HOLD) from the LLM decision text by keyword matching.

nodes.name: run_bear_researcher
nodes.summary: Bear researcher agent node: builds analyst context, incorporates the latest bull argument, maintains multi-turn bear debate history, calls LLM with a bearish researcher system prompt, and returns updated AgentState with bear_argument and bear_history.

nodes.name: _build_analyst_context
nodes.summary: Collects available analyst reports from state and concatenates them into a text block for the researcher LLM prompt.

nodes.name: run_bull_researcher
nodes.summary: Bull researcher agent node: mirrors bear_researcher — builds analyst context, incorporates the latest bear argument as a counter-argument, maintains multi-turn bull debate history, calls LLM with a bullish system prompt, and returns updated AgentState with bull_argument and bull_history.

nodes.name: _build_analyst_context
nodes.summary: Collects available analyst reports from state and concatenates them for the bull researcher LLM prompt.

nodes.name: run_risk_manager
nodes.summary: Risk manager agent node: fetches live technical indicators, builds a risk context combining indicators with the trader decision and upstream reports, calls LLM for risk assessment, and returns updated AgentState with risk_assessment.

nodes.name: _build_context
nodes.summary: Assembles state reports, trader decision, and live technical indicator values into a text context for the risk manager LLM prompt.

nodes.name: run_trader_agent
nodes.summary: Trader agent node: aggregates all four analyst reports and the researcher debate output, calls LLM with a trader system prompt to produce a preliminary BUY/SELL/HOLD decision with rationale, returns updated AgentState with trader_decision.

nodes.name: _build_full_context
nodes.summary: Assembles all four analyst reports, researcher debate arguments, and past decision reflection notes into a full context string for the trader LLM prompt.

nodes.name: browser_research.py
nodes.summary: One-line re-export stub that delegates all browser research functionality to extensions/browser_research.py.

nodes.name: extensions/browser_research.py
nodes.summary: Headless Chromium-based browser research module. Spawns chromium subprocess to render JS-heavy pages, respects robots.txt, enforces per-host rate limiting, applies SSRF checks, and extracts text and links via BeautifulSoup.

nodes.name: extensions/federation_sync.py
nodes.summary: Qdrant vector-DB federation sync across distributed nodes. Generates collection manifests with checksums, exports/imports point data, resolves conflicts by timestamp, and serves an aiohttp HTTP API for manifest/export/import/sync-trigger endpoints.

nodes.name: extensions/research_workflows.py
nodes.summary: Curated research workflow runner. Loads workflow definitions from a JSON manifest, resolves URL templates with user inputs, dispatches to HTTP or browser fetch engines per source, aggregates and classifies results.

nodes.name: extensions/web_research.py
nodes.summary: HTTP-based web research module using httpx. Enforces robots.txt compliance, per-host rate limiting, redirect-safe fetches with SSRF checks, content-type filtering, and BeautifulSoup text/link extraction.

nodes.name: federation_sync.py
nodes.summary: One-line re-export stub delegating to extensions/federation_sync.py.

nodes.name: research_workflows.py
nodes.summary: One-line re-export stub delegating to extensions/research_workflows.py.

nodes.name: web_research.py
nodes.summary: Two-line re-export stub delegating to extensions/web_research.py.

nodes.name: ssrf_protection.py
nodes.summary: Shared SSRF protection layer used by all outbound HTTP callers. Validates URLs against allowlist, blocks private/link-local/loopback/special IP ranges, enforces HTTPS-only policy, and provides a factory for SSRF-safe httpx.AsyncClient instances.

nodes.name: BrowserResearchPolicy
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding browser research policy parameters: enabled flag, URL/selector limits, timeout, per-host delay, text/link caps, redirect limit, user-agent string, chromium binary path, and virtual-time budget.

nodes.name: load_browser_research_policy
nodes.summary: Factory that reads AI_BROWSER_RESEARCH_* environment variables and constructs a BrowserResearchPolicy instance with validated bounds.

nodes.name: _dump_browser_dom
