nodes.summary: Async function that invokes a chromium subprocess in headless mode to render a URL and dump the serialized DOM. Applies SSRF pre-check, uses a temp directory for chromium profile, enforces virtual-time budget, and returns (exit_code, stdout, stderr).

nodes.name: fetch_browser_research
nodes.summary: Main entry point for browser-based research fetches. Checks policy enablement, normalizes URLs and selectors, enforces per-host rate limits, checks robots.txt, invokes _dump_browser_dom, parses DOM with BeautifulSoup, and returns structured results with text excerpts and links.

nodes.name: FederationConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration dataclass for federation sync: node identifier, Qdrant URL, peer node URLs, sync interval, export directory, and collections filter.

nodes.name: SyncManifest
nodes.summary: Manifest describing the local node's collection state at a point in time. Contains node_id, generated_at timestamp, and a dict of CollectionManifest entries. Supports dict serialization and deserialization.

nodes.name: CollectionManifest
nodes.summary: Per-collection manifest entry: vector count, last-modified timestamp, and SHA-256 checksum of point data for change detection.

nodes.name: FederationSyncManager
nodes.summary: Core federation sync manager. Holds QdrantClient and httpx.AsyncClient. Implements: manifest generation with checksums, collection export/import with conflict resolution (latest-timestamp wins), bidirectional sync planning, node request safety (SSRF checks), snapshot save/load, and multi-node sync orchestration.

nodes.name: run_federation_server
nodes.summary: Starts an aiohttp web server exposing federation HTTP API: GET /manifest, GET /export/{collection}, POST /import/{collection}, POST /sync. Binds to host from HYBRID_FEDERATION_HOST env var.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point for federation_sync. Parses arguments for mode (export/import/serve/sync), constructs FederationConfig and FederationSyncManager, dispatches to export snapshot, import snapshot, serve federation server with periodic sync loop, or one-shot sync.

nodes.name: CuratedResearchWorkflow
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a named research workflow: slug, description, URL cap, default text char limit, input schema, and source definitions.

nodes.name: load_curated_research_manifest
nodes.summary: Loads the curated research workflow JSON manifest from the path in AI_CURATED_RESEARCH_WORKFLOWS_FILE env var. Validates it is a dict and returns it.

nodes.name: list_curated_research_workflows
nodes.summary: Returns a sorted list of workflow summary dicts (slug, description, source count, input count) from the curated manifest.

nodes.name: get_curated_research_workflow
nodes.summary: Looks up a workflow by slug from the manifest and constructs a CuratedResearchWorkflow dataclass with validated fields. Raises KeyError if not found.

nodes.name: run_curated_research_workflow
nodes.summary: Orchestrates a full curated research workflow run: resolves workflow, normalizes inputs, validates required fields, compiles source URLs from templates, dispatches per source to HTTP or browser fetch engines (with optional browser fallback), aggregates metrics and results, classifies each page result, and returns a structured summary with organized results and metadata.

nodes.name: WebResearchPolicy
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding HTTP web research policy: enabled flag, URL/selector limits, timeout, per-host delay, response byte cap, text char cap, link cap, redirect limit, and user-agent string.

nodes.name: load_web_research_policy
nodes.summary: Factory reading AI_WEB_RESEARCH_* environment variables to build a WebResearchPolicy instance with validated numeric bounds.

nodes.name: _fetch_with_redirects
nodes.summary: Manual redirect-following fetch loop. For each hop applies SSRF check on the destination URL, streams response with byte cap, follows Location header up to max_redirects, and returns payload dict with text, status, headers, and redirect history.

nodes.name: _robots_allowed
nodes.summary: Async robots.txt checker. Fetches /robots.txt via _fetch_with_redirects, parses with stdlib RobotFileParser, caches result per host, and returns (allowed: bool, meta: dict) indicating whether the user-agent may access the URL.

nodes.name: _extract_links
nodes.summary: Extracts and deduplicates absolute HTTP/HTTPS links from a BeautifulSoup document up to max_links, resolving relative hrefs against base_url.

nodes.name: _extract_text
nodes.summary: Extracts text content from a BeautifulSoup document. Removes script/style nodes, selects content by CSS selectors (or falls back to body/article/main), clips to max_text_chars, and returns (text, title) tuple.

nodes.name: fetch_web_research
nodes.summary: Main HTTP research fetcher. Validates policy enablement, normalizes URLs/selectors, enforces per-host rate limits via monotonic clock, checks robots.txt compliance, fetches with redirect safety, filters non-HTML content-types, parses with BeautifulSoup, extracts text and links, and returns structured results dict with metrics and skipped-URL reasons.

nodes.name: _ssrf_policy_config
nodes.summary: Reads HYBRID_OUTBOUND_ALLOWLIST, HYBRID_BLOCK_PRIVATE_EGRESS, and HYBRID_ALLOW_PLAINTEXT_HTTP env vars and returns a policy config dict.

nodes.name: _looks_private_or_local
nodes.summary: Heuristic hostname/IP classifier. Detects localhost aliases, .local/.internal TLDs, raw private/loopback/link-local IP literals, and resolves hostnames via getaddrinfo to check resolved IPs against private ranges.

nodes.name: _is_private_or_special
nodes.summary: Returns True if an ipaddress object is private, loopback, link-local, multicast, or otherwise special-purpose.

nodes.name: assert_safe_outbound_url
nodes.summary: Primary SSRF enforcement gate. Validates URL scheme (no file/ftp/data/javascript), blocks empty hosts, enforces HTTPS-only unless allowed, checks allowlist, and delegates to _looks_private_or_local for private-range detection. Raises PermissionError on violation.

nodes.name: create_ssrf_safe_http_client
nodes.summary: Factory that pre-validates a base_url with assert_safe_outbound_url then returns a configured httpx.AsyncClient with appropriate timeout and headers for bounded outbound requests.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package init for ai-stack/workflows — re-exports WorkflowCoordinator, DependencyGraph, core models, WorkflowParser, WorkflowStateStore, and WorkflowValidator as the public API surface.

nodes.name: coordinator.py
nodes.summary: Top-level workflow orchestrator. Wraps parser, validator, dispatcher, and state store to execute workflows synchronously or asynchronously via threading.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: DAG construction and analysis for workflow node dependencies. Provides cycle detection, topological sort, parallel batch extraction, and Mermaid/visualization payloads.

nodes.name: models.py
nodes.summary: Dataclass models for the workflow DSL: MemoryConfig, LoopConfig, RetryConfig, ErrorHandler, WorkflowNode, and Workflow. Each provides to_dict/from_dict serialization.

nodes.name: node_dispatcher.py
nodes.summary: Async batch dispatcher for workflow nodes. Executes parallel node batches with semaphore concurrency control, emits telemetry events, and tracks speedup ratios.

nodes.name: parser.py
nodes.summary: YAML workflow definition parser. Reads workflow YAML files and dicts and converts them into typed WorkflowNode/Workflow model instances with detailed ParseError reporting.

nodes.name: persistence.py
nodes.summary: JSON-based filesystem state store for workflow executions. WorkflowStateStore handles save/load/list/delete; WorkflowExecutionHistory aggregates stats and recent runs.

nodes.name: validator.py
nodes.summary: Multi-pass workflow validator. Validates schema, node dependencies (cycle detection), variable references, agent definitions, and memory configurations against a YAML schema.

nodes.name: WorkflowCoordinator
nodes.summary: Main workflow execution engine. Owns WorkflowParser, WorkflowValidator, WorkflowStateStore, and active-execution tracking. Supports background async execution via threading and aggregates node outputs into final results.

nodes.name: DependencyGraph
nodes.summary: DAG built from Workflow nodes using adjacency lists. Implements DFS cycle detection, Kahn's topological sort, parallel batch scheduling via execution levels, and exports to Mermaid diagrams and visualization payloads.

nodes.name: MemoryConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass configuring per-node lean-ctx memory: layers, topics, max_tokens, isolation mode, and diary-only flag. Validates layer/token constraints in __post_init__.

nodes.name: LoopConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass for node loop configuration: until condition expression, max_iterations ceiling, optional loop prompt, and fresh_context flag.

nodes.name: RetryConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass for node retry policy: max_attempts, on_failure action, backoff strategy (linear/exponential), and backoff_base seconds.

nodes.name: ErrorHandler
nodes.summary: Dataclass specifying error handling for a workflow node: handler node reference and whether to continue the workflow after the handler runs.

nodes.name: WorkflowNode
nodes.summary: Core workflow node dataclass holding id, agent reference, prompt template, depends_on list, condition expression, MemoryConfig, LoopConfig, RetryConfig, parallel flag, output names, goto target, and ErrorHandler.

nodes.name: Workflow
nodes.summary: Top-level workflow dataclass: name, version, ordered list of WorkflowNodes, description, input schema dict, agent definitions map, and output mappings. Provides get_node/get_node_ids helpers.

nodes.name: _write_event
nodes.summary: Module-level helper that writes a timestamped JSON telemetry event file to the hybrid events directory keyed by event_type and execution_id.

nodes.name: WorkflowNodeDispatcher
nodes.summary: Async dispatcher that executes a batch of workflow nodes in parallel via asyncio.gather with semaphore-bounded concurrency. Tracks serial and batch durations to compute the parallel speedup_ratio.

nodes.name: ParseError
nodes.summary: Custom exception for YAML workflow parsing failures, carrying file path, line number, and a formatted human-readable message.

nodes.name: WorkflowParser
nodes.summary: Parses YAML workflow definitions from files or raw dicts into typed Workflow and WorkflowNode models. Delegates sub-parsing of memory, loop, retry, and error-handler configs to dedicated private methods.

nodes.name: WorkflowStateStore
nodes.summary: Filesystem JSON store for workflow execution state. Supports save, load, paginated list, and delete operations over a configurable storage directory read from env vars.

nodes.name: WorkflowExecutionHistory
nodes.summary: Reads from WorkflowStateStore to compute per-workflow aggregate stats (total, success, failure counts, average duration) and retrieve recent execution summaries filtered by workflow name.

nodes.name: ValidationError
nodes.summary: Structured validation error dataclass carrying field path, error message, and severity level (error/warning). Provides str and repr formatting.

nodes.name: WorkflowValidator
nodes.summary: Multi-pass validator orchestrated by validate_all: schema validation against a YAML schema file, dependency cycle detection via DependencyGraph, variable reference resolution, agent definition correctness, and memory config constraints.

nodes.name: _mock_config.py
nodes.summary: Shared mock configuration module for the route-handler testing suite. Provides _svc_url helper that constructs service URLs from environment variables with fallback defaults, covering llama.cpp, AIDB, coordinator, and switchboard endpoints. Imported by every test file in this batch.

nodes.name: test-route-handler-adaptive-timeouts.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the route handler's calculate_adaptive_timeout function. Verifies timeout scaling under different backend latency conditions, query complexity, and token budget scenarios via a mock-injected module load.

nodes.name: test-route-handler-backend-audit.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for route handler backend audit functionality. Verifies that route_search correctly records backend selection and audit metadata for search operations using async execution via asyncio.run.

nodes.name: test-route-handler-classifier-context-cap.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for context cap enforcement in the route handler classifier. Tests that message context is correctly capped/truncated before being forwarded to local and remote backends across initial, continuation, and light-continuation request scenarios using recording mock HTTP clients.

nodes.name: test-route-handler-collection-policy.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for AIDB collection selection policy in the route handler. Covers _select_route_collections, _select_keyword_pool, _normalize_tokens, and _looks_like_continuation_query across keyword-only, hybrid, semantic, and continuation query types with default and profile-based context overrides.

nodes.name: test-route-handler-context-budget.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for context budget management in the route handler. Tests that the context compressor is invoked when the context exceeds the configured token budget and that the compressed context is passed through to the backend.

nodes.name: test-route-handler-discovery-gating.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for Qdrant collection discovery gating in the route handler. Verifies that discovery is correctly throttled/cached across repeated route_search calls and that it resumes after TTL expiry or explicit invalidation.

nodes.name: test-route-handler-local-synthesis-budget.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for local synthesis token budget enforcement in the route handler. Verifies that the configured max_tokens cap is applied in the llama.cpp request payload when routing a synthesis request to the local backend.

nodes.name: _svc_url
nodes.summary: Constructs a service base URL by checking an explicit URL env var first, then falling back to host+port env vars, then to provided default host and port. Used across all test files to configure mock service endpoints without hardcoding.

nodes.name: load_route_handler
nodes.summary: Bootstraps the route handler module for isolated unit testing by injecting sys.modules stubs for aiohttp, prometheus_client, and coordinator dependencies, then loading the module via importlib.util from its source path. Pattern shared across all test files in this batch.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Test entry point that calls load_route_handler and asserts calculate_adaptive_timeout behavior under base conditions, high backend latency, short query, long query, and quota-exhausted scenarios.

nodes.name: load_route_handler
nodes.summary: Bootstraps the route handler for backend-audit tests by stub-injecting aiohttp, prometheus, and coordinator dependencies into sys.modules, then loading the handler dynamically via importlib.

nodes.name: _run
nodes.summary: Async test body for backend audit. Constructs mock request and response objects, invokes route_handler.route_search, and asserts that audit fields are present in the response and that backend metric labels were recorded.

nodes.name: load_route_handler
nodes.summary: Bootstraps the route handler for classifier-context-cap tests. Injects stubs for aiohttp, prometheus, asyncio, and coordinator modules, then loads the handler dynamically.

nodes.name: main_async
nodes.summary: Async test body covering three classifier context-cap scenarios: initial request (full context), continuation request (reduced cap), and light-continuation request. For each scenario, asserts message count in the outbound backend request, truncation behavior, and correct backend selection.

nodes.name: load_route_handler
nodes.summary: Bootstraps the route handler for collection-policy tests by injecting mock dependencies and dynamically loading the handler module.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Test entry point for AIDB collection selection policy. Validates _select_route_collections and _select_keyword_pool with keyword-only, hybrid, semantic, continuation queries, and profile-based overrides. Also tests _normalize_tokens and _looks_like_continuation_query helpers.

nodes.name: load_route_handler
nodes.summary: Bootstraps the route handler for context-budget tests by injecting mock dependencies and dynamically loading the handler module.

nodes.name: main_async
nodes.summary: Async test body for context-budget enforcement. Sets up _RecordingClient and _RecordingCompressor stubs, calls route_search, and asserts that compress_to_budget was invoked and that the compressed context was forwarded to the backend.

nodes.name: load_route_handler
nodes.summary: Bootstraps the route handler for discovery-gating tests by injecting mock dependencies and dynamically loading the handler module.

nodes.name: main_async
nodes.summary: Async test body for discovery gating. Verifies that Qdrant collection discovery is skipped on subsequent route_search calls within TTL, that discovery count does not grow, and that it resumes after explicit invalidation or TTL expiry.

nodes.name: load_route_handler
nodes.summary: Bootstraps the route handler for local-synthesis-budget tests by injecting mock dependencies and dynamically loading the handler module.

nodes.name: main_async
nodes.summary: Async test body for local synthesis token budget. Injects recording HTTP clients for local and remote backends, calls route_search, and asserts that the llama.cpp request payload contains the expected max_tokens value.

nodes.name: _FakeResponse
nodes.summary: Test stub for aiohttp ClientResponse. No-ops raise_for_status and returns a fixed JSON payload on json(), enabling route handler HTTP calls to succeed without a live backend.

nodes.name: _RecordingClient
nodes.summary: Test stub for aiohttp ClientSession. Records all POST calls (URL, headers, JSON body) in a calls list for later assertion, returning _FakeResponse.

nodes.name: _FakeResponse
nodes.summary: Test stub for aiohttp ClientResponse used in context-budget tests. Returns a fixed JSON payload.

nodes.name: _RecordingClient
nodes.summary: Minimal test stub for aiohttp ClientSession in context-budget tests. Returns a fixed _FakeResponse on any POST without recording.

nodes.name: _RecordingCompressor
nodes.summary: Test stub for the context compressor. Records compress_to_budget calls and returns a fixed compressed-context payload, allowing assertions that the route handler invoked compression when budget was exceeded.

nodes.name: _FakeResponse
nodes.summary: Test stub for aiohttp ClientResponse in local-synthesis-budget tests.

nodes.name: _RecordingClient
nodes.summary: Test stub for aiohttp ClientSession in local-synthesis-budget tests. Records POST calls including the full JSON body to allow max_tokens assertions on the llama.cpp request payload.

nodes.name: agent_diary.py
nodes.summary: Per-agent JSON-backed diary system with temporal fact integration. Each agent stores diary entries (topic, tags, content) in agent-specific JSON files. Entries are dual-written as TemporalFact objects for persistence. Supports cross-agent observation and formatted output.

nodes.name: layered_loading.py
nodes.summary: Progressive 4-layer memory loading system with token budget enforcement. L0=agent identity, L1=critical facts (JSON), L2=topic-filtered temporal facts, L3=query-scored semantic facts. Caches layer results; integrates with TemporalFact store and TemporalQueryAPI.

nodes.name: temporal_facts.py
nodes.summary: Core domain model for temporal facts. TemporalFact is a dataclass with validity windows (valid_from/valid_until), SHA-256 content hashing, agent ownership, confidence scoring, and versioning. TemporalFactStore is an abstract storage backend base class.

nodes.name: temporal_query.py
nodes.summary: Abstract query API over temporal facts. Provides query_valid_at, query_by_timerange, get_stale_facts, semantic_search, get_agent_diary, store/update/expire_fact, and get_fact_history. Backend execution methods are abstract (NotImplementedError). Five standalone filter helpers.

nodes.name: test_layered_loading.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for LayeredMemory. Covers L0-L3 layer loading, progressive load with tight/generous token budgets, topic extraction, identity management, critical fact persistence, cache behavior, and layer stats. Uses MockFactStore.

nodes.name: test_temporal_facts.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive unit tests for TemporalFact. Eight test classes covering: creation/validation, temporal validity windows, staleness detection, expiration, dict serialization roundtrip, fact filtering helpers, agent ownership isolation, and all fact type variants.

nodes.name: test_temporal_query.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for TemporalQueryAPI using concrete MockTemporalQueryAPI subclass. Covers query_valid_at, query_by_timerange, stale facts, agent diary, semantic search, store/update/expire operations, query limits, and all five filter helper functions.

nodes.name: DiaryEntry
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a single diary entry. Fields: entry_id, agent, content, topic, tags, timestamp, fact_id. Serializes to/from dict for JSON storage.

nodes.name: AgentDiary
nodes.summary: Core diary manager for a single agent. Writes entries as TemporalFact objects and JSON records. Supports read with time/topic/tag filters, full-text search, topic/tag enumeration, stats, cross-agent observation via read_as_observer classmethod, and diary discovery.

nodes.name: format_diary_entries
nodes.summary: Formats a list of DiaryEntry objects into a human-readable numbered string with timestamps, topic, tags, and content for display or injection into agent context.

nodes.name: LayerConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass configuration for a memory layer. Fields: name, always_load (bool), max_tokens (int), priority (int). Defines per-layer token budget and load policy.

nodes.name: LayeredMemory
nodes.summary: Progressive layered memory loader. Manages four memory layers (identity, critical facts, topic facts, query facts) with per-layer token caps and an LRU-style result cache. progressive_load() assembles context stopping when token budget is exhausted. Supports identity file writes, critical fact appends, and layer stats.

nodes.name: load_memory_with_budget
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper: instantiates LayeredMemory with given query/max_tokens/fact_store and calls progressive_load(). Returns assembled context string within the token budget.

nodes.name: TemporalFact
nodes.summary: Core temporal fact dataclass. Tracks content, project, topic, type (observation/decision/preference/discovery/constraint/state), validity window (valid_from/valid_until), agent_owner, confidence [0,1], tags, embedding_vector, and versioning metadata. Auto-generates SHA-256 content hash and deterministic fact_id on construction. Supports is_valid_at(), is_stale(), is_ongoing(), expire(), and dict serialization.

nodes.name: TemporalFactStore
nodes.summary: Abstract base class for temporal fact storage backends. Declares abstract methods: store(), retrieve(), query_valid_at(), and get_stale_facts(). Concrete backends implement these against AIDB/Qdrant/PostgreSQL.

nodes.name: get_valid_facts
nodes.summary: Filter helper: returns subset of facts that are valid at a given time (defaults to now). Uses TemporalFact.is_valid_at().

nodes.name: get_stale_facts
nodes.summary: Filter helper: returns subset of facts that are stale at the given current_time (defaults to now). Uses TemporalFact.is_stale().

nodes.name: TemporalQueryAPI
nodes.summary: Abstract query API for temporal fact retrieval. Concrete methods: query_valid_at(), query_by_timerange(), get_stale_facts(), semantic_search(), get_agent_diary(), expire_fact(). Abstract stubs: store_fact(), update_fact(), get_fact_history(), _execute_query(), _execute_semantic_search(). Accepts rich filter dicts (project, topic, type, tags, confidence, limit).

nodes.name: filter_facts_by_project
nodes.summary: Standalone filter: returns facts matching the given project string.

nodes.name: filter_facts_by_topic
nodes.summary: Standalone filter: returns facts matching the given topic string.

nodes.name: filter_facts_by_type
nodes.summary: Standalone filter: returns facts whose type field matches the given fact_type string.

nodes.name: filter_facts_by_tags
nodes.summary: Standalone filter: returns facts matching the given tag list. match_all=True requires all tags present (AND); match_all=False requires at least one (OR).

nodes.name: filter_facts_by_confidence
nodes.summary: Standalone filter: returns facts whose confidence falls within [min_confidence, max_confidence] range (defaults 0.0–1.0).

nodes.name: MockFactStore
nodes.summary: Minimal in-memory mock implementing TemporalFactStore interface (add/get_all) for unit tests. Holds a list of TemporalFact objects added via add().

nodes.name: TestLayeredMemory
nodes.summary: pytest test class for LayeredMemory. 20 test methods covering all four load layers, progressive load with budget and layer ordering, topic extraction, identity/critical-fact writes, caching, cache clear, and layer stats reporting.

nodes.name: test_load_memory_with_budget_convenience
nodes.summary: Standalone pytest function verifying the load_memory_with_budget() convenience wrapper returns a non-empty string context.

nodes.name: TestTemporalFactCreation
nodes.summary: Tests TemporalFact construction: minimal required fields, full field set, invalid type raises ValueError, invalid confidence raises ValueError, inverted temporal order raises ValueError, auto-generated fact_id, auto-generated content hash.

nodes.name: TestTemporalValidity
nodes.summary: Tests is_valid_at() for ongoing (no expiry) and bounded (expiry set) facts, and is_ongoing() predicate.

nodes.name: TestStalenessDetection
nodes.summary: Tests is_stale() for ongoing, expired (past expiry), and future-expiry facts.

nodes.name: TestFactExpiration
nodes.summary: Tests expire() method: transitions ongoing→expired, raises ValueError when expiry before start, increments version on expiry.

nodes.name: TestFactSerialization
nodes.summary: Tests to_dict() field presence, from_dict() field reconstruction, and full roundtrip serialization identity.

nodes.name: TestFactFiltering
nodes.summary: Tests get_valid_facts() and get_stale_facts() helper functions with mixed fact sets containing valid, expired, and future facts.

nodes.name: TestAgentOwnership
nodes.summary: Tests agent_owner field: shared memory (no owner), agent-owned facts, isolation between different agent owners.

nodes.name: TestFactTypes
nodes.summary: Tests that all valid fact type strings are accepted, and verifies semantic behavior of decision, preference, and discovery type facts.

nodes.name: MockTemporalQueryAPI
nodes.summary: Concrete subclass of TemporalQueryAPI for testing. Implements _execute_query() with in-memory filtering (validity, staleness, project, topic, type, tags, confidence, semantic), _execute_semantic_search() with keyword matching, and store_fact()/update_fact() with list storage.

nodes.name: TestTemporalQueryAPI
nodes.summary: pytest test class for TemporalQueryAPI. 18 test methods covering query_valid_at (current, project filter, multi-filter, tags filter), query_by_timerange (basic, with filters, invalid range), get_stale_facts, get_agent_diary, semantic_search, store/update/expire, and query limit enforcement.

nodes.name: TestHelperFunctions
nodes.summary: pytest test class for the five standalone filter helper functions. Tests filter_facts_by_project, filter_facts_by_topic, filter_facts_by_type, filter_facts_by_tags (match_all and match_any), and filter_facts_by_confidence (with explicit bounds and defaults).

nodes.name: advisor_detector.py
nodes.summary: Single-line re-export shim that makes DecisionPointDetector and DecisionPoint importable from the hybrid-coordinator package root.

nodes.name: extensions/advisor_detector.py
nodes.summary: Implements DecisionPointDetector which scans task descriptions for signals requiring human or advisor input, and DecisionPoint dataclass holding detected decision metadata.

nodes.name: knowledge/llm_router.py
nodes.summary: Core LLM routing engine that classifies task complexity, routes tasks to local/free/paid tiers via aiohttp, manages advisor consultation chains with fallback, and records routing metrics in SQLite.

nodes.name: llm_router.py
nodes.summary: Single-line re-export shim that exposes LLMRouter and supporting types from the knowledge subpackage at the hybrid-coordinator package root.

nodes.name: tests/test_advisor_detector.py
nodes.summary: Pytest test suite for DecisionPointDetector covering decision type detection, confidence thresholds, context-aware scoring, and question generation.

nodes.name: tests/test_advisor_fallback_chains.py
nodes.summary: Tests advisor model fallback chain logic in LLMRouter including per-type chains, deduplication, error fallback, exhausted-fallback exception, and fallback rank metrics.

nodes.name: tests/test_llm_router.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for LLMRouter covering tier delegation, escalation, response extraction, and prompt building with advisor guidance.

nodes.name: DecisionPoint
nodes.summary: Dataclass capturing a detected decision point: task_id, decision_type, generated question, context, confidence score, detected signals, and executor tier.

nodes.name: DecisionPointDetector
nodes.summary: Detects whether a task description triggers a decision point (architecture, security, tradeoff, ambiguity, planning) using regex patterns and confidence scoring adjusted by context and executor tier.

nodes.name: AgentTier
nodes.summary: Enum defining routing tiers: LOCAL, FREE, PAID for directing tasks to the appropriate LLM backend.

nodes.name: TaskComplexity
nodes.summary: Enum defining task complexity levels: SIMPLE, MODERATE, COMPLEX used to drive routing tier selection.

nodes.name: LLMRouter
nodes.summary: Main routing engine: classifies complexity, dispatches to local/free/paid backends via aiohttp, runs advisor consultation with multi-model fallback chains, estimates costs, and writes routing and advisor metrics to SQLite.

nodes.name: get_router
nodes.summary: Module-level factory function that instantiates and returns an LLMRouter singleton.

nodes.name: TestDecisionPointDetector
nodes.summary: Pytest test class with 15 methods covering all detection scenarios, confidence adjustments, question generation, attribute structure, and multi-type detection for DecisionPointDetector.

nodes.name: TestAdvisorFallbackChains
nodes.summary: Tests LLMRouter advisor model fallback chain construction (per decision type, deduplication, defaults) and runtime error fallback behavior including exhausted-fallback exception and rank metrics.

nodes.name: LLMRouterTests
nodes.summary: unittest.TestCase subclass testing LLMRouter free/paid tier coordinator delegation, local-to-free escalation on failure, response text extraction across payload shapes, and advisor-guided prompt building.

nodes.name: hints_engine.py
nodes.summary: Top-level re-export stub (3 lines) that forwards all symbols from the knowledge sub-package hints_engine facade.

nodes.name: gap_analyzer.py
nodes.summary: Provides utility functions for detecting and filtering knowledge gap entries: normalization, synthetic-gap detection, stale curated-gap detection, and longest-common-substring scoring.

nodes.name: hints_engine.py
nodes.summary: Facade module (53 lines) that re-exports HintsEngine, Hint, static rules, and token-manager symbols from the five sub-modules. Acts as the public API surface for the knowledge package.

nodes.name: hints_engine_impl.py
nodes.summary: Core implementation file (2793 lines) containing the HintsEngine class and _detect_file_type helper. Responsible for ranking, scoring, diversifying, and serializing contextual hints drawn from registry, gaps, static rules, runtime signals, feedback profiles, tool audit errors, and prompt coaching.

nodes.name: models.py
nodes.summary: Defines the Hint dataclass (25 lines) — the shared data model for a ranked contextual hint with id, type, title, score, snippet, reason, tags, and agent_hints fields.

nodes.name: static_rules.py
nodes.summary: Data-only module (316 lines) containing STATIC_RULES list and supporting constants. Provides hardcoded hint rules covering NixOS, AppArmor, Python, delegation, and harness workflow patterns.

nodes.name: token_manager.py
nodes.summary: Token budget management module (313 lines): TokenBudgetContext class tracks phase/complexity/compaction state; calculate_context_aware_budget produces per-query token allowances; _estimate_tokens, _compress_snippet, _tokenize are shared text utilities.

nodes.name: _normalize_gap_text
nodes.summary: Strips, lowercases, and collapses non-alphanumeric characters in a gap query string for comparison.

nodes.name: _is_synthetic_gap
nodes.summary: Detects whether a gap query is a harness-generated synthetic entry rather than a genuine agent knowledge gap (30 lines, heuristic keyword/prefix matching).

nodes.name: _is_curated_stale_gap
nodes.summary: Returns True if a gap text matches known stale/curated entries that should be suppressed from hint output.

nodes.name: _longest_common_substring_len
nodes.summary: Dynamic-programming longest common substring length between two strings; used for relevance scoring of gap entries against the current query (19 lines).

nodes.name: _detect_file_type
nodes.summary: Infers the primary file type (nix, python, shell, yaml, etc.) from query text and context using FILE_TYPE_TAG_MAP and regex patterns (38 lines). Used by HintsEngine.rank to apply file-type score boosts.

nodes.name: HintsEngine
nodes.summary: Central hints ranking engine (lines 113-2782). Aggregates hints from six sources (registry, gaps, static rules, runtime signals, prompt coaching, repo parity), applies feedback/bandit/efficiency/diversity adjustments, and serializes ranked hints with token budget and prompt coaching metadata.

nodes.name: HintsEngine.rank
nodes.summary: Core ranking pipeline: collects hints from all sources, applies efficiency/feedback/agent-preference/file-type/repeat-penalty adjustments, deduplicates, and calls diversity-policy selection.

nodes.name: HintsEngine.rank_as_dict
nodes.summary: Public API method — calls rank(), serializes output with token budget, prompt coaching, domain context, tool suggestions, and agent preference metadata into a response dict.

nodes.name: HintsEngine._hints_from_registry
nodes.summary: Loads hint entries from a YAML registry file, scores them by keyword overlap with the query, and returns matched Hint objects.

nodes.name: HintsEngine._hints_from_gaps
nodes.summary: Reads the knowledge-gap JSONL log, filters synthetic/stale entries via gap_analyzer, scores remaining gaps by LCS overlap with the query, and emits Hint objects.

nodes.name: HintsEngine._hints_from_static_rules
nodes.summary: Matches static rules from static_rules.STATIC_RULES against query tokens, emitting Hint objects for matched rules.

nodes.name: HintsEngine._hints_from_runtime_signals
nodes.summary: Aggregates hints from the latest aq-report snapshot and tool audit error log via _hints_from_latest_report and _hints_from_tool_audit_errors.

nodes.name: HintsEngine._hints_from_prompt_coaching
nodes.summary: Translates prompt coaching output (agent recommendation, missing fields, token discipline, domain-specific nudges) into Hint objects with typed coaching categories.

nodes.name: HintsEngine._hints_from_latest_report
nodes.summary: Parses the latest aq-report JSON for recommendations, RAG posture, hint diversity warnings, delegation failures, eval trends, route latency/breadth, and agent lessons, emitting targeted Hint objects.

nodes.name: HintsEngine._hints_from_feedback_profiles
nodes.summary: Generates positive-reinforcement and avoid-pattern hints from aggregated hint feedback profiles (thumbs up/down counts, confidence).

nodes.name: HintsEngine._hints_from_tool_audit_errors
nodes.summary: Reads tool audit JSONL log, groups errors by service/tool, and emits Hint objects for services with repeated failures relevant to the current query.

nodes.name: HintsEngine._build_prompt_coaching
nodes.summary: Constructs prompt coaching metadata: detects missing context fields, computes completeness score, recommends agent, and builds token discipline advice.

nodes.name: HintsEngine._apply_feedback_adjustment
nodes.summary: Adjusts hint scores using file-level feedback scores, DB feedback profiles, and bandit exploration bonus; returns updated Hint objects with annotated reason strings.

nodes.name: HintsEngine._bandit_adjustment
nodes.summary: UCB-style bandit exploration adjustment: computes exploration bonus from impression/click counts using sqrt(log(N)/n) formula with context-tag bonus.

nodes.name: HintsEngine._select_with_diversity_policy
nodes.summary: Enforces per-type minimum/maximum quotas when selecting the final hint set, ensuring diversity across hint categories.

nodes.name: HintsEngine._apply_repeat_penalty
nodes.summary: Penalizes recently overused hints by applying a score reduction proportional to their concentration in recent usage; hard-excludes hints above a concentration threshold.

nodes.name: HintsEngine._load_db_feedback_profiles
nodes.summary: Queries PostgreSQL (via psycopg3) for per-hint DB feedback profiles including impression counts, click counts, confidence, and preferred type tags.

nodes.name: HintsEngine._load_agent_preference_profile
nodes.summary: Builds per-agent preference profile from hint feedback JSONL: tracks preferred/avoided hint types and tags, and frequently clicked hint IDs.

nodes.name: Hint
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a ranked contextual hint. Fields: id (str), type (str), title (str), score (float), snippet (str), reason (str), tags (list), agent_hints (dict).

nodes.name: TokenBudgetContext
nodes.summary: Stateful token budget calculator (lines 53-226). Tracks task phase (explore/implement/review/debug/plan), complexity (simple/moderate/complex/critical), compaction events, and turn count. Computes per-query token budgets using PHASE_BUDGETS * COMPLEXITY_MULTIPLIERS.

nodes.name: calculate_context_aware_budget
nodes.summary: Public API (lines 241-284): instantiates or retrieves a TokenBudgetContext, detects phase/complexity/escalation from the query, calls ctx.calculate(), and returns a budget dict with recommended_input_budget, recommended_output_budget, cloud_when, and rationale.

nodes.name: _budget_rationale
nodes.summary: Produces a human-readable rationale string explaining the chosen token budget based on phase, complexity, post-compaction flag, and escalation flag.

nodes.name: _estimate_tokens
nodes.summary: Estimates token count for a text string using character-count heuristic (len/4, min 1).

nodes.name: _compress_snippet
nodes.summary: Truncates a hint snippet to max_chars characters, breaking at word boundary, and appends ellipsis.

nodes.name: _tokenize
nodes.summary: Splits text into lowercase word tokens using _TOKEN_RE regex. Used for query keyword overlap scoring.

nodes.name: get_token_budget_context
nodes.summary: Factory/singleton accessor for a shared TokenBudgetContext instance.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package init for l6-cog search module. Re-exports all public classes from embedding_optimizer, lazy_loader, query_batcher, query_cache, query_profiler, and vector_search_optimizer.

nodes.name: embedding_optimizer.py
nodes.summary: Provides EmbeddingConfig dataclass and EmbeddingOptimizer class for batched sentence embedding with optional GPU, caching, and LRU eviction. Uses SentenceTransformer for encode.

nodes.name: lazy_loader.py
nodes.summary: Implements paginated lazy loading with async prefetching. LoaderConfig controls page size, prefetch depth, and cache size; LazyLoader manages a page cache and background prefetch tasks.

nodes.name: query_batcher.py
nodes.summary: Priority-aware async query batcher for vector search. Supports URGENT/HIGH/NORMAL/LOW priority queues, auto-tuning of batch size based on latency target, and per-batch efficiency metrics.

nodes.name: query_cache.py
nodes.summary: Two-tier query result cache: in-memory LRU (InMemoryCache) backed by optional Redis (aioredis). QueryCache handles normalization, SHA-256 keying, partial result caching, and cache warming from a query spec file.

nodes.name: query_profiler.py
nodes.summary: Latency profiler for search queries. Tracks per-component timings, detects performance regressions against a rolling baseline, identifies slow queries, and exposes p50/p95/p99 percentiles.

nodes.name: vector_search_optimizer.py
nodes.summary: Qdrant-backed vector search optimizer. Configures HNSW parameters, normalizes query vectors, batches async searches, warms the index with synthetic queries, and caches normalized vectors in QueryVectorCache.

nodes.name: EmbeddingConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass config for EmbeddingOptimizer: model name, batch size, token length, cache settings, GPU flag, quantization mode, warm-up queries, normalization, and pooling strategy.

nodes.name: EmbeddingOptimizer
nodes.summary: Manages a SentenceTransformer model lifecycle: initialize with optional GPU placement and warm-up, embed_batch with in-memory LRU cache for already-seen texts, embed for single-text convenience, and get_metrics for throughput stats.

nodes.name: LoaderConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass config for LazyLoader: page_size, prefetch_pages, max_cached_pages, enable_prefetch.

nodes.name: LazyLoader
nodes.summary: Async paginated loader. get_page fetches a page via fetch_fn, caches it, evicts stale pages beyond max_cached_pages, and spawns asyncio tasks for prefetching subsequent pages.

nodes.name: Priority
nodes.summary: Enum defining query priority levels: URGENT, HIGH, NORMAL, LOW for QueryBatcher routing.

nodes.name: BatchConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass config for QueryBatcher: min/max/optimal batch sizes, wait timings, auto-tune flag, latency target, tune interval, and metrics enable.

nodes.name: QueryRequest
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a single queued vector search request: id, query_vector, collection, limit, priority, submit_time, asyncio Future, and metadata.

nodes.name: QueryBatcher
nodes.summary: Core async batch processor. Maintains 4 priority asyncio.Queues, collects batches under configurable wait windows, groups by collection, dispatches to search_fn, auto-tunes batch size to meet target latency, and tracks per-batch efficiency.

nodes.name: CacheConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass config for QueryCache: memory cache size/TTL, Redis enable/TTL/prefix, partial cache settings, warming flag, common queries file path, and LRU eviction flag.

nodes.name: InMemoryCache
nodes.summary: LRU in-memory cache backed by OrderedDict. Supports TTL-based expiry, move_to_end on access/write, eviction on capacity, get/set/delete/clear, and hit/miss statistics.

nodes.name: QueryCache
nodes.summary: Two-tier async query cache: in-memory LRU + optional Redis. Normalizes query text, builds SHA-256 cache keys, supports partial result caching, cache warming from a JSON query spec file, and exposes layered hit/miss stats.

nodes.name: ProfilerConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass config for QueryProfiler: slow query threshold (ms), regression detection enable, baseline window size, and regression threshold percentage.

nodes.name: QueryProfile
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding a single query profiling record: id, text, mode, start/end times, per-component durations dict, metadata, and computed duration_ms property.

nodes.name: QueryProfiler
nodes.summary: Tracks active and completed query profiles. start_profile/end_profile bracket a query; records per-component timings, appends to rolling baselines for regression detection, surfaces slow queries, and computes p50/p95/p99 percentiles.

nodes.name: SearchConfig
nodes.summary: Dataclass config for VectorSearchOptimizer: HNSW m/ef_construct/ef_search, query cache size/TTL, batch size, prefiltering, PCA dimensions, index warming queries, memmap threshold, profiling, and slow query threshold.

nodes.name: QueryVectorCache
nodes.summary: LRU cache for normalized query vectors backed by OrderedDict. Keyed by hash of (vector_tuple, collection, limit). TTL-based expiry, move_to_end on access, and hit/miss stats.

nodes.name: VectorSearchOptimizer
nodes.summary: Qdrant client wrapper with optimization features: configures HNSW and optimizer params on index, normalizes and caches query vectors, performs async single and batch searches, warms the index with synthetic random queries, and tracks latency/throughput metrics.

nodes.name: validate.py
nodes.summary: CLI entry point for OOXML validation. Parses --type (docx/pptx), --unpacked-dir, and --original-file arguments, selects the appropriate validator class, runs validation, and exits with status code.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package initializer for the validation module. Re-exports BaseSchemaValidator, DOCXSchemaValidator, PPTXSchemaValidator, and RedliningValidator for external consumers.

nodes.name: base.py
nodes.summary: Abstract base class for OOXML schema validation (951 lines). Provides 16 validation methods covering XML well-formedness, namespace checks, unique IDs, file references, relationship IDs, content types, and XSD schema validation with MC:Ignorable preprocessing via lxml.

nodes.name: docx.py
nodes.summary: DOCX-specific schema validator extending BaseSchemaValidator. Adds whitespace preservation checks in w:t elements, tracked change deletion/insertion validation, and paragraph count comparison between unpacked and original files.

nodes.name: pptx.py
nodes.summary: PPTX-specific schema validator extending BaseSchemaValidator. Adds UUID format validation, slide layout ID cross-referencing, duplicate slide layout detection, and notes slide reference integrity checks.

nodes.name: redlining.py
nodes.summary: Standalone redlining validator for DOCX files. Verifies tracked changes (w:ins/w:del) accurately reflect text modifications by comparing XML-extracted text before and after change removal, using git word-diff for detailed output.

nodes.name: BaseSchemaValidator
nodes.summary: Abstract base providing 18 shared validation methods for OOXML packages. Initialises with unpacked_dir and original_file paths, discovers all XML files via rglob. validate() is abstract; all other methods return error lists.

nodes.name: DOCXSchemaValidator
nodes.summary: Concrete DOCX validator extending BaseSchemaValidator. Orchestrates base checks then DOCX-specific checks: whitespace preservation, tracked deletions (w:del), tracked insertions (w:ins), and paragraph count comparison.

nodes.name: PPTXSchemaValidator
nodes.summary: Concrete PPTX validator extending BaseSchemaValidator. Orchestrates base checks then PPTX-specific checks: UUID ID format, slide layout relationship IDs, duplicate layout detection, notes slide references.

nodes.name: RedliningValidator
nodes.summary: Standalone validator taking original_file and modified_file paths. Extracts both from zip, strips tracked changes, extracts text content, and uses git word-diff to detect unexpected content differences.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point (50 lines). Parses arguments, validates preconditions (unpacked dir exists, original file exists, supported type), instantiates DOCXSchemaValidator or PPTXSchemaValidator, calls validate(), and sys.exit with error count.

nodes.name: validate_xml
nodes.summary: Validates all XML files in the unpacked directory for well-formedness using lxml.etree.parse. Collects and reports parse errors and XML syntax violations.

nodes.name: validate_file_references
nodes.summary: Validates that all targets in .rels relationship files resolve to existing package files, and reports unreferenced files. Handles both relative and external URI targets.

nodes.name: validate_all_relationship_ids
nodes.summary: Validates relationship ID (rId) attributes in XML elements against corresponding .rels definitions. Checks rIds exist in rels file and that relationship types match expected types for element names via _get_expected_relationship_type.

nodes.name: validate_content_types
nodes.summary: Validates [Content_Types].xml: checks Override and Default entries, verifies all declared part names exist as files, checks root element namespace for XML files, and ensures all files have coverage by extension or explicit override.

nodes.name: validate_against_xsd
nodes.summary: Orchestrates XSD validation across all XML files in the package by iterating files and calling validate_file_against_xsd. Aggregates per-file errors and reports summary statistics.

nodes.name: _validate_single_file_xsd
nodes.summary: Core XSD validation for a single XML file. Loads schema via _get_schema_path, preprocesses XML with _remove_template_tags_from_text_nodes and _preprocess_for_mc_ignorable, cleans ignorable namespaces, then validates against XMLSchema.

nodes.name: _get_original_file_errors
nodes.summary: Extracts the original OOXML zip package to a temp directory and runs XSD validation on the corresponding XML file to obtain baseline errors, enabling filtering of pre-existing schema violations.

nodes.name: validate
nodes.summary: Orchestrates 11-pass DOCX validation pipeline: validate_xml, validate_namespaces, validate_unique_ids, validate_file_references, validate_content_types, validate_against_xsd, validate_whitespace_preservation, validate_deletions, validate_insertions, validate_all_relationship_ids, compare_paragraph_counts.

nodes.name: validate
nodes.summary: Orchestrates 11-pass PPTX validation pipeline: validate_xml, validate_namespaces, validate_unique_ids, validate_uuid_ids, validate_file_references, validate_slide_layout_ids, validate_content_types, validate_against_xsd, validate_notes_slide_references, validate_all_relationship_ids, validate_no_duplicate_slide_layouts.

nodes.name: validate
nodes.summary: Main redlining validation: parses modified DOCX XML for tracked change annotations, extracts original file from zip to temp dir, strips tracked changes from both trees, extracts text, and calls _generate_detailed_diff for comparison report.

nodes.name: _generate_detailed_diff
nodes.summary: Generates a detailed diff report between original and modified text content by calling _get_git_word_diff for word-level diff output and assembling the error parts list.

nodes.name: _get_git_word_diff
nodes.summary: Writes two text strings to temp files and invokes 'git diff --word-diff' via subprocess.run to produce human-readable word-level diffs. Parses output to strip diff headers and return content lines.

nodes.name: _remove_claude_tracked_changes
nodes.summary: Strips OOXML tracked change markup from an XML element tree: removes w:del elements entirely, and unwraps w:ins elements by replacing them with their child content in-place, leaving clean text for comparison.

nodes.name: _extract_text_content
nodes.summary: Extracts plain text content from an OOXML XML element tree by finding paragraph elements (w:p), collecting w:t text runs within each, and joining paragraphs with newlines.

nodes.name: validate.py
nodes.summary: CLI entry point for OOXML document validation. Parses arguments (original file, unpacked dir, optional redlines file), selects PPTXSchemaValidator or DOCXSchemaValidator by file extension, runs validation, and exits 0/1.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package init that re-exports all four validator classes (BaseSchemaValidator, DOCXSchemaValidator, PPTXSchemaValidator, RedliningValidator) for convenient imports.

nodes.name: base.py
nodes.summary: Abstract base class BaseSchemaValidator (951 lines) providing 18 shared OOXML validation methods: XML well-formedness, namespace checks, unique ID deduplication, file reference integrity via .rels files, relationship type matching, content-type declaration checking, XSD schema validation with MC:Ignorable preprocessing, and template tag stripping.

nodes.name: docx.py
nodes.summary: DOCXSchemaValidator extending BaseSchemaValidator with DOCX-specific validation: xml:space whitespace preservation, w:del tracked-deletion checks, w:ins tracked-insertion checks, and paragraph count parity between original and modified DOCX.

nodes.name: pptx.py
nodes.summary: PPTXSchemaValidator extending BaseSchemaValidator with PPTX-specific checks: UUID-format presentation IDs, slide master layout relationship IDs, duplicate slide layout detection, and notes slide references.

nodes.name: redlining.py
nodes.summary: Standalone RedliningValidator that compares original vs AI-modified DOCX files to verify tracked-change correctness. Strips tracked changes from both, extracts text, and uses git word-diff to identify discrepancies.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI main: parses --file, --unpacked-dir, --redlines arguments; selects validator class by .pptx/.docx extension; instantiates and calls validate(); exits 0 on pass or 1 on failure.

nodes.name: validate_xml
nodes.summary: Validates all XML files in the unpacked OOXML package for well-formedness by parsing each with lxml etree.parse(). Collects and returns parse errors.

nodes.name: validate_namespaces
nodes.summary: Validates namespace declarations in all XML files: checks that every prefix referenced in mc:Ignorable attributes is declared in the element's namespace map.

nodes.name: validate_unique_ids
nodes.summary: Checks for duplicate ID attributes across all XML elements in the package, excluding revision IDs and bookmark IDs which are allowed to repeat. Reports per-file duplicates.

nodes.name: validate_file_references
nodes.summary: Validates all .rels relationship files: resolves each Target path to a real file, flags broken references, and identifies unreferenced package files. Handles relative and external (http) targets.

nodes.name: validate_all_relationship_ids
nodes.summary: Cross-checks r:id references used in XML content against relationship IDs declared in corresponding .rels files. Also validates that relationship types match expected types for each referencing element.

nodes.name: validate_content_types
nodes.summary: Validates [Content_Types].xml: ensures all package parts have content type declarations (Override or Default by extension), and verifies each XML file's root tag matches the declared content type.

nodes.name: validate_against_xsd
nodes.summary: Iterates all XML files and validates each against its XSD schema. Subtracts pre-existing errors (from original file) to report only new schema violations introduced by modifications.

nodes.name: validate_file_against_xsd
nodes.summary: Validates a single XML file against its XSD schema, retrieves baseline errors from the original file for subtraction, and returns the net new error set.

nodes.name: _validate_single_file_xsd
nodes.summary: Core XSD validation for one file: looks up XSD path, strips template tags, preprocesses MC:Ignorable elements, cleans ignorable namespaces, then runs lxml XMLSchema.validate() and collects error strings.

nodes.name: _get_original_file_errors
nodes.summary: Extracts the original OOXML zip to a temp directory, locates the same XML file by relative path, and runs XSD validation to establish a baseline error set to subtract from modified-file errors.

nodes.name: _get_schema_path
nodes.summary: Maps XML file names to their corresponding XSD schema file paths. Returns None for files without a known schema (skipped during XSD validation).

nodes.name: _clean_ignorable_namespaces
nodes.summary: Removes MC:Ignorable namespace attributes and corresponding prefixed elements from an XML element tree, producing a clean copy suitable for XSD validation.

nodes.name: _remove_template_tags_from_text_nodes
nodes.summary: Strips Jinja2/template tags ({{...}} and {%...%}) from XML text and tail content on w:t elements before XSD validation to prevent false schema errors on template placeholders.

nodes.name: _get_expected_relationship_type
nodes.summary: Returns the expected OOXML relationship type URI for a given XML element name, used to validate that r:id attributes reference relationships of the correct type.

nodes.name: validate (DOCXSchemaValidator)
nodes.summary: Orchestrates full DOCX validation: calls all base validation methods then DOCX-specific checks (whitespace preservation, tracked deletions, tracked insertions, paragraph count comparison). Returns aggregated error list.

nodes.name: validate_whitespace_preservation
nodes.summary: Checks that all w:t elements with leading or trailing spaces carry xml:space='preserve', reporting violations per file.

nodes.name: validate_deletions
nodes.summary: Validates w:del tracked-deletion elements: checks deleted text is non-empty and that the w:rsidDel author attribute is present.

nodes.name: validate_insertions
nodes.summary: Validates w:ins tracked-insertion elements: checks inserted text is non-empty and that the w:rsidR author attribute is present.

nodes.name: compare_paragraph_counts
nodes.summary: Compares paragraph counts between the original DOCX zip and the unpacked modified version to detect structural paragraph additions or deletions.

nodes.name: validate (PPTXSchemaValidator)
nodes.summary: Orchestrates full PPTX validation: calls all base methods then PPTX-specific checks (UUID IDs, slide layout IDs, duplicate layouts, notes slide references, all relationship IDs). Returns aggregated error list.

nodes.name: validate_uuid_ids
nodes.summary: Validates that PPTX ID attributes that look like UUIDs are properly formatted as GUIDs (8-4-4-4-12 hex pattern with optional braces/parens).

nodes.name: validate_slide_layout_ids
nodes.summary: Validates that slide layout ID references in slide masters point to valid relationship IDs declared in the corresponding .rels file.

nodes.name: validate_no_duplicate_slide_layouts
nodes.summary: Checks that no slide layout is referenced more than once in any slide master's .rels file, detecting duplicate layout entries.

nodes.name: validate_notes_slide_references
nodes.summary: Validates that each notes slide XML file is referenced exactly once from its corresponding slide .rels file, detecting missing or duplicate notes slide relationships.

nodes.name: validate (RedliningValidator)
nodes.summary: Loads modified DOCX, extracts redlining metadata, extracts and strips tracked changes from both original and modified, extracts text content, runs detailed diff, returns pass/fail with difference report.

nodes.name: _generate_detailed_diff
nodes.summary: Generates a human-readable diff between original and modified text content using git word-diff, formatting additions and deletions into a structured error report.

nodes.name: _get_git_word_diff
nodes.summary: Writes two text strings to temp files and runs git diff --word-diff=porcelain to extract word-level additions and deletions as separate line lists.

nodes.name: _remove_claude_tracked_changes
nodes.summary: Removes AI-added w:del elements and inlines w:ins element content in DOCX XML, producing a clean 'accepted changes' version for text comparison.

nodes.name: _extract_text_content
nodes.summary: Extracts paragraph text from DOCX XML by iterating w:p/w:r/w:t elements and joining runs per paragraph with newlines between paragraphs.

nodes.name: validate.py
nodes.summary: CLI entry point for OOXML validation. Parses arguments (original file, unpacked dir, file type), selects the appropriate validator (DOCX or PPTX), and runs validation, exiting with error code on failure.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package init for the validation module. Re-exports BaseSchemaValidator, DOCXSchemaValidator, PPTXSchemaValidator, and RedliningValidator for convenient import.

nodes.name: base.py
nodes.summary: Core OOXML validation logic. Defines BaseSchemaValidator with 18 methods covering XML well-formedness, namespace checks, unique ID validation, file reference integrity, content type validation, and XSD schema validation against OOXML specs.

nodes.name: docx.py
nodes.summary: DOCX-specific schema validator. Extends BaseSchemaValidator with Word-specific checks: whitespace preservation (xml:space), tracked deletion/insertion validation (w:del/w:ins), and paragraph count comparison against original.

nodes.name: pptx.py
nodes.summary: PPTX-specific schema validator. Extends BaseSchemaValidator with PowerPoint-specific checks: UUID ID format validation, slide layout ID consistency, duplicate layout detection, and notes-slide reference integrity.

nodes.name: redlining.py
nodes.summary: Standalone redlining validator. Compares modified DOCX XML against the original file, strips Claude-tracked changes (w:ins/w:del), extracts text content, and generates a git word-diff to surface unintended content modifications.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry point. Accepts --original, --unpacked, --type (docx/pptx). Validates inputs, instantiates the correct validator class, runs validate(), and exits with code 1 on any errors.

nodes.name: BaseSchemaValidator
nodes.summary: Abstract base class for OOXML schema validation. Provides 18 shared validation methods covering XML parsing, namespace integrity, unique ID checks, file references in .rels files, [Content_Types].xml coverage, and XSD schema validation with MC:Ignorable preprocessing. Subclasses override validate() to orchestrate these checks.

nodes.name: DOCXSchemaValidator
nodes.summary: DOCX-specific validator. Inherits all base checks and adds: xml:space whitespace preservation, w:del deletion integrity, w:ins insertion integrity, and paragraph count parity between original and unpacked document.xml.

nodes.name: PPTXSchemaValidator
nodes.summary: PPTX-specific validator. Inherits all base checks and adds: UUID format validation on id attributes, slide layout ID cross-reference against .rels, duplicate layout detection, and notes-slide reference consistency.

nodes.name: RedliningValidator
nodes.summary: Standalone validator for checking that only intended redline changes appear in a modified DOCX. Strips Claude-managed tracked changes, extracts paragraph text, diffs against original via git word-diff, and reports unexpected content deltas.

nodes.name: validate_xml
nodes.summary: Checks all XML files in the unpacked directory for well-formedness using lxml.etree.parse. Collects and reports parse errors.

nodes.name: validate_namespaces
nodes.summary: Validates that all namespace prefixes referenced in mc:Ignorable attributes are declared in the element's namespace map.

nodes.name: validate_unique_ids
nodes.summary: Scans XML elements for id/Id/ID attributes and verifies uniqueness within each file, ignoring revision elements. Reports duplicate and missing ID values.

nodes.name: validate_file_references
nodes.summary: Parses all .rels files, resolves relationship Target paths, verifies each referenced file exists, and detects unreferenced files in the package.

nodes.name: validate_all_relationship_ids
nodes.summary: Cross-validates that relationship IDs (r:id) referenced in XML elements correspond to entries in associated .rels files, and checks relationship types match expected element types.

nodes.name: validate_content_types
nodes.summary: Validates [Content_Types].xml: checks all package parts have a declared Override or Default content type, and verifies root element tags match expected OOXML namespaces.

nodes.name: validate_against_xsd
nodes.summary: Orchestrates XSD validation for all XML files in the package. Delegates per-file validation to validate_file_against_xsd and aggregates new errors vs errors already present in the original.

nodes.name: _validate_single_file_xsd
nodes.summary: Validates a single XML file against its mapped XSD schema. Preprocesses mc:Ignorable extensions, strips template tags, applies ignorable namespace cleanup, then runs lxml XMLSchema.validate().

nodes.name: _get_original_file_errors
nodes.summary: Extracts the original file from the source OOXML zip, validates it against XSD in a temp directory, and returns the baseline error set — used to filter pre-existing schema violations from newly introduced ones.

nodes.name: DOCXSchemaValidator.validate
nodes.summary: Orchestrates all DOCX validation steps: XML well-formedness, namespaces, unique IDs, file references, content types, XSD, whitespace preservation, deletions, insertions, relationship IDs, and paragraph count comparison.

nodes.name: validate_whitespace_preservation
nodes.summary: Validates that w:t text run elements containing leading/trailing whitespace have xml:space='preserve' set. Reports missing attributes and non-whitespace text corruption.

nodes.name: validate_deletions
nodes.summary: Checks all w:del tracked-deletion elements in document.xml for required w:author and w:date attributes, and validates that deleted text (w:delText) is non-empty.

nodes.name: validate_insertions
nodes.summary: Checks all w:ins tracked-insertion elements in document.xml for required w:author and w:date attributes, and validates that inserted text (w:t) is non-empty.

nodes.name: compare_paragraph_counts
nodes.summary: Compares w:p paragraph counts between the unpacked document.xml and the original DOCX file to detect structural changes (missing or added paragraphs).

nodes.name: PPTXSchemaValidator.validate
nodes.summary: Orchestrates all PPTX validation steps: XML well-formedness, namespaces, unique IDs, UUID IDs, file references, slide layout IDs, content types, XSD, notes-slide references, relationship IDs, and duplicate layout check.

nodes.name: validate_uuid_ids
nodes.summary: Validates that attributes ending in 'id' or 'uuid' that look like UUIDs conform to the standard UUID format (8-4-4-4-12 hex pattern).

nodes.name: validate_slide_layout_ids
nodes.summary: For each slide master, validates that all p:sldLayoutId references point to valid relationship IDs defined in the master's .rels file.

nodes.name: validate_no_duplicate_slide_layouts
nodes.summary: Detects duplicate slideLayout relationship targets within each slideMaster .rels file to prevent layout conflicts.

nodes.name: validate_notes_slide_references
nodes.summary: Validates that each slide's .rels file has at most one notesSlide relationship, and that each notesSlide is referenced by exactly one slide.

nodes.name: RedliningValidator.validate
nodes.summary: Main redlining validation flow: locates document.xml in the unpacked dir, finds the original in the source DOCX zip, strips Claude-tracked changes from both trees, extracts text, diffs via _generate_detailed_diff, and reports unintended content changes.

nodes.name: _generate_detailed_diff
nodes.summary: Generates a human-readable diff of modified vs original text content by delegating to _get_git_word_diff and assembling error messages for unexpected additions and deletions.

nodes.name: _get_git_word_diff
nodes.summary: Uses subprocess git diff --word-diff=plain on temp files to extract added and deleted text spans at the word level, returning (added_content, deleted_content) strings.

nodes.name: _remove_claude_tracked_changes
nodes.summary: Strips w:del elements (and their content) and inlines w:ins element children into the parent to normalize both original and modified trees before comparison.

nodes.name: _extract_text_content
nodes.summary: Extracts text from all w:p paragraphs by concatenating w:t text run values, returning a newline-joined string of paragraph text for diff comparison.

nodes.name: __init__
nodes.summary: Package init for the deprecated autonomous-orchestrator; re-exports all public symbols from approval, delegation_protocol, orchestrator, security_enforcer, and verification modules.

nodes.name: approval
nodes.summary: Multi-tier approval workflow for autonomous task execution; implements risk assessment, auto-approval, agent verification, and human approval queuing.

nodes.name: delegation_protocol
nodes.summary: Core delegation protocol: task-type enums, data structures, async Claude API client for task delegation, and DelegationProtocol controller.

nodes.name: orchestrator
nodes.summary: Top-level AutonomousOrchestrator wiring delegation, verification, and approval; manages end-to-end autonomous task execution with git commit integration.

nodes.name: security_enforcer
nodes.summary: Security enforcement layer with tool allowlists, command/file-path validation, circuit breaker, and audit logging for the autonomous orchestrator.

nodes.name: verification
nodes.summary: Async verification framework running syntax checks, security scans (bandit), test execution (pytest), and linting against task results before approval.

nodes.name: RiskLevel
nodes.summary: Enum defining risk tiers (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL) for task approval decisions.

nodes.name: ApprovalTier
nodes.summary: Enum defining approval escalation tiers: AUTO, AGENT, HUMAN.

nodes.name: ApprovalDecision
nodes.summary: Dataclass capturing the full approval decision: approval status, risk level, tier, reason, and flags for auto/agent/human sign-off.

nodes.name: ApprovalWorkflow
nodes.summary: Main approval workflow engine: assesses task risk across multiple factors, routes through auto/agent/human tiers, manages pending human approval queue, and tracks approval statistics.

nodes.name: get_approval_workflow
nodes.summary: Factory function that instantiates and returns a singleton ApprovalWorkflow instance.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Demo entry point exercising ApprovalWorkflow with a sample TaskResult and printing the approval decision.

nodes.name: TaskType
nodes.summary: Enum of delegatable task types: CODE_CHANGE, FILE_WRITE, RESEARCH, etc.

nodes.name: AgentPreference
nodes.summary: Enum expressing preferred execution agent: CLAUDE, LOCAL, ANY.

nodes.name: TaskStatus
nodes.summary: Enum tracking task lifecycle states: PENDING, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELLED.

nodes.name: TaskContext
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding contextual inputs for a delegated task: files to read, relevant docs, hints, dependencies, and environment variables.

nodes.name: TaskConstraints
nodes.summary: Dataclass defining execution constraints: max files changed, test requirement, safety level, line budget, and timeout.

nodes.name: DelegatedTask
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a complete task specification: type, description, context, acceptance criteria, constraints, agent preference, status tracking, cost budget, and to_dict serialization.

nodes.name: FileChange
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a single file change produced by a delegated task: path, action, diff, line counts, and full content.

nodes.name: ValidationResults
nodes.summary: Dataclass capturing multi-axis validation outcomes: syntax, tests, linting, security scan, issues, and warnings.

nodes.name: AgentQuestion
nodes.summary: Dataclass for a clarification question raised by the delegated agent: question text, answer options, recommendation, and priority.

nodes.name: TaskResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding the full result of a delegated task: status, file changes, validation results, agent questions, timing, quality score, cost, and error.

nodes.name: ClaudeAPIClient
nodes.summary: Async HTTP client for the Anthropic Claude API; builds structured task prompts, POSTs to the messages endpoint with aiohttp, and parses JSON-embedded responses into TaskResult objects.

nodes.name: DelegationProtocol
nodes.summary: High-level delegation controller: receives DelegatedTask objects, validates constraints, routes to ClaudeAPIClient, tracks per-agent statistics, and returns TaskResult.

nodes.name: get_delegation_protocol
nodes.summary: Factory function instantiating and returning a DelegationProtocol instance.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Demo async entry point creating a sample DelegatedTask and exercising the full delegation protocol end-to-end.

nodes.name: ApprovalMode
nodes.summary: Enum defining orchestrator approval gate modes: AUTONOMOUS, AGENT_GATED, HUMAN_GATED.

nodes.name: OrchestrationResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass summarizing an orchestration run: success flag, task counts (completed/failed), commit count, total cost, execution time, and error list.

nodes.name: AutonomousOrchestrator
nodes.summary: Top-level orchestrator composing DelegationProtocol, VerificationFramework, and ApprovalWorkflow; runs full autonomous task lifecycle: delegate → verify → approve → write files → git add/commit with error rollback.

nodes.name: get_orchestrator
nodes.summary: Factory function creating an AutonomousOrchestrator with configurable approval mode and per-task cost ceiling.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Demo entry point executing a sample task through the full autonomous orchestration pipeline and printing the result.

nodes.name: OperationMode
nodes.summary: Enum defining security enforcer modes: STRICT, PERMISSIVE, AUDIT_ONLY.

nodes.name: SecurityViolation
nodes.summary: Exception raised when a tool call violates security policy (blocked command, disallowed path, or disallowed tool).

nodes.name: SecurityEnforcer
nodes.summary: Security gate for tool calls: enforces tool allowlists, blocked command patterns, file path allow/block lists, circuit breaker thresholds, and structured audit logging.

nodes.name: get_enforcer
nodes.summary: Factory function instantiating SecurityEnforcer with the specified OperationMode.

nodes.name: CheckStatus
nodes.summary: Enum of individual verification check statuses: PASSED, FAILED, SKIPPED, WARNING.

nodes.name: CheckResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass capturing the result of a single verification check: name, status, details, issues, warnings, and execution time.

nodes.name: VerificationResult
nodes.summary: Dataclass aggregating all check results with an overall pass/fail flag, quality score, recommendation, and to_dict serialization.

nodes.name: VerificationFramework
nodes.summary: Async verification engine running four check phases against task result changes: syntax (python -m py_compile), security scan (bandit), test suite (pytest), and custom linting; aggregates into VerificationResult.

nodes.name: get_verifier
nodes.summary: Factory function creating a VerificationFramework with an optional repo root path.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Demo async entry point running the verification framework against a sample task result and printing check results.

nodes.name: learning_lifecycle.py
nodes.summary: Core lifecycle status definitions and validation utilities for learning records in the hybrid-coordinator. Defines promotion lifecycle states (CANDIDATE, DEFAULT, RUNTIME_ACTIVE, RETIRED) and utility functions for status normalization, ranking, and record filtering.

nodes.name: lesson_effectiveness_tracker.py
nodes.summary: Tracks lesson usage events and computes effectiveness statistics for the learning loop. Maintains in-memory state of lesson usage history, per-lesson success/failure metrics, and provides context-aware lesson recommendations for promoted runtime-active lessons.

nodes.name: learning_lifecycle.py
nodes.summary: One-line re-export shim that forwards all symbols from extensions/learning_lifecycle.py for backward-compatible imports from the coordinator package root.

nodes.name: lesson_effectiveness_tracker.py
nodes.summary: One-line re-export shim that forwards all symbols from extensions/lesson_effectiveness_tracker.py for backward-compatible imports from the coordinator package root.

nodes.name: test_learning_lifecycle.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the learning lifecycle and lesson effectiveness systems. Covers record validation contract, runtime-active filter logic (excludes CANDIDATE and RETIRED), and lesson recommendation gate requiring PROMOTED/RUNTIME_ACTIVE status.

nodes.name: LearningLifecycleStatus
nodes.summary: Enum-like class defining promotion lifecycle states: CANDIDATE, DEFAULT, RUNTIME_ACTIVE, PROMOTED, RETIRED, and UNKNOWN. Used as string constants throughout the learning loop.

nodes.name: LearningRecordValidation
nodes.summary: Dataclass holding validation results for a learning record: valid flag, list of missing fields, normalized promotion_status, and runtime_active boolean. Has to_dict() serialization method.

nodes.name: normalize_promotion_status
nodes.summary: Normalizes a raw promotion_status value to a canonical lowercase string. Accepts LearningLifecycleStatus instances or raw strings; strips and lowercases; returns 'unknown' for None/empty.

nodes.name: is_default_runtime_active
nodes.summary: Returns True if the normalized status is DEFAULT or RUNTIME_ACTIVE — the two states where a lesson is considered usable for active routing.

nodes.name: is_retired
nodes.summary: Returns True if the normalized status is RETIRED, indicating the lesson should be excluded from recommendations and filtering.

nodes.name: lifecycle_rank
nodes.summary: Returns the numeric rank of a status in the LIFECYCLE_ORDER list for comparison and sorting of promotion progress.

nodes.name: strongest_status
nodes.summary: Given a list of status values, returns the highest-ranked (most promoted) status. Used when aggregating multiple promotion signals for the same lesson.

nodes.name: validate_learning_record
nodes.summary: Validates a learning record dict for required fields (lesson_key, content, promotion_metadata). Returns a LearningRecordValidation with validity flag, missing fields, and runtime_active assessment.

nodes.name: filter_runtime_active_records
nodes.summary: Filters a list of learning records to only those with a runtime-active (DEFAULT or RUNTIME_ACTIVE) and non-retired promotion status, based on their promotion_metadata.

nodes.name: LessonUsageEvent
nodes.summary: Dataclass capturing a single lesson usage event: lesson_key, timestamp, context, success flag, agent identity, latency_ms, and metadata. Serializable via to_dict().

nodes.name: LessonEffectivenessStats
nodes.summary: Dataclass accumulating per-lesson effectiveness metrics: total/successful/failed uses, avg_latency_ms, recent_contexts list, promotion_status, last_used timestamp. Exposes success_rate property and to_dict() serialization.

nodes.name: LessonTrackerState
nodes.summary: Module-level singleton dataclass holding shared mutable state: usage_history list, lesson_stats dict keyed by lesson_key, and context_usage_matrix for cross-context analysis.

nodes.name: track_lesson_usage
nodes.summary: Records a lesson usage event into the global tracker state. Updates LessonEffectivenessStats for the lesson key, computes strongest promotion status, and appends to context_usage_matrix. Primary write path for the learning loop.

nodes.name: get_lesson_effectiveness_stats
nodes.summary: Computes and returns aggregate effectiveness statistics: per-lesson stats sorted by success rate, overall success/failure totals, average latency, context coverage matrix, and top lessons per context. Primary read path for observability.

nodes.name: get_lesson_recommendation
nodes.summary: Returns context-relevant lesson recommendations from the tracker state. Filters to runtime-active lessons, scores by context match and success rate, returns top-N sorted recommendations.

nodes.name: get_recent_lesson_events
nodes.summary: Returns the N most recent lesson usage events from usage_history as serialized dicts, in reverse chronological order.

nodes.name: clear_lesson_tracking
nodes.summary: Clears all in-memory lesson tracking state (usage_history, lesson_stats, context_usage_matrix). Used in tests and for state reset operations.

nodes.name: _record
